content.text: VB.NET WinForms 프로젝트네요. 주요 파일 확인합니다.

content.content:
﻿Imports System.Runtime.InteropServices
Imports System.Text

Module Module1

    Public iniFilePath As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "setting.ini"

    Public FlagDuplicateCheck As Boolean

    Public password As String
    Public Tool1UseCheck As Boolean

    Public AIR_TOOL_COUNT As Integer

    Public OPTION_TOOL As Boolean

    Public PlcDw(0 To 10000) As Integer

    Public PlcInStartAddress As Integer
    Public PlcOutStartAddress As Integer

    Public LockBoltTool_Max As Double
    Public LockBoltTool_Min As Double
    Public LockBoltTool_Unit As Double

    Public Tool1_Max As Double
    Public Tool1_Min As Double
    Public Tool1_Unit As Double

    Public Tool2_Max As Double
    Public Tool2_Min As Double
    Public Tool2_Unit As Double

    Public PortNumber_Rfid As String
    Public PortNumber_Scanner As String
    Public PortNumber_Printer As String
    Public PortNumber_Tool1 As String
    Public PortNumber_Tool2 As String
    Public PortNumber_LockBoltTool As String
    Public PortNumber_Module As String

    Public SqlConnect As ADODB.Connection
    Public MdbConnect As ADODB.Connection

    Public D_Value(0 To 16) As Integer
    Public D_OutString As String

    Public Sub ExecuteQurryMDB(ByVal strQurry As String)

        Dim strSQL As String = ""
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            MdbConnect.Execute(strQurry)
        Catch ex As Exception
            'MsgBox(ex.ToString)
        End Try
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Public Sub ConnectionOpenMDB()

        MdbConnect = New ADODB.Connection
        MdbConnect.ConnectionString = _
                "Provider=Microsoft.jet.OLEDB.4.0; Data Source=" & System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\DB\DB.mdb"
        MdbConnect.Open()

    End Sub

    Public Sub ConnectionCloseMDB()

        MdbConnect.Close()

    End Sub

    Public Sub LoadBasicData()

        ConnectionOpenMDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Basic", MdbConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Tool1_Max = CDbl(Rs.Fields("TOOL1_MAX").Value)
            Tool1_Min = CDbl(Rs.Fields("TOOL1_MIN").Value)
            Tool1_Unit = Rs.Fields("TOOL1_unit").Value

            Tool2_Max = CDbl(Rs.Fields("TOOL2_MAX").Value)
            Tool2_Min = CDbl(Rs.Fields("TOOL2_MIN").Value)
            Tool2_Unit = Rs.Fields("TOOL2_unit").Value

            LockBoltTool_Max = CDbl(Rs.Fields("LockBoltTool_MAX").Value)
            LockBoltTool_Min = CDbl(Rs.Fields("LockBoltTool_MIN").Value)
            LockBoltTool_Unit = Rs.Fields("LockBoltTool_UNIT").Value

            PlcInStartAddress = CInt(Rs.Fields("plcinstartaddress").Value)
            PlcOutStartAddress = CInt(Rs.Fields("plcoutstartaddress").Value)

            AIR_TOOL_COUNT = CInt(Rs.Fields("AIR_TOOL_COUNT").Value)

            Tool1UseCheck = Rs.Fields("Tool1UseCheck").Value
            FlagDuplicateCheck = Rs.Fields("FlagDuplicateCheck").Value

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Public Sub SaveBasicData()

        ConnectionOpenMDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Basic", MdbConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Rs.Fields("TOOL1_MAX").Value = CStr(Tool1_Max)
            Rs.Fields("TOOL1_MIN").Value = CStr(Tool1_Min)
            Rs.Fields("TOOL1_UNIT").Value = Tool1_Unit

            Rs.Fields("TOOL2_MAX").Value = CStr(Tool2_Max)
            Rs.Fields("TOOL2_MIN").Value = CStr(Tool2_Min)
            Rs.Fields("TOOL2_UNIT").Value = Tool2_Unit

            Rs.Fields("LockBoltTool_MAX").Value = CStr(LockBoltTool_Max)
            Rs.Fields("LockBoltTool_MIN").Value = CStr(LockBoltTool_Min)
            Rs.Fields("LockBoltTool_UNIT").Value = LockBoltTool_Unit

            Rs.Fields("plcInstartaddress").Value = CStr(PlcInStartAddress)
            Rs.Fields("plcOutstartaddress").Value = CStr(PlcOutStartAddress)

            Rs.Fields("AIR_TOOL_COUNT").Value = CStr(AIR_TOOL_COUNT)

            Rs.Fields("Tool1UseCheck").Value = Tool1UseCheck
            Rs.Fields("FlagDuplicateCheck").Value = FlagDuplicateCheck

            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Public Sub LoadPortData()

        ConnectionOpenMDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_SerialPort", MdbConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            PortNumber_Rfid = Rs.Fields("RFID").Value
            PortNumber_Scanner = Rs.Fields("SCANNER").Value
            PortNumber_Printer = Rs.Fields("Printer").Value
            PortNumber_Module = Rs.Fields("Module").Value
            PortNumber_Tool1 = Rs.Fields("Tool1").Value
            PortNumber_Tool2 = Rs.Fields("Tool2").Value
            PortNumber_LockBoltTool = Rs.Fields("LockBoltTool").Value
            password = Rs.Fields("PASSWORD").Value
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Public Sub SavePortData()

        ConnectionOpenMDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_SerialPort", MdbConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Rs.Fields("RFID").Value = PortNumber_Rfid
            Rs.Fields("SCANNER").Value = PortNumber_Scanner
            Rs.Fields("Printer").Value = PortNumber_Printer
            Rs.Fields("Module").Value = PortNumber_Module
            Rs.Fields("Tool1").Value = PortNumber_Tool1
            Rs.Fields("Tool2").Value = PortNumber_Tool2
            Rs.Fields("LockBoltTool").Value = PortNumber_LockBoltTool
            Rs.Fields("PASSWORD").Value = password
            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Sub ConnectionOpenSql()

        'Dim connection_string As String
        'SqlConnect = New ADODB.Connection
        'connection_string = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.100;Initial Catalog=FTECH_SVR;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        'SqlConnect.ConnectionString = connection_string
        'SqlConnect.Open()

    End Sub

    Sub ConnectionCloseSql()

        'SqlConnect.Close()

    End Sub

    Sub gConnectionOpenSql()

        Dim connection_string As String
        SqlConnect = New ADODB.Connection
        connection_string = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=FTECH_SVR;Initial Catalog=FTECH_SVR;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        SqlConnect.ConnectionString = connection_string
        SqlConnect.Open()

    End Sub

    Sub gConnectionCloseSql()

        SqlConnect.Close()

    End Sub

    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String

        Dim hexv As String, na As Long

        hexv = ""
        Do While DecNum > 0

            na = DecNum Mod 16

            Select Case na
                Case 10
                    hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 11
                    hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 12
                    hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 13
                    hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 14
                    hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 15
                    hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
                Case Else
                    hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
            End Select
            If DecNum >= 16 Then
                DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
            Else
                hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
                Exit Do
            End If
        Loop

        If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
            Dec2Hex = Mid(hexv, 2)
        Else
            Dec2Hex = hexv
        End If
    End Function

    ' INI 파일 읽기/쓰기 클래스
    Public Class IniFile
        Private path As String

        Public Sub New(path As String)
            Me.path = path
        End Sub

        <DllImport("kernel32")>
        Private Shared Function GetPrivateProfileString(section As String, key As String, defaultValue As String, retVal As StringBuilder, size As Integer, filePath As String) As Integer
        End Function

        <DllImport("kernel32")>
        Private Shared Function WritePrivateProfileString(section As String, key As String, value As String, filePath As String) As Integer
        End Function

        Public Function ReadValue(section As String, key As String, defaultValue As String) As String
            Dim retVal As New StringBuilder(255)
            GetPrivateProfileString(section, key, defaultValue, retVal, 255, path)
            Return retVal.ToString()
        End Function

        Public Sub WriteValue(section As String, key As String, value As String)
            WritePrivateProfileString(section, key, value, path)
        End Sub
    End Class

End Module

    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String

        Dim hexv As String, na As Long

        hexv = ""
        Do While DecNum > 0

            na = DecNum Mod 16

            Select Case na
                Case 10
                    hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 11
                    hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 12
                    hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 13
                    hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 14
                    hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 15
                    hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
                Case Else
                    hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
            End Select
            If DecNum >= 16 Then
                DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
            Else
                hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
                Exit Do
            End If
        Loop

        If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
            Dec2Hex = Mid(hexv, 2)
        Else
            Dec2Hex = hexv
        End If
    End Function

    ' INI 파일 읽기/쓰기 클래스
    Public Class IniFile
        Private path As String

        Public Sub New(path As String)
            Me.path = path
        End Sub

        <DllImport("kernel32")>
        Private Shared Function GetPrivateProfileString(section As String, key As String, defaultValue As String, retVal As StringBuilder, size As Integer, filePath As String) As Integer
        End Function

        <DllImport("kernel32")>
        Private Shared Function WritePrivateProfileString(section As String, key As String, value As String, filePath As String) As Integer
        End Function

        Public Function ReadValue(section As String, key As String, defaultValue As String) As String
            Dim retVal As New StringBuilder(255)
            GetPrivateProfileString(section, key, defaultValue, retVal, 255, path)
            Return retVal.ToString()
        End Function

        Public Sub WriteValue(section As String, key As String, value As String)
            WritePrivateProfileString(section, key, value, path)
        End Sub
    End Class

End Module

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then

            'RFID Data length => 1A(26자리) 읽어오기 *앞 3자리 파레트 넘버 나머지 23자리 시리얼 넘버
            Serial_RFID.Write(Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H07") & Chr("&H05") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H00") &
                                          Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H1A") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8") & Chr("&H03"))
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Write_RFID(ByVal str As String)

        Dim i As Integer

        Dim tmp1 As String = Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H1E") & Chr("&H06") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H00") &
                                                Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H17") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8")

        tmp1 = tmp1 & str & Chr("&H03")

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Serial_RFID.Write(tmp1)
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""
        Dim RFID_Tag_Data As String = ""

        Do
            Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
            If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
            Else
                sRecvData = sRecvData & Chr(Incoming1)
                If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                    If sRecvData.Length = 7 Or sRecvData.Length = 6 Then
                        Panel_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                    Else
                        RFID_Tag_Data = Mid(sRecvData, 6, 26)
                        Label11.Text = RFID_Tag_Data
                        Panel_RF_READ.Text = Mid(RFID_Tag_Data, 4, 23)
                        RFID_Pallet_No = Mid(RFID_Tag_Data, 1, 3)
                        'Panel_Pallet.Text = RFID_Pallet_No
                    End If
                    'For i = 1 To sRecvData.Length
                    'TextBox1.Text = TextBox1.Text & Mid(sRecvData, i, 1) & " "
                    'Next
                    'TextBox1.Text = TextBox1.Text & vbCrLf
                    sRecvData = ""
                End If
            End If
        Loop

    End Sub


    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_Rfid
            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID.Open()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open RFID Fail " & PortNumber_Rfid)
        End Try

        If PortNumber_Scanner = "NONE" Then
        Else
            Try
                If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                    Serial_Scanner.Close()
                End If
                Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_Scanner
                Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Scanner.Open()
            Catch ex As Exception

                MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_Scanner)
            End Try
        End If

        If PortNumber_Tool1 = "NONE" Then

        Else
            Try
                Serial_Tool1.PortName = PortNumber_Tool1
                If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen() = True Then
                    Serial_Tool1.Close()
                    Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Tool1.Open()
                Else
                    Serial_Tool1.BaudRate = 9600
                    Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Tool1.Open()
                End If
                Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Tmr_TOOL1.Interval = 5000
                Tmr_TOOL1.Start()
            Catch ex As Exception
                MsgBox("Serial Open Tool Fail " & PortNumber_Tool1)
            End Try
        End If

        If PortNumber_Tool2 = "NONE" Then

        Else
            Try

            Catch ex As Exception
                Serial_Tool2.PortName = PortNumber_Tool2
                If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen() = True Then
                    Serial_Tool2.Close()
                    Serial_Tool2.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Tool2.Open()
                Else
                    Serial_Tool2.BaudRate = 9600
                    Serial_Tool2.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Tool2.Open()
                End If
                Serial_Tool2.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Serial_Tool2.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Tmr_TOOL2.Interval = 5000
                Tmr_TOOL2.Start()
            End Try
        End If
        If PortNumber_Module = "NONE" Then
        Else
            Try

                If Serial_Module.IsOpen() = True Then
                    Serial_Module.Close()
                    Serial_Module.PortName = PortNumber_Module
                    Serial_Module.BaudRate = 115200
                    Serial_Module.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Module.Open()
                    'Label8.Text = "Module OK"
                Else
                    Serial_Module.PortName = PortNumber_Module
                    Serial_Module.BaudRate = 115200
                    Serial_Module.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Module.Open()
                    'Label8.Text = "Module OK"
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_Module)

            End Try
        End If


    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim Incoming1 As String

        Do While Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool1.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool1.ReadChar

                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String1) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection1 = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0061" Then

                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))

                            ' N/HGT toolstep 10~14
                            If toolstep = 10 Then
                                If CheckIOCondition(NHgt_P1(0)) Then
                                    If Mid(Tool_String1, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        Panel_TQ1.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))
                                        Panel_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                        Panel_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                        toolstep = 11
                                    End If
                                Else
                                    Panel_TQ1_DEC.Text = "POS NG"
                                    Panel_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                    NG()
                                End If

                            ElseIf toolstep = 11 Then
                                If CheckIOCondition(NHgt_P1(1)) Then
                                    If Mid(Tool_String1, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        Panel_TQ2.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))

                                        Panel_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()

                                Else

                                    NG()
                                End If

                                Else

                                        Panel_TQ1.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))

                                    If Mid(Tool_String1, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        Panel_TQ4.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))

    Private Sub Tmr_TOOL1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_TOOL1.Tick

        If Tool1Connection = False Then

        ElseIf Tool1Connection = True Then
            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_ON(ByVal num1 As Integer)

        Mid$(D_OutString, CInt(num1 + 2), 1) = "1"
        LED_OUT(num1).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(num1) & " Filled-50")

    End Sub

    Sub DO_OFF(ByVal num1 As Integer)

        Mid$(D_OutString, CInt(num1 + 2), 1) = "0"
        LED_OUT(num1).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(num1) & "-50")

    End Sub

    Sub DO_WRITE()
        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then Serial_Module.Write(D_OutString)
    End Sub
    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()
        Dim ScanDAta As String = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Panel_Scanner_Input.Text = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)

        '        첫자리 LH, RH
        '2~3자리 : 생산년도
        '4자리 : 생산월(A - 1월, B - 2월 .....)
        '5~6자리 : 생산일자
        '7~11자리 : 로트숫자
        '이후자리:   펌핑 작동력

        If wStep > 5 Then

            If (ScanDAta.Contains("LS") = True Or ScanDAta.Contains("RS") = True) And Panel_Pump_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then

                Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                If CheckPumpDuplicated(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text) = False Then
                    If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 2) = "LS" Then
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        Else
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                        End If
                    ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 2) = "RS" Then
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        Else
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                        End If
                    End If
                Else
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "DUPLICATED"
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                End If

            Else

                If Panel_Blower_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then
                    Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                    If Panel_Scanner_Input.Text.Contains(OPTION_BLOWER_BARCODE) And Panel_Blower_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then
                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                        If CheckBlowerDuplicated(Panel_Scanner_Input.Text) = True Then
                            Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "Duplicated"
                            Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                            wStep = 9
                        Else
                            Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                            Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        End If
                    Else
                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NG"
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                        NG()
                    End If

                End If

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1

   268→                                                Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H17") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8")

   311→    Sub SerialOpen()
   312→
   313→        Try
   314→            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
   315→                Serial_RFID.Close()
   316→            End If
   317→            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_Rfid
   318→            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
   319→            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
   320→            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
   321→            Serial_RFID.Open()
   322→        Catch ex As Exception
   323→            MsgBox("Serial Open RFID Fail " & PortNumber_Rfid)
   324→        End Try
   325→
   326→        If PortNumber_Scanner = "NONE" Then
   327→        Else
   328→            Try
   329→                If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
   330→                    Serial_Scanner.Close()
   331→                End If
   332→                Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_Scanner
   333→                Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
   334→                Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
   335→                Serial_Scanner.Open()
   336→            Catch ex As Exception
   337→
   338→                MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_Scanner)
   339→            End Try
   340→        End If
   341→
   342→        If PortNumber_Tool1 = "NONE" Then
   343→
   344→        Else
   345→            Try
   346→                Serial_Tool1.PortName = PortNumber_Tool1
   347→                If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen() = True Then
   348→                    Serial_Tool1.Close()
   349→                    Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
   350→                    Serial_Tool1.Open()
   351→                Else
   352→                    Serial_Tool1.BaudRate = 9600
   353→                    Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
   354→                    Serial_Tool1.Open()
   355→                End If
   356→                Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
   357→                Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
   358→                Tmr_TOOL1.Interval = 5000
   359→                Tmr_TOOL1.Start()
   360→            Catch ex As Exception
   361→                MsgBox("Serial Open Tool Fail " & PortNumber_Tool1)
   362→            End Try
   363→        End If
   364→
   365→        If PortNumber_Tool2 = "NONE" Then
   366→
   367→        Else
   368→            Try
   369→
   370→            Catch ex As Exception
   371→                Serial_Tool2.PortName = PortNumber_Tool2
   372→                If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen() = True Then
   373→                    Serial_Tool2.Close()
   374→                    Serial_Tool2.DataBits = 8
   375→                    Serial_Tool2.Open()
   376→                Else
   377→                    Serial_Tool2.BaudRate = 9600
   378→                    Serial_Tool2.DataBits = 8
   379→                    Serial_Tool2.Open()
   380→                End If
   381→                Serial_Tool2.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
   382→                Serial_Tool2.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
   383→                Tmr_TOOL2.Interval = 5000
   384→                Tmr_TOOL2.Start()
   385→            End Try
   386→        End If
   387→        If PortNumber_Module = "NONE" Then
   388→        Else
   389→            Try
   390→
   391→                If Serial_Module.IsOpen() = True Then
   392→                    Serial_Module.Close()
   393→                    Serial_Module.PortName = PortNumber_Module
   394→                    Serial_Module.BaudRate = 115200
   395→                    Serial_Module.DataBits = 8
   396→                    Serial_Module.Open()
   397→                    'Label8.Text = "Module OK"
   398→                Else
   399→                    Serial_Module.PortName = PortNumber_Module
   400→                    Serial_Module.BaudRate = 115200
   401→                    Serial_Module.DataBits = 8
   402→                    Serial_Module.Open()
   403→                    'Label8.Text = "Module OK"
   404→                End If
   405→
   406→            Catch ex As Exception
   407→
   408→                MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_Module)
   409→
   410→            End Try
   411→        End If
   412→
   413→

   656→    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived
   657→
   658→        Dim Incoming As String
   659→        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()
   660→        Dim ScanDAta As String = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
   661→        Panel_Scanner_Input.Text = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
   662→
   663→        '        첫자리 LH, RH
   664→        '2~3자리 : 생산년도
   665→        '4자리 : 생산월(A - 1월, B - 2월 .....)
   666→        '5~6자리 : 생산일자
   667→        '7~11자리 : 로트숫자
   668→        '이후자리:   펌핑 작동력
   669→
   670→        If wStep > 5 Then
   671→
   672→            If (ScanDAta.Contains("LS") = True Or ScanDAta.Contains("RS") = True) And Panel_Pump_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then
   673→
   674→                Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
   675→                If CheckPumpDuplicated(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text) = False Then
   676→                    If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
   677→                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 2) = "LS" Then
   678→                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
   679→                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
   680→                            DingDOng()
   681→                        Else
   682→                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
   683→                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
   684→                            NG()
   685→                        End If
   686→                    ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
   687→                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 2) = "RS" Then
   688→                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
   689→                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
   690→                            DingDOng()
   691→                        Else
   692→                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
   693→                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
   694→                            NG()
   695→                        End If
   696→                    End If
   697→                Else
   698→                    Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "DUPLICATED"
   699→                    Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
   700→                    NG()
   701→                End If
   702→
   703→            Else
   704→
   705→                If Panel_Blower_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then
   706→                    Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
   707→                    If Panel_Scanner_Input.Text.Contains(OPTION_BLOWER_BARCODE) And Panel_Blower_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then
   708→                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
   709→                        If CheckBlowerDuplicated(Panel_Scanner_Input.Text) = True Then
   710→                            Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "Duplicated"
   711→                            Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
   712→                            NG()
   713→                            wStep = 9
   714→                        Else
   715→                            Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
   716→                            Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK"
   717→                            Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
   718→                            DingDOng()
   719→                        End If
   720→                    Else
   721→                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
   722→                        Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NG"
   723→                        Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
   724→                        NG()
   725→                    End If
   726→
   727→                End If
   728→
   729→            End If
   730→
   731→        End If
   732→
   733→    End Sub

   780→    Private Sub PlcRead()
   781→
   782→        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
   783→        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
   784→        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'

   788→        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 11
   789→        Dim j As Integer
   790→        Dim i As Integer
   791→
   792→        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
   793→        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)
   794→
   795→        'szDeviceName = "W0000" & vbLf &
   796→        '                        "W0001" & vbLf &
   797→        '                        "W0050" & vbLf &
   798→        '                        "W0051" & vbLf &
   799→        '                        "W0052" & vbLf &
   800→        '                        "W0053" & vbLf &
   801→        '                        "W0054" & vbLf &
   802→        '                        "W0055" & vbLf &
   803→        '                        "W0056" & vbLf &
   804→        '                        "W0057"
   805→
   806→        szDeviceName = "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress, "0000") & vbLf &
   807→                                "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress + 1, "0000") & vbLf &
   808→                                "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress + 2, "0000") & vbLf &
   809→                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress, "0000") & vbLf &

   811→                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 2, "0000") & vbLf &

   814→                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 5, "0000") & vbLf &
   815→                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 6, "0000") & vbLf &
   816→                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 7, "0000")
   817→        Try

   824→
   825→        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
   826→        If iReturnCode = 0 Then
   827→
   828→            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
   829→            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
   830→                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
   831→            Next iNumber
   832→            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
   833→                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))

   835→
   836→            PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress) = PLC_VALUE(0)
   837→            PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress + 1) = PLC_VALUE(1)
   838→            PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress + 2) = PLC_VALUE(2)

   840→            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress) = PLC_VALUE(3)
   841→            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 1) = PLC_VALUE(4)
   842→            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 2) = PLC_VALUE(5)
   843→            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 3) = PLC_VALUE(6)
   844→            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 4) = PLC_VALUE(7)
   845→            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 5) = PLC_VALUE(8)

   848→            VALUE_IN_LABEL(1).Text = PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress + 1)
   849→            VALUE_IN_LABEL(2).Text = PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress + 2)
   850→
   851→            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(0).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress)
   852→            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(1).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 1)
   853→            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(2).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 2)
   854→            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(3).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 3)
   855→            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(4).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 4)
   856→            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(5).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 5)
   857→
   858→            For j = 0 To 2
   859→                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
   860→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
   861→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White

   864→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black

   873→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
   874→                End If
   875→            Next
   876→            tError1 = "OK"

   878→        Else

   882→        End If

  1231→    Private Sub Tmr_Work_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work.Tick
  1232→
  1233→        Label_STep.Text = wStep
  1234→
  1235→        ' D_Value LED 업데이트
  1236→        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
  1237→            Try
  1238→                If D_Value(i) = 0 Then
  1239→                    LED_IN(i).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(i) & "-50")
  1240→                Else
  1241→                    LED_IN(i).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(i) & " Filled-50")
  1242→                End If
  1243→            Catch ex As Exception
  1244→            End Try
  1245→        Next i
  1246→
  1247→        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then
  1248→            WorkPArt = Panel_PartNo.Text
  1249→            InitControl()
  1250→            If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
  1251→                FrmImage.Show()
  1252→                FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
  1253→            Else
  1254→            End If
  1255→            InitControl()
  1256→            PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", "000000000")
  1257→            wStep = 0
  1258→        End If
  1259→
  1260→        If wStep = 0 Then
  1261→
  1262→            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 Then
  1263→                If FrmImage.Visible = True Then FrmImage.Close()
  1264→                TIMER_COUNT = 0
  1265→                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ""
  1266→                'Panel_RF_UID.Text = ""
  1267→                'frmimage.Close()
  1268→                wStep = 1 '제품인
  1269→            End If
  1270→
  1271→        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then
  1272→
  1273→            TIMER_COUNT = TIMER_COUNT + 0.1
  1274→            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then wStep = 1.5
  1275→            If TIMER_COUNT > 2.0 Then
  1276→                If Panel_RF_READ.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
  1277→                    PLC_STRING_1 = "000000000"
  1278→                    Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "3"
  1279→                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", PLC_STRING_1)
  1280→                    wStep = 10
  1281→                End If
  1282→            End If
  1283→
  1284→        ElseIf wStep = 1.5 Then
  1285→
  1286→            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then
  1287→                Panel_SN.Text = Panel_RF_READ.Text
  1288→                If Panel_SN.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
  1289→                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
  1290→                    wStep = 10
  1291→                Else
  1292→                    Check_BEFORE(Panel_SN.Text)
  1293→                    'Panel_Before.Text = "OK"
  1294→                    If Panel_Before.Text = "OK" Then
  1295→                        If Panel_Rework.Text = "" Then
  1296→                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
  1297→                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "OK" Then
  1298→                            'wStep = 10
  1299→                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
  1300→                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")s
  1301→                            'wStep = 10
  1302→                            REWORK_STOP = True
  1303→                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
  1304→
  1305→                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "NG" Then
  1306→                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
  1307→                        End If
  1308→                    Else
  1309→                        wStep = 10
  1310→                        PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
  1311→                    End If
  1312→                End If
  1313→            End If
  1314→
  1315→        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달
  1316→
  1317→            PLC_STRING_1 = "000000000"
  1318→
  1319→            If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
  1320→                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "1"
  1321→            ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
  1322→                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "2"
  1323→            End If
  1324→
  1325→            If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then

  1549→    ' IO 조건 확인 함수 ("번호_ON/번호_OFF" 형식)
  1550→    Private Function CheckIOCondition(str As String) As Boolean
  1551→        If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(str) Then Return True
  1552→
  1553→        Dim conditions() As String = str.Split("/"c)
  1554→
  1555→        For Each cond As String In conditions
  1556→            cond = cond.Trim()
  1557→            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(cond) Then Continue For
  1558→
  1559→            Dim parts() As String = cond.Split("_"c)
  1560→            If parts.Length <> 2 Then Return False
  1561→
  1562→            Dim ioNumber As Integer
  1563→            If Not Integer.TryParse(parts(0), ioNumber) Then Return False
  1564→
  1565→            Dim expectedValue As Integer
  1566→            If parts(1).ToUpper() = "ON" Then
  1567→                expectedValue = 1
  1568→            ElseIf parts(1).ToUpper() = "OFF" Then
  1569→                expectedValue = 0
  1570→            Else
  1571→                Return False
  1572→            End If
  1573→
  1574→            If ioNumber < 0 OrElse ioNumber >= D_Value.Length Then Return False
  1575→
  1576→            If D_Value(ioNumber) <> expectedValue Then
  1577→                Return False
  1578→            End If
  1579→        Next
  1580→
  1581→        Return True
  1582→    End Function
  1583→    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String
  1584→
  1585→        Dim tmp As String = ""
  1586→        Dim i As Integer
  1587→
  1588→        For i = 1 To Len(str)
  1589→            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
  1590→        Next
  1591→
  1592→        Return tmp
  1593→
  1594→    End Function
  1595→
  1596→    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String
  1597→
  1598→        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, i, retVal
  1599→        For i = 1 To Len(str)
  1600→            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
  1601→            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
  1602→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
  1603→                i = i + 1
  1604→            Else
  1605→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
  1606→                i = i + 3
  1607→            End If
  1608→            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
  1609→        Next
  1610→        Return retVal
  1611→
  1612→    End Function

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then

            'RFID Data length => 1A(26자리) 읽어오기 *앞 3자리 파레트 넘버 나머지 23자리 시리얼 넘버
            Serial_RFID.Write(Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H07") & Chr("&H05") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H00") &
                                          Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H1A") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8") & Chr("&H03"))
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Write_RFID(ByVal str As String)

        Dim i As Integer

        Dim tmp1 As String = Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H1E") & Chr("&H06") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H00") &
                                                Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H17") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8")

        tmp1 = tmp1 & str & Chr("&H03")

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Serial_RFID.Write(tmp1)
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""
        Dim RFID_Tag_Data As String = ""

        Do
            Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
            If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
            Else
                sRecvData = sRecvData & Chr(Incoming1)
                If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                    If sRecvData.Length = 7 Or sRecvData.Length = 6 Then
                        Panel_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                    Else
                        RFID_Tag_Data = Mid(sRecvData, 6, 26)
                        Label11.Text = RFID_Tag_Data
                        Panel_RF_READ.Text = Mid(RFID_Tag_Data, 4, 23)
                        RFID_Pallet_No = Mid(RFID_Tag_Data, 1, 3)
                        'Panel_Pallet.Text = RFID_Pallet_No
                    End If
                    'For i = 1 To sRecvData.Length
                    'TextBox1.Text = TextBox1.Text & Mid(sRecvData, i, 1) & " "
                    'Next
                    'TextBox1.Text = TextBox1.Text & vbCrLf
                    sRecvData = ""
                End If
            End If
        Loop

    End Sub


    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_Rfid
            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID.Open()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open RFID Fail " & PortNumber_Rfid)
        End Try

        If PortNumber_Scanner = "NONE" Then
        Else
            Try
                If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                    Serial_Scanner.Close()
                End If
                Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_Scanner
                Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Scanner.Open()
            Catch ex As Exception

                MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_Scanner)
            End Try
        End If

        If PortNumber_Tool1 = "NONE" Then

        Else
            Try
                Serial_Tool1.PortName = PortNumber_Tool1
                If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen() = True Then
                    Serial_Tool1.Close()
                    Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Tool1.Open()
                Else
                    Serial_Tool1.BaudRate = 9600
                    Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Tool1.Open()
                End If
                Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Tmr_TOOL1.Interval = 5000
                Tmr_TOOL1.Start()
            Catch ex As Exception
                MsgBox("Serial Open Tool Fail " & PortNumber_Tool1)
            End Try
        End If

        If PortNumber_Tool2 = "NONE" Then

        Else
            Try

            Catch ex As Exception
                Serial_Tool2.PortName = PortNumber_Tool2
                If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen() = True Then
                    Serial_Tool2.Close()
                    Serial_Tool2.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Tool2.Open()
                Else
                    Serial_Tool2.BaudRate = 9600
                    Serial_Tool2.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Tool2.Open()
                End If
                Serial_Tool2.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Serial_Tool2.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Tmr_TOOL2.Interval = 5000
                Tmr_TOOL2.Start()
            End Try
        End If
        If PortNumber_Module = "NONE" Then
        Else
            Try

                If Serial_Module.IsOpen() = True Then
                    Serial_Module.Close()
                    Serial_Module.PortName = PortNumber_Module
                    Serial_Module.BaudRate = 115200
                    Serial_Module.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Module.Open()
                    'Label8.Text = "Module OK"
                Else
                    Serial_Module.PortName = PortNumber_Module
                    Serial_Module.BaudRate = 115200
                    Serial_Module.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Module.Open()
                    'Label8.Text = "Module OK"
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_Module)

            End Try
        End If


    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim Incoming1 As String

        Do While Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool1.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool1.ReadChar

                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String1) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection1 = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0061" Then

                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))

                            ' N/HGT toolstep 10~14

                                        Panel_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK"

    Private Sub Tmr_TOOL1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_TOOL1.Tick

        If Tool1Connection = False Then
            Tool1Connection = True
            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "002099990010" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        ElseIf Tool1Connection = True Then
            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        End If

    End Sub

        ElseIf Tool2Connection = True Then
            Serial_Tool2.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3") &
            Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()
        Dim ScanDAta As String = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Panel_Scanner_Input.Text = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)

        '        첫자리 LH, RH
        '2~3자리 : 생산년도
        '4자리 : 생산월(A - 1월, B - 2월 .....)
        '5~6자리 : 생산일자
        '7~11자리 : 로트숫자
        '이후자리:   펌핑 작동력

        If wStep > 5 Then

            If (ScanDAta.Contains("LS") = True Or ScanDAta.Contains("RS") = True) And Panel_Pump_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then

                Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                If CheckPumpDuplicated(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text) = False Then
                    If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 2) = "LS" Then
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        Else
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                        End If
                    ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 2) = "RS" Then
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        Else
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                        End If
                    End If
                Else
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "DUPLICATED"
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                End If

            Else

                If Panel_Blower_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then
                    Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                    If Panel_Scanner_Input.Text.Contains(OPTION_BLOWER_BARCODE) And Panel_Blower_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then
                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                        If CheckBlowerDuplicated(Panel_Scanner_Input.Text) = True Then
                            Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "Duplicated"
                            Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                            wStep = 9
                        Else
                            Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                            Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        End If
                    Else
                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NG"
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                        NG()
                    End If

                End If

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PlcConnect()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If Flag_Connection_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PlcRead()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If
        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.5
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            Read_RFiD()
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PlcRead()

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 11
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim i As Integer

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        'szDeviceName = "W0000" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0001" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0050" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0051" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0052" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0053" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0054" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0055" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0056" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0057"

        szDeviceName = "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress + 1, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress + 2, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 1, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 2, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 3, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 4, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 5, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 6, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 7, "0000")
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress) = PLC_VALUE(0)
            PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress + 1) = PLC_VALUE(1)
            PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress + 2) = PLC_VALUE(2)

            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress) = PLC_VALUE(3)
            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 1) = PLC_VALUE(4)
            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 2) = PLC_VALUE(5)
            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 3) = PLC_VALUE(6)
            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 4) = PLC_VALUE(7)
            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 5) = PLC_VALUE(8)

            VALUE_IN_LABEL(0).Text = PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(1).Text = PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress + 1)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(2).Text = PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress + 2)

            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(0).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(1).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 1)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(2).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 2)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(3).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 3)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(4).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 4)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(5).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 5)

            For j = 0 To 2
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 5
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE_1(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_Part(ByVal str As String)

        Dim i As Integer

        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic

                Panel_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green

                Panel_TQ3_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green

                Panel_TQ4_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                Panel_TQ5_DEC.Text = "NA"
                Panel_TQ5_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                Panel_TQ1.Text = "NA"
                Panel_TQ2.Text = "NA"
                Panel_TQ3.Text = "NA"

                    Panel_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green

                    Panel_TQ3_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                    Panel_TQ4_DEC.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ4_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                    Panel_TQ5_DEC.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ5_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                    Panel_TQ1.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ2.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ3.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ4.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ5.Text = "NA"
                ElseIf Rs.Fields("OPtion_HGT").Value = False And Rs.Fields("Option_UNDERTRAY").Value = False Then
                    Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT"
                    Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                    Panel_TQ1_DEC.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                    Panel_TQ2_DEC.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                    Panel_TQ3_DEC.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ3_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green

                    Panel_TQ4_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                    Panel_TQ5_DEC.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ5_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green

                    Panel_TQ2.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ3.Text = "NA"

            If Rs.Fields("Option_UNDERTRAY").Value = True Then

    Private Sub Save_DB(snstr As String)

        wStep = wStep + 0.001
        Dim strSQL As String

        ConnectionOpenSql()

        strSQL = "UPDATE TABLE_MAIN SET " &
                    "S50_START_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
                    "S50_START_TIME = '" & StartTime & "'," &
                    "S50_END_TIME = '" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "'," &
                    "S50_PUMP_SERIAL = '" & Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text & "'," &
                    "S50_BLOWER_SERIAL = '" & Panel_Blower_Value.Text & "'," &
                    "S50_TQ1 = '" & Panel_TQ1.Text & "'," &
                    "S50_TQ2 = '" & Panel_TQ2.Text & "'," &
                    "S50_TQ3 = '" & Panel_TQ3.Text & "'," &
                    "S50_TQ4 = '" & Panel_TQ4.Text & "'," &
                    "S50_TQ5 = '" & Panel_TQ5.Text & "'," &
                    "S50_DECISION = '" & "OK" & "' " &
                    "WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & snstr & "'"

        SqlConnect.Execute(strSQL)
        ConnectionCloseSql()
        wStep = 9.1
    End Sub

    Private Function CheckDuplicated(strcolName As String, strVAl As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main Where " & strcolName & " = '" & strVAl & "'", SqlConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            tmp = True
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function CheckBlowerDuplicated(strScanDAta As String) As Boolean

        Dim FlagReturn As Boolean = False
        ConnectionOpenSql()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main where S50_BLOWER_SERIAL = '" & strScanDAta & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            FlagReturn = True
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseSql()

        If FlagDuplicateCheck Then
            If Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" Then
                Return False
            Else
                Return FlagReturn
            End If
        Else
            Return False
        End If

    End Function

    Private Function CheckPumpDuplicated(strScanDAta As String) As Boolean

        Dim FlagReturn As Boolean = False
        ConnectionOpenSql()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient

        If FlagDuplicateCheck Then
            If Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" Then

            Else

            End If
        Else
            Return False
        End If

    End Function

    Private Sub Save_DB_Rework(Serial As String)

        ConnectionOpenSql()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main where SERIAL_NUMBER ='" & Serial & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            tmp = Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value
            tmp = CStr(CInt(tmp) + 1)
            Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value = tmp
            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseSql()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work.Tick

        Label_STep.Text = wStep

        ' D_Value LED 업데이트
        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            Try
                If D_Value(i) = 0 Then
                    LED_IN(i).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(i) & "-50")
                Else
                    LED_IN(i).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(i) & " Filled-50")
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        Next i

        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then
            WorkPArt = Panel_PartNo.Text
            InitControl()
            If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
                FrmImage.Show()
                FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
            Else
            End If
            InitControl()
            PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", "000000000")
            wStep = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 Then
                If FrmImage.Visible = True Then FrmImage.Close()
                TIMER_COUNT = 0
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ""
                'Panel_RF_UID.Text = ""
                'frmimage.Close()
                wStep = 1 '제품인
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then

            TIMER_COUNT = TIMER_COUNT + 0.1
            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then wStep = 1.5
            If TIMER_COUNT > 2.0 Then
                If Panel_RF_READ.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
                    PLC_STRING_1 = "000000000"
                    Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "3"
                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", PLC_STRING_1)
                    wStep = 10
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1.5 Then

            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then
                Panel_SN.Text = Panel_RF_READ.Text
                If Panel_SN.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                    wStep = 10
                Else
                    Check_BEFORE(Panel_SN.Text)
                    'Panel_Before.Text = "OK"
                    If Panel_Before.Text = "OK" Then
                        If Panel_Rework.Text = "" Then
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "OK" Then
                            'wStep = 10
                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")s
                            'wStep = 10
                            REWORK_STOP = True
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))

                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "NG" Then
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
                        End If
                    Else
                        wStep = 10
                        PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                    End If
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING_1 = "000000000"

            If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 2, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 2, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_Vent.Text = "VENT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_CarType.Text.Contains("KY") = True Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 4, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_Warmer.Text = "WARMER" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 7, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 7, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_Undertray.Text = "UNDERTRAY" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 8, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 8, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_Can.Text = "CAN" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 9, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 9, 1) = "2"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "1"
            PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", PLC_STRING_1)
            IMAGE_PART = Panel_PartNo.Text
            wStep = 4.1

        ElseIf wStep = 4.1 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(6) = 1 Or PLC_VALUE(6) = 2 Then
                wStep = 4.9
            Else
                wStep = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.9 Then

            If REWORK_STOP = True Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                wStep = 9
            Else
                wStep = 5
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If Panel_CarType.Text.Contains("SEMI") = True And Panel_CarType.Text.Contains("KY") = True Then
                toolstep = 1000
                wStep = 7
            Else
                If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" And Tool1UseCheck <> False Then
                    toolstep = 100
                    ' pos 라벨에 HGT IO 조건 표시
                    pos1.Text = Hgt_P1(0)
                    pos2.Text = Hgt_P1(1)
                    pos3.Text = Hgt_P1(2)
                    pos4.Text = Hgt_P1(3)
                    pos5.Text = Hgt_P1(4)
                    wStep = 6
                ElseIf Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" And Tool1UseCheck <> True Then
                    toolstep = 1000
                    wStep = 7
                ElseIf Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT" Then
                    toolstep = 10
                    ' pos 라벨에 N/HGT IO 조건 표시
                    pos1.Text = NHgt_P1(0)
                    pos2.Text = NHgt_P1(1)
                    pos3.Text = NHgt_P1(2)
                    pos4.Text = NHgt_P1(3)
                    pos5.Text = NHgt_P1(4)
                    wStep = 6
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then 'TOOL - toolstep 기반 IO 조건 확인
            ' toolstep=1000이면 모든 TQ 완료
            If toolstep = 1000 Then
                wStep = 7
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            If (Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK") Or
               (Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK") Then
                wStep = 9
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then 'SEND PLC COMPLETE

            If (Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA") And
                        (Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NA") Then
                Panel_Total_DEC.Text = "OK"
                Panel_Total_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                Save_DB(Panel_SN.Text)
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 9.1 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(7) = 1 Then
                wStep = 10
            Else
                wStep = 9
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", "000000000")
                wStep = 11
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then

            InitControl()
            If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
                FrmImage.Show()
                FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
            Else
            End If
            wStep = 0

        End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub Check_BEFORE(strSN As String)

        ConnectionOpenSql()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic

    ' IO 조건 확인 함수 ("번호_ON/번호_OFF" 형식)
    Private Function CheckIOCondition(str As String) As Boolean
        If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(str) Then Return True

        Dim conditions() As String = str.Split("/"c)

        For Each cond As String In conditions
            cond = cond.Trim()
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(cond) Then Continue For

            Dim parts() As String = cond.Split("_"c)
            If parts.Length <> 2 Then Return False

            Dim ioNumber As Integer
            If Not Integer.TryParse(parts(0), ioNumber) Then Return False

            Dim expectedValue As Integer
            If parts(1).ToUpper() = "ON" Then
                expectedValue = 1
            ElseIf parts(1).ToUpper() = "OFF" Then
                expectedValue = 0
            Else
                Return False
            End If

            If ioNumber < 0 OrElse ioNumber >= D_Value.Length Then Return False

            If D_Value(ioNumber) <> expectedValue Then
                Return False
            End If
        Next

        Return True
    End Function
    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, i, retVal
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Sub ThreadTask3()

                            D_Value(9) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 11, 1))
                            D_Value(10) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 12, 1))
                            D_Value(11) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 13, 1))

                            D_Value(12) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 14, 1))
                            D_Value(13) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 15, 1))
                            D_Value(14) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 16, 1))
                            D_Value(15) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 17, 1))
