    Private Sub Read_RFiD()

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then

            'RFID Data length => 1A(26자리) 읽어오기 *앞 3자리 파레트 넘버 나머지 23자리 시리얼 넘버
            Serial_RFID.Write(Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H07") & Chr("&H05") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H00") &
                                          Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H1A") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8") & Chr("&H03"))
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Write_RFID(ByVal str As String)

        Dim i As Integer

        Dim tmp1 As String = Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H1E") & Chr("&H06") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H00") &
                                                Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H17") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8")

        tmp1 = tmp1 & str & Chr("&H03")

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Serial_RFID.Write(tmp1)
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""
        Dim RFID_Tag_Data As String = ""

        Do
            Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
            If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
            Else
                sRecvData = sRecvData & Chr(Incoming1)
                If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                    If sRecvData.Length = 7 Or sRecvData.Length = 6 Then
                        Panel_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                    Else
                        RFID_Tag_Data = Mid(sRecvData, 6, 26)
                        Label11.Text = RFID_Tag_Data
                        Panel_RF_READ.Text = Mid(RFID_Tag_Data, 4, 23)
                        RFID_Pallet_No = Mid(RFID_Tag_Data, 1, 3)
                        'Panel_Pallet.Text = RFID_Pallet_No
                    End If
                    'For i = 1 To sRecvData.Length
                    'TextBox1.Text = TextBox1.Text & Mid(sRecvData, i, 1) & " "
                    'Next
                    'TextBox1.Text = TextBox1.Text & vbCrLf
                    sRecvData = ""
                End If
            End If
        Loop

    End Sub


    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_Rfid
            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID.Open()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open RFID Fail " & PortNumber_Rfid)
        End Try

        If PortNumber_Scanner = "NONE" Then
        Else
            Try
                If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                    Serial_Scanner.Close()
                End If
                Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_Scanner
                Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Scanner.Open()
            Catch ex As Exception

                MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_Scanner)
            End Try
        End If

        If PortNumber_Tool1 = "NONE" Then

        Else
            Try
                Serial_Tool1.PortName = PortNumber_Tool1
                If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen() = True Then
                    Serial_Tool1.Close()
                    Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Tool1.Open()
                Else
                    Serial_Tool1.BaudRate = 9600
                    Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Tool1.Open()
                End If
                Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Tmr_TOOL1.Interval = 5000
                Tmr_TOOL1.Start()
            Catch ex As Exception
                MsgBox("Serial Open Tool Fail " & PortNumber_Tool1)
            End Try
        End If

        If PortNumber_Tool2 = "NONE" Then

        Else
            Try

            Catch ex As Exception
                Serial_Tool2.PortName = PortNumber_Tool2
                If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen() = True Then
                    Serial_Tool2.Close()
                    Serial_Tool2.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Tool2.Open()
                Else
                    Serial_Tool2.BaudRate = 9600
                    Serial_Tool2.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Tool2.Open()
                End If
                Serial_Tool2.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Serial_Tool2.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Tmr_TOOL2.Interval = 5000
                Tmr_TOOL2.Start()
            End Try
        End If
        If PortNumber_Module = "NONE" Then
        Else
            Try

                If Serial_Module.IsOpen() = True Then
                    Serial_Module.Close()
                    Serial_Module.PortName = PortNumber_Module
                    Serial_Module.BaudRate = 115200
                    Serial_Module.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Module.Open()
                    'Label8.Text = "Module OK"
                Else
                    Serial_Module.PortName = PortNumber_Module
                    Serial_Module.BaudRate = 115200
                    Serial_Module.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Module.Open()
                    'Label8.Text = "Module OK"
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_Module)

            End Try
        End If


    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim Incoming1 As String

        Do While Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool1.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool1.ReadChar

                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String1) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection1 = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0061" Then

                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))

                            ' N/HGT toolstep 10~14

    Private Sub Tmr_TOOL1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_TOOL1.Tick

        If Tool1Connection = False Then
            Tool1Connection = True
            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "002099990010" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        ElseIf Tool1Connection = True Then
            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_TOOL2_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_TOOL2.Tick

        If Tool2Connection = False Then

        ElseIf Tool2Connection = True Then
            Serial_Tool2.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3") &
            Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()
        Dim ScanDAta As String = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Panel_Scanner_Input.Text = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)

        '        첫자리 LH, RH
        '2~3자리 : 생산년도
        '4자리 : 생산월(A - 1월, B - 2월 .....)
        '5~6자리 : 생산일자
        '7~11자리 : 로트숫자
        '이후자리:   펌핑 작동력

        If wStep > 5 Then

            If (ScanDAta.Contains("LS") = True Or ScanDAta.Contains("RS") = True) And Panel_Pump_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then

                Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                If CheckPumpDuplicated(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text) = False Then
                    If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 2) = "LS" Then
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        Else
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                        End If
                    ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 2) = "RS" Then
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        Else
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                        End If
                    End If
                Else
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "DUPLICATED"
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                End If

            Else

                If Panel_Blower_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then
                    Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                    If Panel_Scanner_Input.Text.Contains(OPTION_BLOWER_BARCODE) And Panel_Blower_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then
                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                        If CheckBlowerDuplicated(Panel_Scanner_Input.Text) = True Then
                            Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "Duplicated"
                            Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                            wStep = 9
                        Else
                            Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                            Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        End If
                    Else
                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NG"
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                        NG()
                    End If

                End If

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PlcConnect()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If Flag_Connection_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PlcRead()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If
        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.5
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            Read_RFiD()
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PlcRead()

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 11
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim i As Integer

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        'szDeviceName = "W0000" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0001" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0050" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0051" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0052" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0053" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0054" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0055" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0056" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0057"

        szDeviceName = "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress + 1, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress + 2, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 1, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 2, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 3, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 4, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 5, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 6, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 7, "0000")
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress) = PLC_VALUE(0)
            PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress + 1) = PLC_VALUE(1)
            PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress + 2) = PLC_VALUE(2)

            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress) = PLC_VALUE(3)
            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 1) = PLC_VALUE(4)
            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 2) = PLC_VALUE(5)
            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 3) = PLC_VALUE(6)
            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 4) = PLC_VALUE(7)
            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 5) = PLC_VALUE(8)

            VALUE_IN_LABEL(0).Text = PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(1).Text = PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress + 1)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(2).Text = PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress + 2)

            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(0).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(1).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 1)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(2).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 2)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(3).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 3)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(4).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 4)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(5).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 5)

            For j = 0 To 2
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 5
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE_1(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

                Panel_TQ2.Text = "NA"

                    Panel_TQ4_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                    Panel_TQ5_DEC.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ5_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green

                    Panel_TQ2.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ3.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ4.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ5.Text = "NA"
                ElseIf Rs.Fields("OPtion_HGT").Value = False And Rs.Fields("Option_UNDERTRAY").Value = False Then

    Private Sub Save_DB(snstr As String)

        wStep = wStep + 0.001
        Dim strSQL As String

        ConnectionOpenSql()

        strSQL = "UPDATE TABLE_MAIN SET " &
                    "S50_START_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
                    "S50_START_TIME = '" & StartTime & "'," &
                    "S50_END_TIME = '" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "'," &
                    "S50_PUMP_SERIAL = '" & Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text & "'," &
                    "S50_BLOWER_SERIAL = '" & Panel_Blower_Value.Text & "'," &

                    "S50_TQ3 = '" & Panel_TQ3.Text & "'," &
                    "S50_TQ4 = '" & Panel_TQ4.Text & "'," &
                    "S50_TQ5 = '" & Panel_TQ5.Text & "'," &

    Private Function CheckDuplicated(strcolName As String, strVAl As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main Where " & strcolName & " = '" & strVAl & "'", SqlConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            tmp = True
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function CheckBlowerDuplicated(strScanDAta As String) As Boolean

        Dim FlagReturn As Boolean = False
        ConnectionOpenSql()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main where S50_BLOWER_SERIAL = '" & strScanDAta & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            FlagReturn = True
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseSql()

        If FlagDuplicateCheck Then
            If Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" Then
                Return False
            Else
                Return FlagReturn
            End If
        Else
            Return False
        End If

    End Function

    Private Sub Save_DB_Rework(Serial As String)

        ConnectionOpenSql()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main where SERIAL_NUMBER ='" & Serial & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            tmp = Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value
            tmp = CStr(CInt(tmp) + 1)
            Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value = tmp
            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseSql()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work.Tick

        Label_STep.Text = wStep

        ' D_Value LED 업데이트
        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            Try
                If D_Value(i) = 0 Then
                    LED_IN(i).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(i) & "-50")
                Else
                    LED_IN(i).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(i) & " Filled-50")
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        Next i

        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then
            WorkPArt = Panel_PartNo.Text
            InitControl()
            If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
                FrmImage.Show()
                FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
            Else
            End If
            InitControl()
            PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", "000000000")
            wStep = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 Then
                If FrmImage.Visible = True Then FrmImage.Close()
                TIMER_COUNT = 0
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ""
                'Panel_RF_UID.Text = ""
                'frmimage.Close()
                wStep = 1 '제품인
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then

            TIMER_COUNT = TIMER_COUNT + 0.1
            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then wStep = 1.5
            If TIMER_COUNT > 2.0 Then
                If Panel_RF_READ.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
                    PLC_STRING_1 = "000000000"
                    Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "3"
                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", PLC_STRING_1)
                    wStep = 10
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1.5 Then

            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then
                Panel_SN.Text = Panel_RF_READ.Text
                If Panel_SN.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                    wStep = 10
                Else
                    Check_BEFORE(Panel_SN.Text)
                    'Panel_Before.Text = "OK"
                    If Panel_Before.Text = "OK" Then
                        If Panel_Rework.Text = "" Then
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "OK" Then
                            'wStep = 10
                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")s
                            'wStep = 10
                            REWORK_STOP = True
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))

                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "NG" Then
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
                        End If
                    Else
                        wStep = 10
                        PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                    End If
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING_1 = "000000000"

            If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 2, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 2, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_Vent.Text = "VENT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_CarType.Text.Contains("KY") = True Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 4, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_Warmer.Text = "WARMER" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 7, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 7, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_Undertray.Text = "UNDERTRAY" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 8, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 8, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_Can.Text = "CAN" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 9, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 9, 1) = "2"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "1"
            PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", PLC_STRING_1)
            IMAGE_PART = Panel_PartNo.Text
            wStep = 4.1

        ElseIf wStep = 4.1 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(6) = 1 Or PLC_VALUE(6) = 2 Then
                wStep = 4.9
            Else
                wStep = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.9 Then

            If REWORK_STOP = True Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                wStep = 9
            Else
                wStep = 5
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If Panel_CarType.Text.Contains("SEMI") = True And Panel_CarType.Text.Contains("KY") = True Then
                toolstep = 1000
                wStep = 7
            Else
                ' HGT/NHGT × LH/RH × QY/KY 조합으로 CurrentToolP 결정
                Dim isLH As Boolean = (Panel_Position.Text = "LH")
                Dim isKY As Boolean = Panel_CarType.Text.Contains("KY")

                If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                    If isLH Then
                        If isKY Then CurrentToolP = Hgt_LH_KY Else CurrentToolP = Hgt_LH_QY
                    Else
                        If isKY Then CurrentToolP = Hgt_RH_KY Else CurrentToolP = Hgt_RH_QY
                    End If
                    If Tool1UseCheck <> False Then
                        toolstep = 100
                        pos1.Text = CurrentToolP(0)
                        pos2.Text = CurrentToolP(1)
                        pos3.Text = CurrentToolP(2)
                        pos4.Text = CurrentToolP(3)
                        pos5.Text = CurrentToolP(4)
                        wStep = 6
                    Else
                        toolstep = 1000
                        wStep = 7
                    End If
                ElseIf Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT" Then
                    If isLH Then
                        If isKY Then CurrentToolP = NHgt_LH_KY Else CurrentToolP = NHgt_LH_QY
                    Else
                        If isKY Then CurrentToolP = NHgt_RH_KY Else CurrentToolP = NHgt_RH_QY
                    End If
                    toolstep = 10
                    pos1.Text = CurrentToolP(0)
                    pos2.Text = CurrentToolP(1)
                    pos3.Text = CurrentToolP(2)
                    pos4.Text = CurrentToolP(3)
                    pos5.Text = CurrentToolP(4)
                    wStep = 6
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then 'TOOL - toolstep 기반 IO 조건 확인
            ' toolstep=1000이면 모든 TQ 완료
            If toolstep = 1000 Then
                wStep = 7
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            If (Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK") Or
               (Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK") Then
                wStep = 9
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then 'SEND PLC COMPLETE

            If (Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA") And
                        (Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NA") Then
                Panel_Total_DEC.Text = "OK"
                Panel_Total_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                Save_DB(Panel_SN.Text)
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 9.1 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(7) = 1 Then
                wStep = 10
            Else
                wStep = 9
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", "000000000")
                wStep = 11
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then

            InitControl()
            If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
                FrmImage.Show()
                FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
            Else
            End If
            wStep = 0

        End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub Check_BEFORE(strSN As String)

        ConnectionOpenSql()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main where SERIAL_NUMBER ='" & strSN & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Try
                Panel_Before.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S40_DECISION").Value)
                Panel_Before.BackColor = Color.Blue
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_Before.Text = "NG"
                Panel_Before.BackColor = Color.Red
            End Try


            Try
                If Trim(Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value) = "0" Then
                    Panel_Rework.BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK"
                    Panel_Rework.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            If Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" Then

                Try
                    Panel_Now.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S50_DECISION").Value)
                    Panel_Now.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Catch ex As Exception
                    Panel_Now.Text = "NG"
                    Panel_Now.BackColor = Color.Red
                End Try

            End If

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseSql()

    End Sub

    ' IO 조건 확인 함수 ("번호_ON/번호_OFF" 형식)
    Private Function CheckIOCondition(str As String) As Boolean
        If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(str) Then Return True

        Dim conditions() As String = str.Split("/"c)

        For Each cond As String In conditions
            cond = cond.Trim()
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(cond) Then Continue For

            Dim parts() As String = cond.Split("_"c)
            If parts.Length <> 2 Then Return False

            Dim ioNumber As Integer
            If Not Integer.TryParse(parts(0), ioNumber) Then Return False

            Dim expectedValue As Integer
            If parts(1).ToUpper() = "ON" Then
                expectedValue = 1
            ElseIf parts(1).ToUpper() = "OFF" Then
                expectedValue = 0
            Else
                Return False
            End If

            If ioNumber < 0 OrElse ioNumber >= D_Value.Length Then Return False

            If D_Value(ioNumber) <> expectedValue Then
                Return False
            End If
        Next

        Return True
    End Function
    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, i, retVal
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Sub ThreadTask3()
        Do While Serial_Module.IsOpen = True

            Try
                Dim Incoming As String = Serial_Module.ReadLine()

                If Incoming Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else

                    RecvString.Append(Incoming)

                    If RecvString.Length = 34 Then

                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 34, 1) = "E" Then

                            D_Value(0) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 2, 1))
                            D_Value(1) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 3, 1))
                            D_Value(2) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 4, 1))
                            D_Value(3) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 5, 1))

                            D_Value(4) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 6, 1))
                            D_Value(5) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 7, 1))
                            D_Value(6) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 8, 1))
                            D_Value(7) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 9, 1))

                            D_Value(8) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 10, 1))
                            D_Value(9) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 11, 1))
                            D_Value(10) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 12, 1))
                            D_Value(11) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 13, 1))

                            D_Value(12) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 14, 1))
                            D_Value(13) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 15, 1))
                            D_Value(14) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 16, 1))
                            D_Value(15) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 17, 1))

                        End If

                    End If

                    RecvString.Clear()
                    Serial_Module.DiscardInBuffer()

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try


        Loop
    End Sub

## 변경 요약

| 항목 | 내용 |
|------|------|
| **변수** | `Hgt_P1`, `NHgt_P1` → 8개 배열 + `CurrentToolP()` |
| **INI 신규** | 파일 없으면 8개 섹션 전체 생성 |
| **INI 기존** | 파일 있으면 없는 섹션만 추가 (기존 값 유지) |
| **wStep=5** | LH/RH + QY/KY 조합으로 `CurrentToolP` 결정 후 pos 라벨 표시 |
| **ThreadTask2** | `Hgt_P1(n)`/`NHgt_P1(n)` → `CurrentToolP(n)` 통일 |

**setting.ini 섹션 구조:**
```ini
[TOOL_HGT_LH_QY]   [TOOL_HGT_LH_KY]
[TOOL_HGT_RH_QY]   [TOOL_HGT_RH_KY]
[TOOL_NHGT_LH_QY]  [TOOL_NHGT_LH_KY]
[TOOL_NHGT_RH_QY]  [TOOL_NHGT_RH_KY]
```
각 섹션 P1~P5 형식: `번호_ON/번호_OFF` (예: `3_ON/5_OFF`)

content.text:
## Changes Made to `FrmMain.vb` — S50 Station

### Background
Previously, the tool tightening position IO conditions were only split into **2 sets**: HGT and N/HGT. This meant LH/RH and QY/KY variants shared the same IO conditions, which was incorrect.

---

### What Changed

#### 1. Variable Declarations (line 83–92)
**Before:** Two fixed arrays `Hgt_P1(8)` and `NHgt_P1(6)`

**After:** Eight arrays covering all combinations, plus a dynamic reference variable:
```
Hgt_LH_QY(4), Hgt_LH_KY(4), Hgt_RH_QY(4), Hgt_RH_KY(4)
NHgt_LH_QY(4), NHgt_LH_KY(4), NHgt_RH_QY(4), NHgt_RH_KY(4)
CurrentToolP()  ← points to whichever array applies to current product
```

---

#### 2. INI File Handling (FrmMain_Load)
- **New file:** All 8 sections are created with empty P1–P5 keys
- **Existing file:** Each of the 8 sections is checked; only **missing** sections are appended — existing values are preserved

INI section names:
```
[TOOL_HGT_LH_QY]  [TOOL_HGT_LH_KY]
[TOOL_HGT_RH_QY]  [TOOL_HGT_RH_KY]
[TOOL_NHGT_LH_QY] [TOOL_NHGT_LH_KY]
[TOOL_NHGT_RH_QY] [TOOL_NHGT_RH_KY]
```

---

#### 3. Tool Condition Selection — `wStep = 5`
**Before:** Only HGT vs N/HGT was checked to pick the IO condition array.

**After:** Three flags are evaluated to select `CurrentToolP`:
```
Panel_HGT.Text    → HGT  or N/HGT
Panel_Position.Text → LH  or RH
Panel_CarType.Text  → contains "KY" or not (QY)
```
`CurrentToolP` is assigned a reference to the matching array, and pos1–pos5 labels are updated to show the active conditions.

---

#### 4. Tool Tightening Verification — `ThreadTask2`
**Before:** `Hgt_P1(n)` was used for HGT steps (100–104) and `NHgt_P1(n)` for N/HGT steps (10–14) — hardcoded, no position/car-type distinction.

**After:** Both step ranges now use `CurrentToolP(n)`, which already holds the correct conditions for the current product's HGT type, side (LH/RH), and car type (QY/KY). No other logic changed.

---

### Decision Matrix

| HGT | Position | Car Type | Array Selected |
|-----|----------|----------|----------------|
| HGT | LH | QY | `Hgt_LH_QY` |
| HGT | LH | KY | `Hgt_LH_KY` |
| HGT | RH | QY | `Hgt_RH_QY` |
| HGT | RH | KY | `Hgt_RH_KY` |
| N/HGT | LH | QY | `NHgt_LH_QY` |
| N/HGT | LH | KY | `NHgt_LH_KY` |
| N/HGT | RH | QY | `NHgt_RH_QY` |
| N/HGT | RH | KY | `NHgt_RH_KY` |

그래서 INI 파일에 값만 채워주면 되게 만든 거죠.

운영자가 `setting.ini` 열어서 각 조합별 P1~P5에 IO 조건(`3_ON/5_OFF` 형식)만 입력하면 끝 — 프로그램 건드릴 필요 없습니다.

message.content: 다시 영어로 프로그램 모르는 사용자가 config 만 건드리면 됨

content.text:
## How to Configure Tool Position IO Conditions

No programming knowledge required. Just edit the **`setting.ini`** file.

---

### File Location
```
(Program folder)\setting.ini
```

---

### How It Works
The program automatically creates `setting.ini` on first run. It contains **8 sections**, one for each combination of product type, side, and car model.

| Section | Meaning |
|---------|---------|
| `[TOOL_HGT_LH_QY]` | HGT, Left-Hand, QY model |
| `[TOOL_HGT_LH_KY]` | HGT, Left-Hand, KY model |
| `[TOOL_HGT_RH_QY]` | HGT, Right-Hand, QY model |
| `[TOOL_HGT_RH_KY]` | HGT, Right-Hand, KY model |
| `[TOOL_NHGT_LH_QY]` | Non-HGT, Left-Hand, QY model |
| `[TOOL_NHGT_LH_KY]` | Non-HGT, Left-Hand, KY model |
| `[TOOL_NHGT_RH_QY]` | Non-HGT, Right-Hand, QY model |
| `[TOOL_NHGT_RH_KY]` | Non-HGT, Right-Hand, KY model |

---

### Each Section Has 5 Positions (P1 ~ P5)
```ini
[TOOL_HGT_LH_KY]
P1=3_ON/5_OFF
P2=4_ON
P3=3_ON/4_ON
P4=5_OFF
P5=
```
Each position corresponds to a tightening bolt location (TQ1 through TQ5).

---

### Condition Format
```
{IO number}_{ON or OFF}
```
Use `/` to combine multiple conditions (AND logic).

| Example | Meaning |
|---------|---------|
| `3_ON` | IO signal #3 must be ON |
| `5_OFF` | IO signal #5 must be OFF |
| `3_ON/5_OFF` | IO #3 must be ON **and** IO #5 must be OFF |

> Leave blank if no IO check is needed for that position.

---

### Steps
1. Open `setting.ini` with Notepad
2. Find the section matching your product (HGT/NHGT, LH/RH, QY/KY)
3. Fill in P1 ~ P5 with the required IO conditions
4. Save the file and **restart the program**

S50/FrmMain.vb 파일만 커밋하겠습니다. 나머지 파일들은 VS 빌드/열기에 의해 자동 변경된 것들이라 같이 커밋하는 게 좋을 수도 있지만, 우리가 의도적으로 변경한 것은 FrmMain.vb뿐이므로 그것만 커밋합니다.


그런데 먼저 CLAUDE.md 규칙에 따라 gh auth switch를 실행해야 합니다.

S80 directory - JX1 project. This has PCANBasic.vb (CAN communication), RFID library files, FrmToolSet. This is a different project from the KY FRT CUSH one. Let me check the CLAUDE.md for this project to understand the context.

The memory says:
"진행 중인 프로젝트
- JX1 후석 시트 ECU 테스트: Desktop/JX1/CLAUDE.md 참조
  - PCAN-USB + RLPSU ECU, CAN 500K, UDS $2F F016 히터 제어
  - BCM_02 (0x3E0) = IGN ON, 0x732/0x73A = UDS 진단"

So the test setup uses BCM_02 message to signal ignition on, and the UDS diagnostic communication happens on those specific CAN IDs.

content.content:
# JX1 후석 시트 ECU 테스트

## 개요
JX1 차종 후석(RL/RR) 시트 ECU(RLPSU/RRPSU) 테스트 프로젝트.
물리 IGN 핀, 열선 스위치 없이 **CAN만으로** ECU 제어/검증하는 벤치 테스트 환경.

## 하드웨어 구성
- **PCAN-USB FD** → 노트북 USB 연결
- **ECU**: RLPSU (후석 좌측), RRPSU (후석 우측)
- **통신**: CAN 500K baud, Standard 11-bit ID

## MCP 서버 (직접 제어용)
- 경로: `C:\Users\Administrator\mcp-servers\pcan\server.py`
- PCANBasic.dll (ctypes) 기반 Python MCP 서버
- 도구: can_open, can_close, can_send, can_recv, can_monitor, uds_request, ign_start/stop, tp_start/stop, heater_status

## CAN ID 맵

### 송신 (노트북 → ECU)
| ID | 이름 | 용도 | 데이터 |
|----|------|------|--------|
| 0x3E0 | BCM_02_200ms | IGN ON (200ms 주기) | `00 00 00 00 50 03 00 00` (byte4=0x50: IGN1+IGN2 ON) |
| 0x732 | RLPSU 진단요청 | UDS 요청 | 아래 UDS 항목 참조 |

### 수신 (ECU → 노트북)
| ID | 이름 | 용도 | 파싱 |
|----|------|------|------|
| 0x438 | RL_SHVU_01_200ms | RL 히터 모드 | byte0 bit3~6 (4bit): 2=OFF, 6=1단, 7=2단, 8=3단 |
| 0x42E | RL_SHVU_02_200ms | RL 히터 인디케이터 | byte1 bit4~5=Hi(3단), bit6~7=Mid(2단), byte2 bit0~1=Lo(1단). 값>0이면 ON |
| 0x453 | RR_SHVU_01_200ms | RR 히터 모드 | 438h와 동일 포맷 |
| 0x42F | RR_SHVU_02_200ms | RR 히터 인디케이터 | 42Eh와 동일 포맷 |
| 0x73A | RLPSU 진단응답 | UDS 응답 | 아래 UDS 항목 참조 |

## UDS 진단 프로토콜

### 세션 제어
- Extended Session: `02 10 03 00 00 00 00 00` → 응답 `06 50 03 ...`
- TesterPresent (세션 유지, 2초 주기): `02 3E 80 00 00 00 00 00`

### IOControl ($2F) - DID F016: Heater step 3 operation
- **3단 ON**: `04 2F F0 16 03 00 00 00` → 응답 `04 6F F0 16 03`
- **OFF**: `04 2F F0 16 00 00 00 00` → 응답 `04 6F F0 16 00`
- ~~2단: cmd=02 → NRC 0x31 (범위초과)~~ F016은 3단 ON/OFF만 지원
- ~~1단: cmd=01 → NRC 0x31 (범위초과)~~ 중간 단수 직접 제어 불가

### NRC (부정응답) 코드
| NRC | 의미 | 원인 |
|-----|------|------|
| 0x22 | 조건미충족 | IGN OFF 상태에서 제어 시도 (BCM_02 미전송) |
| 0x31 | 범위초과 | 지원하지 않는 값 (F016에 01, 02 등) |
| 0x33 | 보안접근필요 | Security Access 미수행 |

## 제어 순서 (MCP 서버 사용)
```
1. can_open()                          # PCAN-USB 접속
2. ign_start()                         # BCM_02 IGN ON 주기 전송 시작
3. (1초 대기)
4. uds_request([0x02, 0x10, 0x03, ...]) # Extended Session
5. tp_start()                          # TesterPresent 주기 전송
6. uds_request([0x04, 0x2F, 0xF0, 0x16, 0x03, ...]) # 히터 3단 ON
7. heater_status() / can_monitor()     # 438h, 42Eh 확인
8. uds_request([0x04, 0x2F, 0xF0, 0x16, 0x00, ...]) # 히터 OFF
9. heater_status()                     # OFF 확인
10. tp_stop() → ign_stop() → can_close()
```

## 벤더 검증 사양 (KakaoTalk 문서)
### 3단 ON 시 기대값
- 438h SeatHtOperSta = 0x8 (3단)
- 42Eh HtSwHiIndSta = ON, HtSwMidIndSta = ON, HtSwLowIndSta = ON

### OFF 시 기대값
- 438h SeatHtOperSta = 0x2 (OFF)
- 42Eh HtSwHiIndSta = OFF, HtSwMidIndSta = OFF, HtSwLowIndSta = OFF

### 단계 전환 시 인디케이터 변화
- 3단→2단: HiIndSta ON → OFF
- 2단→1단: MidIndSta ON → OFF

## 핵심 발견 사항
1. **IGN 신호는 BCM_02 (0x3E0)** — ICU_12 (0x405) 아님. 이전 S120 V2 코드에서 확인.
2. **F016은 3단 ON/OFF만 지원** — 1단, 2단 개별 제어 DID 없음
3. **3단 켜면 ECU가 자동으로 3→2→1→OFF 단계 하강** (벤더 문서 참조)
4. DBC 파일: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\20230525_STD_DB_CAR_2021_HS_B2_23-05-01.dbc`
5. 진단사양서: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\JX1 PE M대응 RLPSU 진단사양서_수정 1.xlsx`
6. 벤더 신호사양: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\KakaoTalk_Longtxt_20260220_1729_01_087.txt`

## 프로젝트 파일
| 파일 | 설명 |
|------|------|
| `S80/FrmMain.vb` | 메인 폼 (VB.NET WinForms, 레거시) |
| `S80/PCANBasic.vb` | PCAN-Basic API 래퍼 |
| `S80/S80 - 192.168.0.218.vbproj` | .NET Framework 4.8, x86 |

## 작업 이력
- 2026-02-20: PCAN-USB FD 드라이버 설치, CAN 통신 구현
- 2026-02-20: IGN 신호 ICU_12 → BCM_02 변경, 히터 3단 ON/OFF 성공 확인
- 2026-02-20: 로그 필터링/변화감지 구현, 순차 테스트 구현
- 2026-02-20: MCP 서버 생성 (pcan/server.py) — 직접 제어용
- 2026-02-21 10:47: S80 히터 검사 워크플로우 통합
  - Part_Script에 "HEATER" 포함 시 PWR/MNL 공통으로 히터 검사 진입 (wStep 3.2→3.21→3.22)
  - HeaterWorkflowThread: LH→SendHeaterToggle(438h), RH→SendRRHeaterToggle(453h), OFF→3단→2단→1단→OFF 순환
  - 1단→OFF 자동 전환(NTC 미연결) OK 처리, NG 시 알람 표시 후 작업 중단
  - CAN 로그 파일: Can_Log\yyyy\MM\dd\{SN}_{HHmmss}.txt, 상단 신호 범례 + TX/RX 기록
  - SendCAN/SendCANEx에 TX 로깅, ThreadTask2에 RX 로깅 추가
  - DB TABLE_MAIN에 S80_HEATER VARCHAR(10) 컬럼 추가, Save_DB에 OK/NG/"-" 저장

powershell -Command "
\$ports = @(1433, 1434, 4022)
foreach (\$port in \$ports) {
    \$r = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 192.168.0.100 -Port \$port -WarningAction SilentlyContinue
    Write-Host ('Port ' + \$port + ': ' + \$r.TcpTestSucceeded)
}
" 2>&1

file.content:
Private Sub Load_Part(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            OP_PWR_SLIDE = Trim(Rs.Fields("PWR_SLIDE").Value)
            OP_PWRMNL = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_PWRMNL").Value)
            OP_LHRH = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_LHRH").Value)
            OP_5P7P = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_5P7P").Value)
            OP_VENT = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_VENT").Value)
            OP_BLOWER = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_Blower").Value)
            OP_ECU = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_ECU").Value)
            OP_OTR = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_OTR").Value)
            OP_INR = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_INR").Value)
            OP_MOTOR_RH = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_MOTOR_RH").Value)
            OP_MOTOR_LH1 = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_MOTOR_LH1").Value)
            OP_MOTOR_LH2 = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_MOTOR_LH2").Value)
            OP_TILT_MOTOR = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_TILT_MOTOR").Value)
            OP_ACTUATOR = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_ACTUATOR").Value)
            OP_HANESS = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_HANESS").Value)


            Panel_PartNo.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value)
            Panel_PartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_Script").Value)
            'm_HasHeater = Panel_PartName.Text.ToUpper().Contains("HEATER")
            m_HasHeater = Panel_PartName.Text.ToUpper().Contains("HEAT")

            Panel_Position.Text = OP_LHRH & " " & OP_5P7P

            'Panel_Position.Text = "LH" & " " & OP_5P7P
            Panel_PWRMNL.Text = OP_PWRMNL

            'LoadPicture(Picture_Main, OP_LHRH)

            LoadPicture(Picture_Main, Panel_PartNo.Text)

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

content.thinking:
The user wants to:
1. Look at the `Part_Script` column values in `Table_Part`
2. Update `OPTION_HEATER` based on the `Part_Script` content:
   - If Part_Script contains "HEATER" or "HEAT" (but NOT "NON HEATER", "NON HEAT", "NONHEATER", "NONHEAT") → OPTION_HEATER = 1 (true)
   - If Part_Script contains "NON HEATER", "NON HEAT", "NONHEATER", or "NONHEAT" → OPTION_HEATER = 0 (false)
   - If nothing matches → OPTION_HEATER = 0 (false)

I need to be careful about the order of checks since "NON HEATER" contains "HEATER" as a substring. I'll check for the NON variants first to avoid false positives, then check for the positive HEATER/HEAT matches, and default to 0 if neither condition is met. Now I'm writing a SQL UPDATE statement that implements this logic.

sqlcmd -S "192.168.0.201\JX1_SVR" -U sa -P "sns123.," -d JX1_SVR -Q "
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%NON HEATER%'
          OR UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%NON HEAT%'
          OR UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%NONHEATER%'
          OR UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%NONHEAT%'
        THEN 0
        WHEN UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%HEATER%'
          OR UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%HEAT%'
        THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END AS NEW_VAL,
    COUNT(*) AS CNT
FROM Table_Part
GROUP BY
    CASE
        WHEN UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%NON HEATER%'
          OR UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%NON HEAT%'
          OR UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%NONHEATER%'
          OR UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%NONHEAT%'
        THEN 0
        WHEN UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%HEATER%'
          OR UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%HEAT%'
        THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END
" 2>&1

Public Class FrmMain

    Private Player As New SoundPlayer

    ' CAN 재연결 재시도 카운터

    Private m_CanLogWriter As System.IO.StreamWriter = Nothing

    Private Sub PlayWave(ByVal Wavefilename As String)

        Try
            Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\" & Wavefilename & ".wav"
            Me.Player.Play()
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Function StrPtr(ByVal x As String) As Integer
        Return VarPtr(x)
    End Function

    Private Function VarPtr(ByVal obj As Object) As Integer
        ' Obtain a pinned handle to the object
        Dim handle As GCHandle = GCHandle.Alloc(obj, GCHandleType.Pinned)
        Dim pointer As Integer = handle.AddrOfPinnedObject.ToInt32

        ' Free the allocated handle. At this point the GC can move the object in memory, this is 
        ' why this function does not exist in .NET. If you were to use this pointer as a destination 
        ' for memcopy for example, you could overwrite unintended memory, which would crash the 
        ' application or cause unexpected behavior. For this function to work you would need to
        ' maintain the handle until after you are finished using it.
        handle.Free()

        Return pointer
    End Function

    Sub SerialOpen_RFID()

        Dim Rtn As Integer
        Dim ConnStr As String

        ConnStr = "RDType=M201;CommType=COM;COMName=" & PortNumber_RFID & ";BaudRate=38400;Frame=8E1"

        'UPGRADE_ISSUE: StrPtr 함수는 지원되지 않습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="367764E5-F3F8-4E44-AC3E-7FE0B5E074E2"'
        Rtn = RDR_Open(StrPtr(ConnStr), hReader) 'try to open usb hid communication, and save reader handle to hReader(global variable)
        If Rtn <> 0 Then
            MsgBox("RFID Open Fail: " & Rtn)
        Else

        End If

    End Sub

    Sub SerialClose_RFID()

        RDR_Close(hReader) 'Close
        hReader = 0 'set reader handle to NULL

    End Sub

    Private Function Connect_Tag(ByVal strUid As String) As Boolean

        Dim iret As Integer
        Dim uid() As Byte
        Dim Flag As Boolean = False

        Try

            If strUid = "" Then
                'MsgBox("input UID please")
            Else
                uid = HexToBytes((strUid))
                iret = ISO15693_Connect(hReader, 1, 1, uid(0), hTag)
                If iret <> 0 Then
                    Flag = False
                Else
                    Flag = True
                End If

            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Return Flag

    End Function

    Private Sub Read_Tag()

        Dim iret As Integer
        Dim nBlkRead As Integer
        Dim buffer(64) As Byte
        Dim bufSize As Integer
        Dim nByteRead As Integer
        Dim blokStr As String
        Dim blockStart As Integer
        Dim blockCnt As Integer

        Try

            nByteRead = nBlkRead = 0
            bufSize = UBound(buffer) + 1
            blockStart = "0"
            blockCnt = "6"
            iret = ISO15693_ReadMultiBlocks(hReader, hTag, 0, blockStart, blockCnt, nBlkRead, buffer(0), bufSize, nByteRead)
            If iret = 0 Then
                blokStr = BytesToHex(buffer, nByteRead)
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ASC2STR(blokStr)
            Else
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = "READ ERROR"
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            Panel_RF_READ.Text = "READ ERROR"
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Read_Inventorty()

        Dim Rtn As Integer
        Dim ByteUid(7) As Byte
        Dim dnhReport As Integer
        Dim dsfid As Byte
        Dim AIPtype As Integer
        Dim AntId As Integer
        'Dim uid(8) As Byte
        Dim suid As String

        Try

            Rtn = RDR_TagInventory(hReader, 1, 0, 0, 0) 'send inventory command to reader and save tag report at the buffer
            If Rtn = 0 Then
                'inventory ok ,then get tag report from buffer

                dnhReport = RDR_GetTagDataReport(hReader, 1) 'get first report
                Do While dnhReport <> 0
                    Rtn = ISO15693_ParseTagDataReport(dnhReport, AIPtype, AntId, AntId, dsfid, ByteUid(0))
                    If Rtn = 0 Then
                        suid = ""
                        suid = BytesToHex(ByteUid, 8)
                        Panel_RF_UID.Text = suid
                    End If

                    dnhReport = RDR_GetTagDataReport(hReader, 2) 'get next report
                Loop
            Else

            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

    End Sub

        Dim iret As Integer

        Try

            startBlk = "0"

            nSize = UBound(blkDataBuff) + 1
            iret = ISO15693_WriteMultipleBlocks(hReader, hTag, startBlk, BlkNum, blkDataBuff(0), nSize)
            If iret = 0 Then
                'MsgBox("write ok")
            Else
                'MsgBox("write fail")
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

    End Sub

    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool1.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool1.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL1
            Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool1.Open()
            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            tmr_Tool1.Interval = 5000
            tmr_Tool1.Start()
            RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & " COM Port " & Serial_Tool1.PortName & " is open for Tool1")
        Catch ex As Exception
            RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": Open Fail for Tool1" & ", ErrorNumber:  " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)
            If gSimulationEnable <> 1 Then MsgBox("Serial Open Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL1)

        End Try

        OpenCAN()

    End Sub

    Private Sub EnsureDbSchema()
        Try
            Connection_Open_MDB()
            ' Table_SerialPort에 OPTION_HEATER_ON 컬럼 추가
            Try
                Mdb_Connect.Execute("ALTER TABLE Table_SerialPort ADD COLUMN OPTION_HEATER_ON BIT DEFAULT -1")
            Catch
                ' 이미 존재하면 무시
            End Try
            Connection_Close_MDB()
        Catch ex As Exception
            RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": DB 스키마 업데이트 실패: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Sub OpenCAN()
        Try
            ' 기존 연결 정리
            If m_PcanConnected Then
                PCANBasic.Uninitialize(m_PcanHandle)
                m_PcanConnected = False
            End If

            ' PCAN-USB 클래식 CAN 초기화
            Dim result = PCANBasic.Initialize(m_PcanHandle, PCAN_BAUDRATE)
            If result = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
                m_PcanConnected = True
                ' Bus-Off 자동 리셋 활성화
                Dim iVal As UInt32 = PCANBasic.PCAN_PARAMETER_ON
                PCANBasic.SetValue(m_PcanHandle, TPCANParameter.PCAN_BUSOFF_AUTORESET, iVal, CUInt(4))
                RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & " PCAN-USB initialized (500kbps)")
            Else
                m_PcanConnected = False
                Dim sb As New StringBuilder(256)
                PCANBasic.GetErrorText(result, &H9, sb)
                RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": PCAN Init Fail: " & sb.ToString())
                ' MsgBox 제거 — wStep 2.1에서 재시도 처리
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": Open Fail for CAN, ErrorNumber: " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT_1()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If Flag_Connection_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ_1()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_READ_1()

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE_1(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub
