    Private Sub Load_Part(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            OP_PWR_SLIDE = Trim(Rs.Fields("PWR_SLIDE").Value)
            OP_PWRMNL = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_PWRMNL").Value)
            OP_LHRH = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_LHRH").Value)
            OP_5P7P = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_5P7P").Value)
            OP_VENT = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_VENT").Value)
            OP_BLOWER = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_Blower").Value)
            OP_ECU = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_ECU").Value)
            OP_OTR = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_OTR").Value)
            OP_INR = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_INR").Value)
            OP_MOTOR_RH = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_MOTOR_RH").Value)
            OP_MOTOR_LH1 = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_MOTOR_LH1").Value)
            OP_MOTOR_LH2 = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_MOTOR_LH2").Value)
            OP_TILT_MOTOR = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_TILT_MOTOR").Value)
            OP_ACTUATOR = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_ACTUATOR").Value)
            OP_HANESS = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_HANESS").Value)


            Panel_PartNo.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value)
            Panel_PartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_Script").Value)
            'm_HasHeater = Panel_PartName.Text.ToUpper().Contains("HEATER")
            m_HasHeater = Panel_PartName.Text.ToUpper().Contains("HEAT")

            Panel_Position.Text = OP_LHRH & " " & OP_5P7P

            'Panel_Position.Text = "LH" & " " & OP_5P7P
            Panel_PWRMNL.Text = OP_PWRMNL

            'LoadPicture(Picture_Main, OP_LHRH)

            LoadPicture(Picture_Main, Panel_PartNo.Text)

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_DB(snStr As String)

        Dim strSQL As String = ""
        Dim tmp1(5) As String
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 0 To 5
            tmp1(i) = "-"
        Next
        For i = 0 To TOOL1_NUM - 1
            tmp1(i) = Grid1.Cell(i, 1).Text
        Next
        Connection_Open()

        strSQL = "UPDATE TABLE_MAIN Set " &
                    "S80_START_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
                    "S80_START_TIME = '" & StartTime & "'," &
                    "S80_END_TIME = '" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "'," &
                    "S80_DECISION = '" & "OK" & "', " &
                    "S80_TOOL1_TQ1 = '" & tmp1(0) & "'," &
                    "S80_TOOL1_TQ2 = '" & tmp1(1) & "'," &
                    "S80_TOOL1_TQ3 = '" & tmp1(2) & "'," &
                    "S80_TOOL1_TQ4 = '" & tmp1(3) & "'," &
                    "S80_TOOL1_TQ5 = '" & tmp1(4) & "'," &
                    "S80_TOOL1_TQ6 = '" & tmp1(5) & "'," &
                    "S80_HEATER = '" & If(m_HasHeater, m_HeaterTestResult, "-") & "' " &
                    "WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & snStr & "'"

        Sql_Connect.Execute(strSQL)
        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ChangeWorkStep(ByVal dNew As Double)
        On Error GoTo ErrHandler

        If wStep = dNew Then Exit Sub

        RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", wStep is changed " & wStep.ToString() & " --> " & dNew.ToString())
        wStep = dNew

        Exit Sub
ErrHandler:
        RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", ErrorNumber: " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)

    End Sub

    Private Sub Set_Grid(ByVal GridName As FlexCell.Grid, ByVal ToolPoint As Integer)

        Dim i As Integer
        With GridName

            If ToolPoint = 0 Then
                GridName.Visible = False
            Else
                GridName.Visible = True
            End If
            .AutoRedraw = False
            .AllowUserPaste = FlexCell.ClipboardDataEnum.Text
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.Columns
            .AllowUserSort = True
            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .ExtendLastCol = True
            .SelectionMode = FlexCell.SelectionModeEnum.ByCell
            .SortIndicatorColor = Color.White
            .BoldFixedCell = False
            '.AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            '.Cols = 3
            If ToolPoint <> 0 Then
                .Rows = ToolPoint
            End If

            If ToolPoint <> 0 Then
                .DefaultRowHeight = GridName.Size.Height / ToolPoint
            End If

            .Column(0).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(1).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(2).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            .Column(0).Width = 80
            .Column(1).Width = 180
            .Column(2).Width = 80

            For i = 0 To ToolPoint - 1
                .Cell(i, 0).Text = "T/Q " & CStr(i + 1)
            Next

            .Column(0).Locked = True
            .Column(1).Locked = True
            .Column(2).Locked = True

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With


    End Sub
    Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As FlexCell.Grid)

        Dim i As Integer
        With GridName

            'GridName.Visible = False
            .AutoRedraw = False
            .AllowUserPaste = FlexCell.ClipboardDataEnum.Text
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.Columns
            .AllowUserSort = True
            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .ExtendLastCol = True
            .SelectionMode = FlexCell.SelectionModeEnum.ByCell
            .SortIndicatorColor = Color.White
            .BoldFixedCell = False
            '.AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            '.Cols = 3

            .Column(0).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(1).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(2).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            .Column(0).Width = 500
            .Column(1).Width = 800
            .Column(2).Width = 120

            .Rows = 1
            .DefaultRowHeight = 0

            For i = 0 To .Rows - 1
                .Cell(i, 0).Text = ""
                .Cell(i, 1).Text = ""
                .Cell(i, 2).Text = ""
                .Cell(i, 3).Text = ""
                .Cell(i, 2).BackColor = Color.White
                .Cell(i, 2).ForeColor = Color.White
            Next

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With

    End Sub

    Private Sub LOAD_TOOL_SET_POINT(str As String)

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        If str = "LH" Then
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Tool_LH_Set ORDER BY LEN(TOOL_ID),TOOL_ID", Mdb_Connect)
        ElseIf str = "RH" Then
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Tool_RH_Set ORDER BY LEN(TOOL_ID),TOOL_ID", Mdb_Connect)
        End If

        With Grid1

            If Rs.RecordCount > 1 Then

                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Dim i As Integer = 1
                Do Until Rs.EOF

                    If str = "LH" Then

                        TOOL_LH_X(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_X").Value)
                        TOOL_LH_Y(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_Y").Value)
                        TOOL_LH_W(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_W").Value)
                        TOOL_LH_H(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_H").Value)
                        TOOL_LH_IO1(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("IO_1").Value)
                        TOOL_LH_IO2(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("IO_2").Value)
                        TOOL_LH_IO3(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("IO_3").Value)

                    ElseIf str = "RH" Then

                        TOOL_RH_X(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_X").Value)
                        TOOL_RH_Y(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_Y").Value)
                        TOOL_RH_W(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_W").Value)
                        TOOL_RH_H(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("Image_H").Value)
                        TOOL_RH_IO1(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("IO_1").Value)
                        TOOL_RH_IO2(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("IO_2").Value)
                        TOOL_RH_IO3(i) = CInt(Rs.Fields("IO_3").Value)

                    End If

                    i = i + 1
                    Rs.MoveNext()

                Loop

            End If

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()

        End With

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_TOOL_SET(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_TOOL_SET_S80 WHERE WORK_ID = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            TOOL1_NUM = CInt(Trim(Rs.Fields("S80_TOOL1_COUNT").Value))
            TOOL1_TITLE = Trim(Rs.Fields("S80_TOOL1_TITLE").Value)
            TOOL1_MAX = Trim(Rs.Fields("S80_TOOL1_MAX").Value)
            TOOL1_MIN = Trim(Rs.Fields("S80_TOOL1_MIN").Value)
            TOOL1_UNIT = Trim(Rs.Fields("S80_TOOL1_UNIT").Value)

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        PANEL_TOOL1_TITLE.Text = TOOL1_TITLE & " " & TOOL1_MIN & "~ " & TOOL1_MAX & " " & TOOL1_UNIT

        If TOOL1_NUM = 0 Then
            PANEL_TOOL1_DEC.Text = "NA"
            PANEL_TOOL1_DEC.BackColor = Color.FromArgb(0, 64, 64)
            Set_Grid(Grid1, TOOL1_NUM)
        Else
            Set_Grid(Grid1, TOOL1_NUM)
        End If

        Picture_Main.Refresh()

    End Sub

    Private Function CheckAsPart(strSerial As String) As Boolean

        Dim TMp As Boolean = False
        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT AS_PART,SERIAL_NUMBER FROM Table_Main Where SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & strSerial & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Try
                If Rs.Fields("AS_PART").Value = True Then
                    TMp = True
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        Connection_Close()
        Return TMp

    End Function

    Private Sub Tmr_Work_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work.Tick

        Label_STep.Text = wStep

        If TOOL1_READY = True Then
            TOOL1_READY_COUNT = 0
        Else
            TOOL1_READY_COUNT = TOOL1_READY_COUNT + 1
            If TOOL1_READY_COUNT > 10 Then
                TOOL1_READY_COUNT = 0
                TOOL1_READY = True
            End If
        End If


        If (PLC_VALUE(ION_PALLETTE유_PASS) And BM_PALLETTE있음) = 0 Then
            TMr_Count = TMr_Count + 1
            If TMr_Count > 15 Then
                'Init_Control()
                PLC_WRITE_1("D", "4750", "0000000000")
                PLC_WRITE_1("D", "4760", "0")
                Panel_RF_UID.Text = ""
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ""
                TMP_RF_READ = ""
                TMP_RF_UID = ""
                ChangeWorkStep(0)
            End If
        Else
            TMr_Count = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If (PLC_VALUE(ION_PALLETTE유_PASS) And BM_PALLETTE있음) > 0 Then
                Panel_RF_UID.Text = ""
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ""
                TMP_RF_READ = ""
                TMP_RF_UID = ""
                Init_Control()
                ChangeWorkStep(1)
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then

            If Len(Panel_RF_UID.Text) = 16 And Len(Panel_RF_READ.Text) = 23 Then
                TMP_RF_READ = Panel_RF_READ.Text
                TMP_RF_UID = Panel_RF_UID.Text
            End If

            If Len(TMP_RF_UID) = 16 And Len(TMP_RF_READ) = 23 Then
                ChangeWorkStep(2)
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then

            Panel_SN.Text = TMP_RF_READ
            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
            Load_Color(Panel_SN.Text, Panel_Color, gSimulationEnable)
            Load_TOOL_SET("1")
            RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name &
                ", Work started, PartNo= " & Panel_PartNo.Text & ", Name= " & Panel_PartName.Text & ", SerialNum= " & Panel_SN.Text & ", PWR/MNL= " & OP_PWRMNL &
                ", LH/RH= " & OP_LHRH & ", Inner= " & OP_INR & ", Outer= " & OP_OTR & ", Outer= " & OP_OTR)
            PlayWave(Panel_PartNo.Text)

            ' PWR 또는 HEATER 사양이면 CAN 재연결 후 응답 대기
            If OP_PWRMNL = "PWR" OrElse m_HasHeater Then
                If m_PcanConnected Then
                    PCANBasic.Uninitialize(m_PcanHandle)
                    m_PcanConnected = False
                End If
                PAnel_CAN.Text = ""
                PAnel_CAN.BackColor = Color.White
                OpenCAN()
                ChangeWorkStep(2.1)
                Return
            Else
                wStep = 2.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 2.1 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING_1 = "000000000"
            If OP_PWRMNL = "PWR" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OP_PWRMNL = "MNL" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "2"
            End If
            If OP_LHRH = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 4, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OP_LHRH = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If OP_5P7P = "5P" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OP_5P7P = "7P" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OP_5P7P = "6P" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "3"
            End If

            If OP_VENT = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 6, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 6, 1) = "2"
            End If
            If OP_BLOWER = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 7, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 7, 1) = "2"
            End If
            If OP_ECU = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 8, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 8, 1) = "2"
            End If
            If OP_BELT = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 9, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 9, 1) = "2"
            End If
            If OP_PWR_SLIDE = "1" Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("D", "4759", "1")
            Else
                PLC_WRITE_1("D", "4759", "0")
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            '전송

            PLC_WRITE_1("D", "4750", PLC_STRING_1)
            ChangeWorkStep(2.2)

        ElseIf wStep = 2.2 Then ' CAN 연결 대기 (PAnel_CAN = "OK" 까지 재시도)

            If OPTION_HEATER_ON Then

                If PAnel_CAN.Text = "OK" Then
                    m_CanRetryCount = 0
                    ChangeWorkStep(3.1)
                Else
                    m_CanRetryCount += 1
                    ' 100ms 간격 × 100 = 10초 타임아웃
                    If m_CanRetryCount >= 100 Then
                        m_CanRetryCount = 0
                        Panel_Alarm.BackColor = Color.Red
                        Panel_Alarm.Text = "CAN 통신 연결 실패"
                        Panel_Alarm.Visible = True
                        RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": CAN 응답 타임아웃 (10초), 작업 중단")
                        ChangeWorkStep(0)
                    ElseIf m_CanRetryCount Mod 10 = 0 Then
                        ' 1초마다 재연결 시도
                        If Not m_PcanConnected Then OpenCAN()
                    End If
                End If

            Else
                wStep = 3.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.1 Then

            If CheckAsPart(Panel_SN.Text) = True Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("D", "4751", "1")
                ChangeWorkStep(10)
            Else
                If PLC_VALUE(3) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(ION_PALLETTE_UP) = 1 Then
                    If m_HasHeater AndAlso OPTION_HEATER_ON Then
                        ' HEATER 포함 + 히터 검사 사용 → 히터 검사 진입
                        ChangeWorkStep(3.2)
                    ElseIf m_HasHeater AndAlso Not OPTION_HEATER_ON Then
                        ' HEATER 포함이지만 히터 검사 미사용 → PASS 표시 후 스킵
                        srcLbHeater.Text = "PASS"
                        srcLbHeater.BackColor = Color.Green
                        srcLbHeater.ForeColor = Color.White
                        m_HeaterTestResult = "PASS"
                        If Panel_PWRMNL.Text = "PWR" Then
                            ChangeWorkStep(3.4)
                        Else
                            ChangeWorkStep(4.5)
                        End If
                    ElseIf Panel_PWRMNL.Text = "PWR" Then
                        ChangeWorkStep(3.4)
                    ElseIf Panel_PWRMNL.Text = "MNL" Then
                        ChangeWorkStep(4.5)
                    End If
                Else
                    'ChangeWorkStep(3)
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.2 Then
            ' 히터 테스트 시작
            Try
                Dim logDir As String = System.IO.Path.Combine(
                    AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory, "Can_Log",
                    Now.ToString("yyyy"), Now.ToString("MM"), Now.ToString("dd"))
                If Not System.IO.Directory.Exists(logDir) Then System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(logDir)
                Dim logPath As String = System.IO.Path.Combine(logDir, Panel_SN.Text & "_" & Now.ToString("HHmmss") & ".txt")
                m_CanLogWriter = New System.IO.StreamWriter(logPath, True, System.Text.Encoding.UTF8)
                ' 신호 범례 헤더
                m_CanLogWriter.WriteLine("========== CAN 신호 ID 범례 ==========")
                m_CanLogWriter.WriteLine("3E0 = BCM_02 (IGN ON)")
                m_CanLogWriter.WriteLine("041 = PE VENT CONDITION2")
                m_CanLogWriter.WriteLine("438 = RL_SHVU_01 (RL 히터 상태)")
                m_CanLogWriter.WriteLine("42E = RL_SHVU_02 (RL 인디케이터)")
                m_CanLogWriter.WriteLine("453 = RR_SHVU_01 (RR 히터 상태)")
                m_CanLogWriter.WriteLine("42F = RR_SHVU_02 (RR 인디케이터)")
                m_CanLogWriter.WriteLine("90842901 = DATC_HtrVentSwReq (히터/통풍 스위치)")
                m_CanLogWriter.WriteLine("732 = RLPSU 진단 요청")
                m_CanLogWriter.WriteLine("73A = RLPSU 진단 응답")
                m_CanLogWriter.WriteLine("3EE = ECU 모터 상태")
                m_CanLogWriter.WriteLine("=======================================")
                m_CanLogWriter.WriteLine()
            Catch ex As Exception
                RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": CAN 로그 파일 생성 실패: " & ex.Message)
            End Try
            If Not m_PcanConnected Then OpenCAN()
            m_HeaterTestDone = False
            m_HeaterTestResult = ""
            ' 히터 상태 초기화
            m_CurHtOper = -1 : m_CurHtIndiHi = -1 : m_CurHtIndiMid = -1 : m_CurHtIndiLo = -1
            m_CurRRHtOper = -1 : m_CurRRIndiHi = -1 : m_CurRRIndiMid = -1 : m_CurRRIndiLo = -1
            m_CanLogEnabled = True
            m_SeenCanIds.Clear()
            ' 히터 테스트 스레드 시작
            Dim htThread As New Thread(AddressOf HeaterWorkflowThread)
            htThread.IsBackground = True
            htThread.Start()
            ChangeWorkStep(3.21)

        ElseIf wStep = 3.21 Then
            ' 히터 테스트 완료 대기
            If m_HeaterTestDone Then
                ChangeWorkStep(3.22)
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.22 Then
            ' 히터 테스트 결과 판정
            If m_HeaterTestResult = "OK" Then
                srcLbHeater.Text = "OK"
                srcLbHeater.BackColor = Color.Blue
                srcLbHeater.ForeColor = Color.White
            Else
                srcLbHeater.Text = "NG"
                srcLbHeater.BackColor = Color.Red
                srcLbHeater.ForeColor = Color.White
            End If
            ' CAN 로그 파일 닫기
            Try
                If m_CanLogWriter IsNot Nothing Then
                    m_CanLogWriter.Close()
                    m_CanLogWriter = Nothing
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            m_CanLogEnabled = False
            If m_HeaterTestResult = "OK" Then
                ' PWR/MNL 분기
                If Panel_PWRMNL.Text = "PWR" Then
                    ChangeWorkStep(3.4)
                ElseIf Panel_PWRMNL.Text = "MNL" Then
                    ChangeWorkStep(4.5)
                End If
            Else
                ' NG → 알람 표시 후 종료
                Panel_Alarm.Text = "히터 검사 NG !!!"
                Panel_Alarm.Visible = True
                ChangeWorkStep(9)
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.4 Then

            If Panel_PWRMNL.Text = "PWR" Then
                ChangeWorkStep(3.5)
            ElseIf Panel_PWRMNL.Text = "MNL" Then
                Panel_FWD_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Panel_FWD_DEC.Text = "NA"
                'ChangeWorkStep(4.6)
                PLC_WRITE_1("D", "4751", "1")
                wStep = 3.41
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.41 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(4) = 1 Then
                wStep = 4.6
            Else
                wStep = 3.4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.5 Then 'PWR

            If PAnel_CAN.Text = "OK" Then
                wStep = 3.51
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.51 Then

            If RECL_FWD.BackColor <> Color.White And RECL_BWD.BackColor <> Color.White And TILT_UP.BackColor <> Color.White And TILT_DOWN.BackColor <> Color.White Then
                CANCommTimeStamp = GetTickCount()
                ChangeWorkStep(3.6)
            Else
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.6 Then

            wALL_STOP()
            wStep = 3.7

        ElseIf wStep = 3.7 Then
            wStep = 3.8
        ElseIf wStep = 3.8 Then
            wStep = 3.9
        ElseIf wStep = 3.9 Then

            If Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "LH" Then
                SendCAN(&H732, New Byte() {&H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA3, &H80, &H0, &H0})
            ElseIf Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "RH" Then
                SendCAN(&H731, New Byte() {&H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA3, &H80, &H0, &H0})
            End If
            wStep = 3.91

        ElseIf wStep = 3.91 Then
            wStep = 3.92
        ElseIf wStep = 3.92 Then

            If Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "LH" Then
                SendCAN(&H4A5, New Byte() {&H0, &H5, &H9, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
            ElseIf Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "RH" Then
                SendCAN(&H4A5, New Byte() {&H0, &H50, &H90, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
            End If
            Can_Count = 0
            wStep = 4.4

        ElseIf wStep = 3.7 Then

            If RECL_FWD.BackColor = Color.Black And RECL_BWD.BackColor = Color.Gray And TILT_UP.BackColor = Color.Gray And TILT_DOWN.BackColor = Color.Gray Then
                ChangeWorkStep(3.8)
                CurrentProgressTimeStamp = GetTickCount()
            Else
                If (GetTickCount() - CANCommTimeStamp) > 3000 Then
                    CANCommRetryCount = CANCommRetryCount + 1
                    If CANCommRetryCount >= 3 Then
                        CANCommRetryCount = 0

                        CANCommPortReopenCount = CANCommPortReopenCount + 1
                        If CANCommPortReopenCount > 5 Then
                            CANCommPortReopenCount = 0
                            RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": ECU 통신 Error, Port Reopen Count 5 Over")

                            Panel_Alarm.Text = "ECU 통신 Error !!!"
                            Panel_Alarm.Visible = True
                            ChangeWorkStep(9)
                        Else
                            RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": ECU 명령 Error, Retry Over, Port Reopen Count= " & CANCommPortReopenCount.ToString())
                            OpenCAN()
                        End If
                    Else
                        RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": ECU 명령 Error, Retry Count= " & CANCommRetryCount.ToString())
                    End If

                    CANCommTimeStamp = GetTickCount()
                    ChangeWorkStep(3.6)
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.8 Then

            If CurrentProgressTimeStamp = 0 Then
                CurrentProgressTimeStamp = GetTickCount()
            Else
                If (GetTickCount() - CurrentProgressTimeStamp) > 3000 Then
                    CurrentProgressTimeStamp = 0
                    ChangeWorkStep(21)
                End If
            End If

            '센서확인
            ChangeWorkStep(4.5)

        ElseIf wStep = 4.4 Then

            Can_Count = Can_Count + 0.1
            'If Can_Count > 20 Then wStep = 4.5'''''''''''''''''''''''''''
            If Can_Count > FWD_TIME Then wStep = 4.5 '''''''''''''''''''''''''''

        ElseIf wStep = 4.5 Then

            Panel_FWD_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
            Panel_FWD_DEC.Text = "OK"
            wALL_STOP()
            PLC_WRITE_1("D", "4751", "1")
            ChangeWorkStep(4.51)

        ElseIf wStep = 4.51 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(4) = 1 Then
                Picture_Main.Refresh()
                wStep = 4.6
            Else
                wStep = 4.5
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.6 Then
            If TOOL1_NUM <> 0 And (TOOL1_COUNT = TOOL1_NUM) Then
                If PANEL_TOOL1_DEC.Text = "OK" Then
                Else
                    PANEL_TOOL1_DEC.Text = "OK"
                    PANEL_TOOL1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                End If
            End If

            If PANEL_TOOL1_DEC.Text = "OK" Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("D", "4760", "1")
                wStep = 4.7
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.7 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(13) = 1 Then
                wStep = 4.9
            Else
                wStep = 4.6
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.9 Then

            If OP_PWR_SLIDE = "0" Then
                If PLC_VALUE(27) = 1 Then
                    srcLbMnlWorkINCheck.Text = "OK"
                    srcLbMnlWorkINCheck.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    Panel_Total_DEC.Text = "OK"
                    Panel_Total_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                    wStep = 5
                End If
            Else
                srcLbMnlWorkINCheck.Text = "NA"
                srcLbMnlWorkINCheck.BackColor = Color.Green
                Panel_Total_DEC.Text = "OK"
                Panel_Total_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                wStep = 5
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            Save_DB(Panel_SN.Text)
            ChangeWorkStep(9)

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then 'SEND PLC COMPLETE

            PLC_WRITE_1("D", "4751", "1")
            ChangeWorkStep(9.1)

        ElseIf wStep = 9.1 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(4) = 1 Then
                ChangeWorkStep(10)
            Else
                ChangeWorkStep(9)
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then
            If Panel_Alarm.Visible = True Then
                If CurrentProgressTimeStamp = 0 Then
                    CurrentProgressTimeStamp = GetTickCount()
                Else
                    If (GetTickCount() - CurrentProgressTimeStamp) > 1000 Then
                        CurrentProgressTimeStamp = 0
                        If Panel_Alarm.BackColor = Color.Red Then
                            Panel_Alarm.BackColor = Color.White
                            Panel_Alarm.ForeColor = Color.Red
                        Else
                            Panel_Alarm.BackColor = Color.Red
                            Panel_Alarm.ForeColor = Color.White
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            End If

            If (PLC_VALUE(ION_PALLETTE유_PASS) And BM_PALLETTE있음) = 0 And PLC_VALUE(ION_PALLETTE_UP) = 0 Then
                Panel_Alarm.Visible = False
                Panel_RF_UID.Text = ""
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ""
                RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", Work completed, SerialNum= " & Panel_SN.Text & ", OK/NG= " & Panel_Total_DEC.Text)
                PLC_WRITE_1("D", "4750", "000000000")
                ChangeWorkStep(11)
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then

            'Init_Control()
            ChangeWorkStep(0)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_RFID_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_RFID.Tick

        If wStep <> 6 Then

            If rStep = 0 Then

                Read_Inventorty()
                rStep = 1

            ElseIf rStep = 1 Then

                If Len(Panel_RF_UID.Text) = 16 Then
                    rStep = 2
                Else
                    rStep = 0
                End If

            ElseIf rStep = 2 Then

                If Connect_Tag(Panel_RF_UID.Text) = True Then
                    Read_Tag()
                    rStep = 3
                Else
                    rStep = 0
                End If

            ElseIf rStep = 3 Then

                If Panel_RF_READ.Text = "READ ERROR" Then
                    Panel_RF_UID.Text = ""
                    rStep = 0
                Else
                    rStep = 2
                End If

            End If

        End If

    Private Sub wRECL_FWD()

        ' ECU 응답 참고:
        ' ID=0x3EE Data[1]=65 → 리클전진, 95 → 리클후진
        '                  56 → 틸트상승, 59 → 틸트하강, 55 → 기본값

        Dim lhrh As String = Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2)

        If lhrh = "LH" Then
            SendCAN(&H732, New Byte() {&H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA3, &H80, &H0, &H0})
        ElseIf lhrh = "RH" Then
            SendCAN(&H731, New Byte() {&H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA3, &H80, &H0, &H0})
        End If
        Delay(100)
        If lhrh = "LH" Then
            SendCAN(&H4A5, New Byte() {&H0, &H5, &H9, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        ElseIf lhrh = "RH" Then
            SendCAN(&H4A5, New Byte() {&H0, &H50, &H90, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        End If
        RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name + ": Sent RECL_FWD, LHRH=" & lhrh)
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' PCAN-USB로 클래식 CAN 메시지 전송 (11bit 표준 ID)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function SendCAN(canId As UInt32, data() As Byte) As Boolean
        If Not m_PcanConnected Then Return False
        Dim msg As New TPCANMsg()
        msg.ID = canId
        msg.MSGTYPE = TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_STANDARD
        msg.LEN = CByte(Math.Min(data.Length, 8))
        msg.DATA = New Byte(7) {}
        Array.Copy(data, msg.DATA, msg.LEN)
        Dim result = PCANBasic.Write(m_PcanHandle, msg)
        If result = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then WriteCanLog("TX", canId, data)
        Return result = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' PCAN-USB에서 CAN 메시지 1건 수신 (논블로킹)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function RecvCAN(ByRef canId As UInt32, ByRef data() As Byte) As Boolean
        If Not m_PcanConnected Then Return False
        Dim msg As New TPCANMsg()
        Dim ts As New TPCANTimestamp()
        Dim result = PCANBasic.Read(m_PcanHandle, msg, ts)
        If result = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
            If (msg.MSGTYPE And TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_STATUS) <> 0 Then Return False
            canId = msg.ID
            data = New Byte(msg.LEN - 1) {}
            Array.Copy(msg.DATA, data, msg.LEN)
            Return True
        End If
        Return False
    End Function

    Private Sub CloseCAN()
        If m_PcanConnected Then
            PCANBasic.Uninitialize(m_PcanHandle)
            m_PcanConnected = False
        End If
    End Sub

    Private stCANCommString As String = ""

    Private Sub SetTq(ByVal GridName As FlexCell.Grid, ByVal CurrentIndex As Integer, ByVal TQvalue As String, ByVal TQDec As String)

        With GridName

            .AutoRedraw = False
            .AllowUserPaste = FlexCell.ClipboardDataEnum.Text
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.Columns
            .AllowUserSort = True
            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .ExtendLastCol = True
            .SelectionMode = FlexCell.SelectionModeEnum.ByCell
            .SortIndicatorColor = Color.White
            .BoldFixedCell = False

            .Cell(CurrentIndex, 1).Text = TQvalue
            .Cell(CurrentIndex, 2).Text = TQDec

            If TQDec = "OK" Then
                .Cell(CurrentIndex, 2).BackColor = Color.Blue
                .Cell(CurrentIndex, 2).ForeColor = Color.White
            Else
                .Cell(CurrentIndex, 2).BackColor = Color.Red
                .Cell(CurrentIndex, 2).ForeColor = Color.White
            End If

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With

    End Sub

    Private Function IsCorrectPosition(ByVal GridName As FlexCell.Grid, ByVal CurrentIndex As Integer, ByVal CurrentSensorData As String) As Integer
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim PositionSensorData As String

        If CurrentIndex <= 0 Or CurrentIndex >= GridName.Rows Then
            IsCorrectPosition = 1
            Exit Function
        End If

        Try
            For i = 0 To (CurrentIndex - 1)
                PositionSensorData = GridName.Cell(i, 3).Text
                If CurrentSensorData = PositionSensorData Then
                    IsCorrectPosition = 0
                    Exit Function
                End If
            Next i
        Catch
            RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", Grid= " & GridName.ToString() & ", i= " & i.ToString() & ", ErrorNumber: " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)
            IsCorrectPosition = 0
            Exit Function
        End Try

        IsCorrectPosition = 1
    End Function

    Private Function Num2Num(num As Integer) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If num = 0 Then
            tmp = 1
        Else
            tmp = PLC_VALUE(num)
        End If
        Return tmp

    End Function
    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        CheckForIllegalCrossThreadCalls = False

        Dim Tmp As String = ""
        Dim Incoming1 As String = ""
        Dim TQ_VALUE1 As Double = 0

        Do While 1

            Try
                If Serial_Tool1 Is Nothing Or Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = False Then
                    Exit Try
                End If
                If Serial_Tool1.BytesToRead <= 0 Then
                    Exit Try
                End If
                Incoming1 = Serial_Tool1.ReadChar

                If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                    If Len(TOOL1_DATA) = 59 And Mid(TOOL1_DATA, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                        Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                    ElseIf Len(TOOL1_DATA) = 26 And Mid(TOOL1_DATA, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                        Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                    ElseIf Len(TOOL1_DATA) = 22 And Mid(TOOL1_DATA, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                        TOOL1_CONNECTION = True
                    ElseIf Len(TOOL1_DATA) > 200 And Mid(TOOL1_DATA, 6, 4) = "0061" Then
                        Dim ToolSensorData As String = StayTime.GetLongestStayTimeSensorData()
                        Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        TQ_VALUE1 = CDbl(Format(Val(Mid(TOOL1_DATA, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(TOOL1_DATA, 146, 2))))
                        Label_Message.Text = TQ_VALUE1 & " - TOOL1"

                        If TOOL1_READY = True Then

                            If TOOL1_COUNT <= TOOL1_NUM Then
                                If TQ_VALUE1 >= TOOL1_MIN And TQ_VALUE1 <= TOOL1_MAX And Mid(TOOL1_DATA, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                    If OP_LHRH = "LH" Then

                                        If OPTION_SENSOR_ON = True Then
                                            If Num2Num(TOOL_LH_IO1(TOOL1_COUNT + 1)) = 1 And
                                                Num2Num(TOOL_LH_IO2(TOOL1_COUNT + 1)) = 1 And
                                                Num2Num(TOOL_LH_IO3(TOOL1_COUNT + 1)) = 1 Then
                                                SetTq(Grid1, TOOL1_COUNT, TQ_VALUE1, "OK")
                                                TOOL1_COUNT = TOOL1_COUNT + 1
                                                DingDOng()
                                            Else
                                                SetTq(Grid1, TOOL1_COUNT, TQ_VALUE1, "NG")
                                                NG()
                                            End If
                                        Else
                                            SetTq(Grid1, TOOL1_COUNT, TQ_VALUE1, "OK")
                                            TOOL1_COUNT = TOOL1_COUNT + 1
                                            DingDOng()
                                        End If

                                    ElseIf OP_LHRH = "RH" Then

                                        If OPTION_SENSOR_ON = True Then
                                            If Num2Num(TOOL_RH_IO1(TOOL1_COUNT + 1)) = 1 And
                                                Num2Num(TOOL_RH_IO2(TOOL1_COUNT + 1)) = 1 And
                                                Num2Num(TOOL_RH_IO3(TOOL1_COUNT + 1)) = 1 Then
                                                SetTq(Grid1, TOOL1_COUNT, TQ_VALUE1, "OK")
                                                TOOL1_COUNT = TOOL1_COUNT + 1
                                                DingDOng()
                                            Else
                                                SetTq(Grid1, TOOL1_COUNT, TQ_VALUE1, "NG")
                                                NG()
                                            End If
                                        Else
                                            SetTq(Grid1, TOOL1_COUNT, TQ_VALUE1, "OK")
                                            TOOL1_COUNT = TOOL1_COUNT + 1
                                            DingDOng()
                                        End If

                                    End If

                                Else
                                    SetTq(Grid1, TOOL1_COUNT, TQ_VALUE1, "NG")
                                    NG()
                                End If
                                Picture_Main.Refresh()
                            End If

                        End If
                    End If

                    TOOL1_DATA = ""
                    Serial_Tool1.DiscardInBuffer()
                Else
                    TOOL1_DATA = TOOL1_DATA & Chr(Incoming1)
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", Port= " & Serial_Tool1.PortName & ", ErrorNumber: " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop

    End Sub

        Me.Player.Play()

    Private Sub NG()

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        ' PCAN-USB CAN 수신 스레드
        ' ECU 응답 ID=0x3EE, Data[1]로 모터 상태 판별:
        ' 55=기본값, 65=리클전진, 95=리클후진, 56=틸트상승, 59=틸트하강

        Dim canId As UInt32
        Dim data() As Byte = Nothing

        Do
            Try
                If m_PcanConnected Then
                    If RecvCAN(canId, data) Then

                        ' CAN 로그 파일에 RX 기록 (히터 테스트 중)
                        WriteCanLog("RX", canId, data)

                        If PAnel_CAN.Text <> "OK" Then
                            PAnel_CAN.Text = "OK"
                            PAnel_CAN.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        End If

                        ' 수신 메시지 HEX 표시
                        ECU_MESSAGE.Text = canId.ToString("X3") & " " & BitConverter.ToString(data)

                        ' 진단: 처음 수신되는 CAN ID 로그
                        If m_CanLogEnabled AndAlso m_SeenCanIds.Add(canId) Then
                            AppendCanLog("[RX] 새 ID: " & canId.ToString("X3") & " " & BitConverter.ToString(data))
                        End If

                        ' TextBox1 로그 - 히터/진단 관련 신호만 필터링
                        If m_CanLogEnabled Then
                            If canId = &H438 OrElse canId = &H42E OrElse canId = &H453 OrElse canId = &H42F OrElse canId = &H73A Then
                                If canId = &H438 OrElse canId = &H453 Then
                                    ' _01: SeatHtOperSta (bit3, 4bit) - 변경 시에만 로그
                                    Dim side As String = If(canId = &H438, "RL", "RR")
                                    Dim htOper As Integer = If(data.Length >= 1, (data(0) >> 3) And &HF, 0)
                                    If canId = &H438 Then
                                        m_CurHtOper = htOper
                                    Else
                                        m_CurRRHtOper = htOper
                                    End If
                                    ' 통풍 상태 저장 (byte2)
                                    If canId = &H438 AndAlso data.Length >= 3 Then
                                        m_CurVent438 = CInt(data(2))
                                    End If
                                    Dim mode As String = ""
                                    Select Case htOper
                                        Case 2 : mode = "OFF"
                                        Case 6 : mode = "1단"
                                        Case 7 : mode = "2단"
                                        Case 8 : mode = "3단"
                                        Case Else : mode = $"0x{htOper:X}"
                                    End Select
                                    Dim key As String = $"{side}_{mode}"
                                    If key <> m_LastHtMode Then
                                        m_LastHtMode = key
                                        AppendCanLog($"[RX] {side} 히터 상태: {mode}")
                                    End If

                                ElseIf canId = &H42E OrElse canId = &H42F Then
                                    ' _02: HiInd - 변경 시에만 로그
                                    Dim side As String = If(canId = &H42E, "RL", "RR")
                                    If data.Length >= 3 Then
                                        Dim hi As Integer = (data(1) >> 4) And 3
                                        Dim mid2 As Integer = (data(1) >> 6) And 3
                                        Dim lo As Integer = data(2) And 3
                                        ' 테스트용 상태 저장
                                        If canId = &H42E Then
                                            m_CurHtIndiHi = hi
                                            m_CurHtIndiMid = mid2
                                            m_CurHtIndiLo = lo
                                        Else
                                            m_CurRRIndiHi = hi
                                            m_CurRRIndiMid = mid2
                                            m_CurRRIndiLo = lo
                                        End If
                                        ' 통풍 상태 저장 (byte4)
                                        If canId = &H42E AndAlso data.Length >= 5 Then
                                            m_CurVentByte = CInt(data(4))
                                        End If
                                        Dim key As String = $"{side}_{hi}_{mid2}_{lo}"
                                        If key <> m_LastHtIndi Then
                                            m_LastHtIndi = key
                                            AppendCanLog($"[RX] {side} 인디: 3단={If(hi > 0, "ON", "OFF")} 2단={If(mid2 > 0, "ON", "OFF")} 1단={If(lo > 0, "ON", "OFF")}")
                                        End If
                                    End If

                                ElseIf canId = &H73A Then
                                    ' UDS 응답 (RLPSU)
                                    Dim pci As Byte = If(data.Length >= 1, data(0), CByte(0))
                                    Dim sid As Byte = If(data.Length >= 2, data(1), CByte(0))
                                    If sid = &H50 Then
                                        ' DiagnosticSessionControl 정상응답
                                        AppendCanLog($"[RX] DIAG: 세션전환 OK (Extended)")
                                    ElseIf sid = &H6F Then
                                        ' IOControlByIdentifier 정상응답
                                        Dim didH As Byte = If(data.Length >= 3, data(2), CByte(0))
                                        Dim didL As Byte = If(data.Length >= 4, data(3), CByte(0))
                                        Dim val As Byte = If(data.Length >= 5, data(4), CByte(0))
                                        Dim valStr As String = ""
                                        Select Case val
                                            Case 0 : valStr = "OFF"
                                            Case 1 : valStr = "1단"
                                            Case 2 : valStr = "2단"
                                            Case 3 : valStr = "3단"
                                            Case Else : valStr = $"0x{val:X2}"
                                        End Select
                                        AppendCanLog($"[RX] DIAG: 히터제어 OK → {valStr}")
                                    ElseIf sid = &H7F Then
                                        ' 부정응답
                                        Dim nrc As Byte = If(data.Length >= 4, data(3), CByte(0))
                                        Dim nrcStr As String = ""
                                        Select Case nrc
                                            Case &H22 : nrcStr = "조건미충족"
                                            Case &H31 : nrcStr = "범위초과"
                                            Case &H33 : nrcStr = "보안접근필요"
                                            Case &H7F : nrcStr = "세션미지원"
                                            Case Else : nrcStr = $"0x{nrc:X2}"
                                        End Select
                                        AppendCanLog($"[RX] DIAG: 거부 (NRC={nrcStr})")
                                    Else
                                        AppendCanLog($"[RX] DIAG: {BitConverter.ToString(data).Replace("-", " ")}")
                                    End If
                                End If
                            End If
                        End If

                        ' ECU 상태 메시지 (ID=0x3EE)
                        If canId = &H3EE AndAlso data.Length >= 2 Then

                            Dim statusByte As Byte = data(1)

                            If statusByte = &H65 Then
                                RECL_FWD.BackColor = Color.Black
                                RECL_BWD.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                TILT_UP.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                TILT_DOWN.BackColor = Color.Gray

                            ElseIf statusByte = &H95 Then
                                RECL_FWD.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                RECL_BWD.BackColor = Color.Black
                                TILT_UP.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                TILT_DOWN.BackColor = Color.Gray

                            ElseIf statusByte = &H56 Then
                                RECL_FWD.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                RECL_BWD.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                TILT_UP.BackColor = Color.Black
                                TILT_DOWN.BackColor = Color.Gray

                            ElseIf statusByte = &H59 Then
                                RECL_FWD.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                RECL_BWD.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                TILT_UP.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                TILT_DOWN.BackColor = Color.Black

                            ElseIf statusByte = &H55 Then
                                RECL_FWD.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                RECL_BWD.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                TILT_UP.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                TILT_DOWN.BackColor = Color.Gray

                            Else
                                RECL_FWD.BackColor = Color.Silver
                                RECL_BWD.BackColor = Color.Silver
                                TILT_UP.BackColor = Color.Silver
                                TILT_DOWN.BackColor = Color.Silver

                            End If

                        End If
                    Else
                        Thread.Sleep(1) ' 큐 비어있으면 CPU 절약
                    End If
                Else
                    Thread.Sleep(100)
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception
                RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", CAN Recv Error: " & ex.Message)
                Thread.Sleep(100)
            End Try

        Loop

    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' PCAN-USB로 Extended CAN 메시지 전송 (29bit ID)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function SendCANEx(canId As UInt32, data() As Byte) As Boolean
        If Not m_PcanConnected Then Return False
        Dim msg As New TPCANMsg()
        msg.ID = canId
        msg.MSGTYPE = TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_EXTENDED
        msg.LEN = CByte(Math.Min(data.Length, 8))
        msg.DATA = New Byte(7) {}
        Array.Copy(data, msg.DATA, msg.LEN)
        Dim result = PCANBasic.Write(m_PcanHandle, msg)
        If result = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then WriteCanLog("TX", canId, data)
        Return result = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK
    End Function

    Private m_CanLogEnabled As Boolean = False
    ' 수신 CAN ID 추적 (진단용 — 처음 보는 ID만 로그)
    Private m_SeenCanIds As New HashSet(Of UInt32)
    ' 히터 상태 변경 감지용 (변경 시에만 로그)
    Private m_LastHtMode As String = ""
    Private m_LastHtIndi As String = ""
    ' 히터 상태 변경 감지용 (HeaterTestRH에서 대기)
    Private m_CurHtOper As Integer = -1  ' 현재 히터 모드 (438h SeatHtOperSta)
    Private m_CurHtIndiHi As Integer = -1   ' 42E 3단 인디케이터
    Private m_CurHtIndiMid As Integer = -1  ' 42E 2단 인디케이터
    Private m_CurHtIndiLo As Integer = -1   ' 42E 1단 인디케이터
    Private m_CurVentByte As Integer = -1   ' 42E byte4 통풍 상태 (54=3단,50=2단,40=1단,00=OFF)
    Private m_CurVent438 As Integer = -1    ' 438 byte2 통풍 상태 (2E=3단,26=2단,1E=1단,16=OFF)
    ' RR 상태 (453h, 42Fh)
    Private m_CurRRHtOper As Integer = -1
    Private m_CurRRIndiHi As Integer = -1
    Private m_CurRRIndiMid As Integer = -1
    Private m_CurRRIndiLo As Integer = -1

    Private Sub Button9_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button9.Click
        If Not m_PcanConnected Then
            ' CAN 접속
            OpenCAN()
            If Not m_PcanConnected Then
                MessageBox.Show("PCAN-USB 접속 실패")
                Return
            End If
        End If

        ' 테스트 메시지 전송 (ID=0x000, 데이터 8바이트)
        SendCAN(&H0, New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        AppendCanLog("[TX] 000h: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00")

        ' 로그 토글
        m_CanLogEnabled = Not m_CanLogEnabled
        If m_CanLogEnabled Then
            Button9.Text = "CAN 로그 중지"
        Else
            Button9.Text = "CAN 로그 시작"
        End If
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' UI 스레드에서 TextBox1에 로그 추가
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub AppendCanLog(text As String)
        If TextBox1.InvokeRequired Then
            TextBox1.BeginInvoke(New Action(Of String)(AddressOf AppendCanLog), text)
            Return
        End If
        ' 로그가 너무 많으면 앞부분 삭제
        If TextBox1.TextLength > 50000 Then
            TextBox1.Text = TextBox1.Text.Substring(TextBox1.TextLength - 30000)
        End If
        TextBox1.AppendText(DateTime.Now.ToString("HH:mm:ss.fff") & " " & text & vbCrLf)
    End Sub

    Private m_SendIgn As Boolean = False

    ''' <summary>
    ''' IGN ON 주기 전송 스레드
    ''' BCM_02_200ms (0x3E0): byte4=0x50 (BCM_Ign1InSta=1, BCM_Ign2InSta=1)
    ''' RLPSU/RRPSU가 수신하는 IGN 신호는 BCM_02 (ICU_12 아님)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub IgnSenderThread()
        Do While m_SendIgn
            ' BCM_02: byte4=0x50 (IGN1 ON + IGN2 ON), byte5=0x03
            SendCAN(&H3E0, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, &H50, &H3, 0, 0})
            ' 0x041: 통풍 구동조건2 (PE VENT CONDITION2)
            SendCAN(&H41, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0})
            Thread.Sleep(200)
        Loop
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' RL 히터 테스트: PE Extended CAN 0x90842901 DATC_RLStHtrSwReq 토글
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub Button10_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button10.Click
        If Not m_PcanConnected Then
            OpenCAN()
            If Not m_PcanConnected Then
                MessageBox.Show("PCAN-USB 접속 실패")
                Return
            End If
        End If

        Button10.Enabled = False
        m_CanLogEnabled = True
        m_SeenCanIds.Clear()
        m_LastHtMode = ""
        m_LastHtIndi = ""
        m_CurHtOper = -1
        m_CurHtIndiHi = -1
        m_CurHtIndiMid = -1
        m_CurHtIndiLo = -1
        AppendCanLog("=== RL 히터 테스트 시작 (PE Ext 0x90842901 DATC_RLStHtrSwReq) ===")

        Dim t As New Thread(AddressOf HeaterTestRH)
        t.IsBackground = True
        t.Start()
    End Sub

    Private m_SendTp As Boolean = False

    ''' <summary>
    ''' TesterPresent ($3E 80) 주기 전송 - Extended Session 유지
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub TesterPresentThread()
        Do While m_SendTp
            SendCAN(&H732, New Byte() {&H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
            Thread.Sleep(2000)
        Loop
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 히터 상태(438h SeatHtOperSta)가 목표값으로 변경될 때까지 대기
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function WaitHeaterState(targetOper As Integer, timeoutMs As Integer) As Boolean
        Dim sw As New Stopwatch()
        sw.Start()
        Do While sw.ElapsedMilliseconds < timeoutMs
            If Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtOper) = targetOper Then Return True
            Thread.Sleep(50)
        Loop
        Return False
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' PE Extended CAN 0x90842901 히터 토글
    ''' DATC_RLStHtrSwReq: byte6 bit[5:4] → 2=ON, 1=OFF
    ''' 통풍은 byte6 bit[7:6], 히터는 byte6 bit[5:4]
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub SendHeaterToggle()
        Try
            ' byte6=0x20 → DATC_RLStHtrSwReq=2 (ON)
            Dim ret As Boolean = SendCANEx(&H90842901UI, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, &H20, 0})
            If Not ret Then
                AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendCANEx 0x90842901 실패 (0x20)")
                Return
            End If
            Thread.Sleep(600)
            ' byte6=0x10 → DATC_RLStHtrSwReq=1 (OFF/해제)
            ret = SendCANEx(&H90842901UI, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, &H10, 0})
            If Not ret Then
                AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendCANEx 0x90842901 실패 (0x10)")
                Return
            End If
            AppendCanLog("[TX] Ext 0x90842901 히터 토글 완료 (20→10)")
        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendHeaterToggle: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub HeaterTestRH()
        Try
            ' --- IGN + 0x041 주기 전송 시작 ---
            m_SendIgn = True
            Dim ignThread As New Thread(AddressOf IgnSenderThread)
            ignThread.IsBackground = True
            ignThread.Start()
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN ON + 0x041 전송 시작")

            Thread.Sleep(1500)

            ' 초기 상태 확인
            AppendCanLog("[RX] 초기 상태")
            LogHeaterState()

            ' 히터 토글 순환: OFF(2) → 3단(8) → 2단(7) → 1단(6) → OFF(2)
            ' (통풍과 같은 순환 패턴일 가능성 높음)
            Dim cycleTargets() As Integer = {8, 7, 6, 2}
            Dim cycleLabels() As String = {"3단", "2단", "1단", "OFF"}

            For stepNum As Integer = 0 To 3
                AppendCanLog("[TX] 히터 토글 → " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 목표 (0x" & Hex(cycleTargets(stepNum)) & ")")
                SendHeaterToggle()
                Thread.Sleep(300)
                If WaitHeaterState(cycleTargets(stepNum), 5000) Then
                    AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " OK")
                Else
                    Dim cur As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtOper)
                    AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 미확인 (현재=0x" & Hex(cur) & ")")
                End If
                LogHeaterState()
                Thread.Sleep(1000)
            Next

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ' --- 정리 ---
            m_SendIgn = False
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN 전송 중지")
            AppendCanLog("=== RL 히터 테스트 완료 ===")
            Me.BeginInvoke(Sub() Button10.Enabled = True)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 현재 히터 상태 로그 (438h + 42E 인디케이터)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub LogHeaterState()
        Dim oper As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtOper)
        Dim operLabel As String = "?"
        Select Case oper
            Case 2 : operLabel = "OFF"
            Case 6 : operLabel = "히터1단"
            Case 7 : operLabel = "히터2단"
            Case 8 : operLabel = "히터3단"
            Case 3 : operLabel = "통풍1단"
            Case 4 : operLabel = "통풍2단"
            Case 5 : operLabel = "통풍3단"
            Case Else : operLabel = "0x" & Hex(oper)
        End Select
        AppendCanLog("  -> 438h: " & operLabel & " (0x" & Hex(oper) & ")")
        Dim hi As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtIndiHi)
        Dim mid2 As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtIndiMid)
        Dim lo As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtIndiLo)
        If hi >= 0 Then
            AppendCanLog("  -> 42E 인디: 3단=" & If(hi > 0, "ON", "OFF") & " 2단=" & If(mid2 > 0, "ON", "OFF") & " 1단=" & If(lo > 0, "ON", "OFF"))
        End If
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' RL 통풍 테스트: PE 사양 — Extended CAN 0x90842901 토글
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub Button11_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button11.Click
        If Not m_PcanConnected Then
            OpenCAN()
            If Not m_PcanConnected Then
                MessageBox.Show("PCAN-USB 접속 실패")
                Return
            End If
        End If

        Button11.Enabled = False
        m_CanLogEnabled = True
        m_SeenCanIds.Clear()
        m_CurVentByte = -1
        m_CurVent438 = -1
        AppendCanLog("=== RL 통풍 테스트 시작 (PE Extended 0x90842901) ===")

        Dim t As New Thread(AddressOf VentTestThread)
        t.IsBackground = True
        t.Start()
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 통풍 상태 대기 (438h SeatHtOperSta: 5=3단, 4=2단, 3=1단, 2=OFF)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function WaitVentState(targetOper As Integer, timeoutMs As Integer) As Boolean
        Dim sw As New Stopwatch()
        sw.Start()
        Do While sw.ElapsedMilliseconds < timeoutMs
            If Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtOper) = targetOper Then Return True
            Thread.Sleep(50)
        Loop
        Return False
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 통풍 상태 로그
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub LogVentState()
        Dim oper As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtOper)
        Dim ventLabel As String = "?"
        Select Case oper
            Case 5 : ventLabel = "통풍3단"
            Case 4 : ventLabel = "통풍2단"
            Case 3 : ventLabel = "통풍1단"
            Case 2 : ventLabel = "OFF"
            Case Else : ventLabel = "0x" & Hex(oper)
        End Select
        AppendCanLog("  -> 438h: " & ventLabel & " (0x" & Hex(oper) & ")")
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' PE 통풍 토글: Extended 0x90842901
    ''' 원본 코드 패턴: 타이머 200ms 간격으로 0x80 1회 → (3E0+041 사이클) → 0x40 1회
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub SendVentToggle()
        Try
            ' UP (byte6=0x80) — 1회 전송
            Dim ret As Boolean = SendCANEx(&H90842901UI, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, &H80, 0})
            If Not ret Then
                AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendCANEx 0x90842901 실패 (0x80)")
                Return
            End If
            ' 원본 타이밍: 3E0→041→토글 사이클 = 약 600ms
            Thread.Sleep(600)
            ' 확인 (byte6=0x40) — 1회 전송
            ret = SendCANEx(&H90842901UI, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, &H40, 0})
            If Not ret Then
                AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendCANEx 0x90842901 실패 (0x40)")
                Return
            End If
            AppendCanLog("[TX] Ext 0x90842901 LH 토글 완료 (80→40)")
        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendVentToggle: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub VentTestThread()
        Try
            ' --- IGN + 0x041 주기 전송 시작 ---
            m_SendIgn = True
            Dim ignThread As New Thread(AddressOf IgnSenderThread)
            ignThread.IsBackground = True
            ignThread.Start()
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN ON + 0x041 전송 시작")

            Thread.Sleep(1500)

            ' 초기 상태
            AppendCanLog("[RX] 초기 상태")
            LogVentState()

            ' 토글 순환 사이클: OFF(2) → 3단(5) → 2단(4) → 1단(3) → OFF(2)
            Dim cycleTargets() As Integer = {5, 4, 3, 2}
            Dim cycleLabels() As String = {"3단", "2단", "1단", "OFF"}

            ' 2회전 반복 테스트
            For round As Integer = 1 To 2
                AppendCanLog("--- 순환 " & round.ToString() & "회차 ---")
                For stepNum As Integer = 0 To 3
                    AppendCanLog("[TX] 토글 → " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 목표 (0x" & Hex(cycleTargets(stepNum)) & ")")
                    SendVentToggle()
                    Thread.Sleep(300)
                    If WaitVentState(cycleTargets(stepNum), 5000) Then
                        AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " OK")
                    Else
                        Dim cur As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtOper)
                        AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 미확인 (현재=0x" & Hex(cur) & ")")
                    End If
                    LogVentState()
                    Thread.Sleep(1000)
                Next
            Next

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            m_SendIgn = False
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN 전송 중지")
            AppendCanLog("=== RL 통풍 테스트 완료 ===")
            Me.BeginInvoke(Sub() Button11.Enabled = True)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' ======================== RR (후석 우측) 테스트 ========================

    ''' <summary>
    ''' RR 히터 테스트: PE Extended CAN 0x90842901 DATC_RRStHtrSwReq 토글
    ''' byte6 bit[1:0]: ON=0x02, OFF=0x01
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub btn_RR_HEater_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_RR_HEater.Click
        If Not m_PcanConnected Then
            OpenCAN()
            If Not m_PcanConnected Then
                MessageBox.Show("PCAN-USB 접속 실패")
                Return
            End If
        End If

        btn_RR_HEater.Enabled = False
        m_CanLogEnabled = True
        m_SeenCanIds.Clear()
        m_CurRRHtOper = -1
        m_CurRRIndiHi = -1
        m_CurRRIndiMid = -1
        m_CurRRIndiLo = -1
        AppendCanLog("=== RR 히터 테스트 시작 (PE Ext 0x90842901 DATC_RRStHtrSwReq) ===")

        Dim t As New Thread(AddressOf RRHeaterTestThread)
        t.IsBackground = True
        t.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub SendRRHeaterToggle()
        Try
            ' byte6=0x02 → DATC_RRStHtrSwReq=2 (ON)
            Dim ret As Boolean = SendCANEx(&H90842901UI, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, &H2, 0})
            If Not ret Then
                AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendCANEx 0x90842901 실패 (0x02)")
                Return
            End If
            Thread.Sleep(600)
            ' byte6=0x01 → DATC_RRStHtrSwReq=1 (OFF/해제)
            ret = SendCANEx(&H90842901UI, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, &H1, 0})
            If Not ret Then
                AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendCANEx 0x90842901 실패 (0x01)")
                Return
            End If
            AppendCanLog("[TX] Ext 0x90842901 RR 히터 토글 완료 (02→01)")
        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendRRHeaterToggle: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Function WaitRRState(targetOper As Integer, timeoutMs As Integer) As Boolean
        Dim sw As New Stopwatch()
        sw.Start()
        Do While sw.ElapsedMilliseconds < timeoutMs
            If Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRHtOper) = targetOper Then Return True
            Thread.Sleep(50)
        Loop
        Return False
    End Function

    Private Sub LogRRHeaterState()
        Dim oper As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRHtOper)
        Dim operLabel As String = "?"
        Select Case oper
            Case 2 : operLabel = "OFF"
            Case 6 : operLabel = "히터1단"
            Case 7 : operLabel = "히터2단"
            Case 8 : operLabel = "히터3단"
            Case 3 : operLabel = "통풍1단"
            Case 4 : operLabel = "통풍2단"
            Case 5 : operLabel = "통풍3단"
            Case Else : operLabel = "0x" & Hex(oper)
        End Select
        AppendCanLog("  -> 453h: " & operLabel & " (0x" & Hex(oper) & ")")
        Dim hi As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRIndiHi)
        Dim mid2 As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRIndiMid)
        Dim lo As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRIndiLo)
        If hi >= 0 Then
            AppendCanLog("  -> 42F 인디: 3단=" & If(hi > 0, "ON", "OFF") & " 2단=" & If(mid2 > 0, "ON", "OFF") & " 1단=" & If(lo > 0, "ON", "OFF"))
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub RRHeaterTestThread()
        Try
            m_SendIgn = True
            Dim ignThread As New Thread(AddressOf IgnSenderThread)
            ignThread.IsBackground = True
            ignThread.Start()
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN ON + 0x041 전송 시작")

            Thread.Sleep(1500)

            AppendCanLog("[RX] 초기 상태")
            LogRRHeaterState()

            ' 히터 토글 순환: OFF(2) → 3단(8) → 2단(7) → 1단(6) → OFF(2)
            Dim cycleTargets() As Integer = {8, 7, 6, 2}
            Dim cycleLabels() As String = {"3단", "2단", "1단", "OFF"}

            For stepNum As Integer = 0 To 3
                AppendCanLog("[TX] RR 히터 토글 → " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 목표 (0x" & Hex(cycleTargets(stepNum)) & ")")
                SendRRHeaterToggle()
                Thread.Sleep(300)
                If WaitRRState(cycleTargets(stepNum), 5000) Then
                    AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " OK")
                Else
                    Dim cur As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRHtOper)
                    AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 미확인 (현재=0x" & Hex(cur) & ")")
                End If
                LogRRHeaterState()
                Thread.Sleep(1000)
            Next

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            m_SendIgn = False
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN 전송 중지")
            AppendCanLog("=== RR 히터 테스트 완료 ===")
            Me.BeginInvoke(Sub() btn_RR_HEater.Enabled = True)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' RR 통풍 테스트: PE Extended CAN 0x90842901 DATC_RRStVentSwReq 토글
    ''' byte6 bit[3:2]: ON=0x08, OFF=0x04
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub btn_RR_Vent_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_RR_Vent.Click
        If Not m_PcanConnected Then
            OpenCAN()
            If Not m_PcanConnected Then
                MessageBox.Show("PCAN-USB 접속 실패")
                Return
            End If
        End If

        btn_RR_Vent.Enabled = False
        m_CanLogEnabled = True
        m_SeenCanIds.Clear()
        m_CurRRHtOper = -1
        AppendCanLog("=== RR 통풍 테스트 시작 (PE Ext 0x90842901 DATC_RRStVentSwReq) ===")

        Dim t As New Thread(AddressOf RRVentTestThread)
        t.IsBackground = True
        t.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub SendRRVentToggle()
        Try
            ' byte6=0x08 → DATC_RRStVentSwReq=2 (ON)
            Dim ret As Boolean = SendCANEx(&H90842901UI, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, &H8, 0})
            If Not ret Then
                AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendCANEx 0x90842901 실패 (0x08)")
                Return
            End If
            Thread.Sleep(600)
            ' byte6=0x04 → DATC_RRStVentSwReq=1 (OFF/해제)
            ret = SendCANEx(&H90842901UI, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, &H4, 0})
            If Not ret Then
                AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendCANEx 0x90842901 실패 (0x04)")
                Return
            End If
            AppendCanLog("[TX] Ext 0x90842901 RR 통풍 토글 완료 (08→04)")
        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendRRVentToggle: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub RRVentTestThread()
        Try
            m_SendIgn = True
            Dim ignThread As New Thread(AddressOf IgnSenderThread)
            ignThread.IsBackground = True
            ignThread.Start()
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN ON + 0x041 전송 시작")

            Thread.Sleep(1500)

            AppendCanLog("[RX] 초기 상태")
            Dim initOper As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRHtOper)
            AppendCanLog("  -> 453h: " & If(initOper = 2, "OFF", "0x" & Hex(initOper)) & " (0x" & Hex(initOper) & ")")

            ' 통풍 토글 순환: OFF(2) → 3단(5) → 2단(4) → 1단(3) → OFF(2)
            Dim cycleTargets() As Integer = {5, 4, 3, 2}
            Dim cycleLabels() As String = {"3단", "2단", "1단", "OFF"}

            ' 2회전
            For round As Integer = 1 To 2
                AppendCanLog("--- 순환 " & round.ToString() & "회차 ---")
                For stepNum As Integer = 0 To 3
                    AppendCanLog("[TX] RR 통풍 토글 → " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 목표 (0x" & Hex(cycleTargets(stepNum)) & ")")
                    SendRRVentToggle()
                    Thread.Sleep(300)
                    If WaitRRState(cycleTargets(stepNum), 5000) Then
                        AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " OK")
                    Else
                        Dim cur As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRHtOper)
                        AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 미확인 (현재=0x" & Hex(cur) & ")")
                    End If
                    Thread.Sleep(1000)
                Next
            Next

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            m_SendIgn = False
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN 전송 중지")
            AppendCanLog("=== RR 통풍 테스트 완료 ===")
            Me.BeginInvoke(Sub() btn_RR_Vent.Enabled = True)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' ======================== CAN 로그 파일 기록 ========================

    ''' <summary>
    ''' CAN 로그 파일에 TX/RX 기록 (히터 테스트 중에만)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub WriteCanLog(direction As String, canId As UInt32, data() As Byte)
        Try
            If m_CanLogWriter IsNot Nothing Then
                Dim hex As String = If(data IsNot Nothing AndAlso data.Length > 0,
                    BitConverter.ToString(data).Replace("-", " "), "")
                m_CanLogWriter.WriteLine(DateTime.Now.ToString("HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [" & direction & "] " & canId.ToString("X3") & " " & hex)
                m_CanLogWriter.Flush()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' ======================== 히터 워크플로우 (자동 검사) ========================

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 히터 검사 워크플로우 스레드
    ''' LH → RL 히터 (SendHeaterToggle, 438h 모니터링)
    ''' RH → RR 히터 (SendRRHeaterToggle, 453h 모니터링)
    ''' 순환: OFF→3단→2단→1단→OFF (4단계)
    ''' 1단→OFF 자동 전환은 OK 처리 (NTC 미연결 시 ECU 강제 차단)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub HeaterWorkflowThread()
        Dim allOk As Boolean = True
        Try
            ' IGN + 0x041 주기 전송 시작
            m_SendIgn = True
            Dim ignThread As New Thread(AddressOf IgnSenderThread)
            ignThread.IsBackground = True
            ignThread.Start()
            AppendCanLog("=== 히터 워크플로우 시작 ===")

            Thread.Sleep(1500)

            Dim isLH As Boolean = (Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "LH")
            AppendCanLog("사이드: " & If(isLH, "LH (RL)", "RH (RR)"))

            ' 히터 토글 순환: OFF(2) → 3단(8) → 2단(7) → 1단(6) → OFF(2)
            Dim cycleTargets() As Integer = {8, 7, 6, 2}
            Dim cycleLabels() As String = {"3단", "2단", "1단", "OFF"}
            Dim skipLastOff As Boolean = False

            For stepNum As Integer = 0 To 3
                ' 1단→OFF 자동 전환으로 마지막 OFF 스킵
                If stepNum = 3 AndAlso skipLastOff Then
                    AppendCanLog("  -> OFF 이미 완료 (1단→OFF 자동 전환) → SKIP")
                    Continue For
                End If

                AppendCanLog("[TX] 히터 토글 → " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 목표")
                If isLH Then
                    SendHeaterToggle()
                Else
                    SendRRHeaterToggle()
                End If
                Thread.Sleep(300)

                Dim ok As Boolean
                If isLH Then
                    ok = WaitHeaterState(cycleTargets(stepNum), 5000)
                Else
                    ok = WaitRRState(cycleTargets(stepNum), 5000)
                End If

                If ok Then
                    AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " OK")
                Else
                    Dim cur As Integer
                    If isLH Then
                        cur = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtOper)
                    Else
                        cur = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRHtOper)
                    End If

                    If stepNum = 2 AndAlso cur = 2 Then
                        ' 1단 목표인데 OFF → NTC 미연결로 ECU 강제 차단 → OK 처리
                        AppendCanLog("  -> 1단→OFF 자동 전환 (ECU 강제 차단) → OK 처리")
                        skipLastOff = True
                    ElseIf stepNum = 3 AndAlso cur = 2 Then
                        ' OFF 목표이고 이미 OFF → OK
                        AppendCanLog("  -> OFF 이미 완료 → OK 처리")
                    Else
                        AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " NG (현재=0x" & Hex(cur) & ")")
                        allOk = False
                    End If
                End If
                Thread.Sleep(500)
            Next

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] HeaterWorkflowThread: " & ex.Message)
            allOk = False
        Finally
            m_SendIgn = False
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN 전송 중지")
            AppendCanLog("=== 히터 워크플로우 완료: " & If(allOk, "OK", "NG") & " ===")
            m_HeaterTestResult = If(allOk, "OK", "NG")
            m_HeaterTestDone = True
        End Try
    End Sub

End Class

- NULL이면 false, 1이면 true

                        ' HEATER 포함이지만 히터 검사 미사용 → PASS 표시 후 스킵
                        srcLbHeater.Text = "PASS"
                        srcLbHeater.BackColor = Color.Green
                        srcLbHeater.ForeColor = Color.White
                        m_HeaterTestResult = "PASS"
                        If Panel_PWRMNL.Text = "PWR" Then
                            ChangeWorkStep(3.4)
                        Else
                            ChangeWorkStep(4.5)
                        End If
                    ElseIf Panel_PWRMNL.Text = "PWR" Then
                        ChangeWorkStep(3.4)
                    ElseIf Panel_PWRMNL.Text = "MNL" Then
                        ChangeWorkStep(4.5)
                    End If
                Else
                    'ChangeWorkStep(3)
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.2 Then
            ' 히터 테스트 시작
            Try
                Dim logDir As String = System.IO.Path.Combine(
                    AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory, "Can_Log",
                    Now.ToString("yyyy"), Now.ToString("MM"), Now.ToString("dd"))
                If Not System.IO.Directory.Exists(logDir) Then System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(logDir)
                Dim logPath As String = System.IO.Path.Combine(logDir, Panel_SN.Text & "_" & Now.ToString("HHmmss") & ".txt")
                m_CanLogWriter = New System.IO.StreamWriter(logPath, True, System.Text.Encoding.UTF8)

content.thinking:
The issue is clear. When `m_HasHeater = False` (NON HEATER product), `srcLbHeater` is never set to "NA". 

In the `wStep = 3.1` logic:
- `m_HasHeater AND OPTION_HEATER_ON` → 히터 검사 진입 (3.2)
- `m_HasHeater AND NOT OPTION_HEATER_ON` → "PASS" 표시
- `Not m_HasHeater` AND `PWR` → wStep 3.4
- `Not m_HasHeater` AND `MNL` → wStep 4.5


- When `m_HasHeater = False`, I need to set `srcLbHeater.Text = "NA"` before checking the PWR/MNL conditions, either by adding it directly in those branches or creating a dedicated condition block for non-heater products.

Looking at the actual structure, the PWR and MNL branches are already handling the `m_HasHeater = False` case, so I just need to add the NA assignment to both of them.

    Private Function StrPtr(ByVal x As String) As Integer
        Return VarPtr(x)

    Private Function VarPtr(ByVal obj As Object) As Integer
        ' Obtain a pinned handle to the object
        Dim handle As GCHandle = GCHandle.Alloc(obj, GCHandleType.Pinned)
        Dim pointer As Integer = handle.AddrOfPinnedObject.ToInt32

        ' Free the allocated handle. At this point the GC can move the object in memory, this is 
        ' why this function does not exist in .NET. If you were to use this pointer as a destination 
        ' for memcopy for example, you could overwrite unintended memory, which would crash the 
        ' application or cause unexpected behavior. For this function to work you would need to
        ' maintain the handle until after you are finished using it.
        handle.Free()

        Return pointer
    End Function
