    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        ' PCAN-USB CAN 수신 스레드
        ' ECU 응답 ID=0x3EE, Data[1]로 모터 상태 판별:
        ' 55=기본값, 65=리클전진, 95=리클후진, 56=틸트상승, 59=틸트하강

        Dim canId As UInt32
        Dim data() As Byte = Nothing

        Do
            Try
                If m_PcanConnected Then
                    If RecvCAN(canId, data) Then

                        ' CAN 로그 파일에 RX 기록 (히터 테스트 중)
                        WriteCanLog("RX", canId, data)

                        If PAnel_CAN.Text <> "OK" Then
                            PAnel_CAN.Text = "OK"
                            PAnel_CAN.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        End If

                        ' 수신 메시지 HEX 표시
                        ECU_MESSAGE.Text = canId.ToString("X3") & " " & BitConverter.ToString(data)

                        ' 진단: 처음 수신되는 CAN ID 로그
                        If m_CanLogEnabled AndAlso m_SeenCanIds.Add(canId) Then
                            AppendCanLog("[RX] 새 ID: " & canId.ToString("X3") & " " & BitConverter.ToString(data))
                        End If

                        ' TextBox1 로그 - 히터/진단 관련 신호만 필터링
                        If m_CanLogEnabled Then
                            If canId = &H438 OrElse canId = &H42E OrElse canId = &H453 OrElse canId = &H42F OrElse canId = &H73A Then
                                If canId = &H438 OrElse canId = &H453 Then
                                    ' _01: SeatHtOperSta (bit3, 4bit) - 변경 시에만 로그
                                    Dim side As String = If(canId = &H438, "RL", "RR")
                                    Dim htOper As Integer = If(data.Length >= 1, (data(0) >> 3) And &HF, 0)
                                    If canId = &H438 Then
                                        m_CurHtOper = htOper
                                    Else
                                        m_CurRRHtOper = htOper
                                    End If
                                    ' 통풍 상태 저장 (byte2)
                                    If canId = &H438 AndAlso data.Length >= 3 Then
                                        m_CurVent438 = CInt(data(2))
                                    End If
                                    Dim mode As String = ""
                                    Select Case htOper
                                        Case 2 : mode = "OFF"
                                        Case 6 : mode = "1단"
                                        Case 7 : mode = "2단"
                                        Case 8 : mode = "3단"
                                        Case Else : mode = $"0x{htOper:X}"
                                    End Select
                                    Dim key As String = $"{side}_{mode}"
                                    If key <> m_LastHtMode Then
                                        m_LastHtMode = key
                                        AppendCanLog($"[RX] {side} 히터 상태: {mode}")
                                    End If

                                ElseIf canId = &H42E OrElse canId = &H42F Then
                                    ' _02: HiInd - 변경 시에만 로그
                                    Dim side As String = If(canId = &H42E, "RL", "RR")
                                    If data.Length >= 3 Then
                                        Dim hi As Integer = (data(1) >> 4) And 3
                                        Dim mid2 As Integer = (data(1) >> 6) And 3
                                        Dim lo As Integer = data(2) And 3
                                        ' 테스트용 상태 저장
                                        If canId = &H42E Then
                                            m_CurHtIndiHi = hi
                                            m_CurHtIndiMid = mid2
                                            m_CurHtIndiLo = lo
                                        Else
                                            m_CurRRIndiHi = hi
                                            m_CurRRIndiMid = mid2
                                            m_CurRRIndiLo = lo
                                        End If
                                        ' 통풍 상태 저장 (byte4)
                                        If canId = &H42E AndAlso data.Length >= 5 Then
                                            m_CurVentByte = CInt(data(4))
                                        End If
                                        Dim key As String = $"{side}_{hi}_{mid2}_{lo}"
                                        If key <> m_LastHtIndi Then
                                            m_LastHtIndi = key
                                            AppendCanLog($"[RX] {side} 인디: 3단={If(hi > 0, "ON", "OFF")} 2단={If(mid2 > 0, "ON", "OFF")} 1단={If(lo > 0, "ON", "OFF")}")
                                        End If
                                    End If

                                ElseIf canId = &H73A Then
                                    ' UDS 응답 (RLPSU)
                                    Dim pci As Byte = If(data.Length >= 1, data(0), CByte(0))
                                    Dim sid As Byte = If(data.Length >= 2, data(1), CByte(0))
                                    If sid = &H50 Then
                                        ' DiagnosticSessionControl 정상응답
                                        AppendCanLog($"[RX] DIAG: 세션전환 OK (Extended)")
                                    ElseIf sid = &H6F Then
                                        ' IOControlByIdentifier 정상응답
                                        Dim didH As Byte = If(data.Length >= 3, data(2), CByte(0))
                                        Dim didL As Byte = If(data.Length >= 4, data(3), CByte(0))
                                        Dim val As Byte = If(data.Length >= 5, data(4), CByte(0))
                                        Dim valStr As String = ""
                                        Select Case val
                                            Case 0 : valStr = "OFF"
                                            Case 1 : valStr = "1단"
                                            Case 2 : valStr = "2단"
                                            Case 3 : valStr = "3단"
                                            Case Else : valStr = $"0x{val:X2}"
                                        End Select
                                        AppendCanLog($"[RX] DIAG: 히터제어 OK → {valStr}")
                                    ElseIf sid = &H7F Then
                                        ' 부정응답
                                        Dim nrc As Byte = If(data.Length >= 4, data(3), CByte(0))
                                        Dim nrcStr As String = ""
                                        Select Case nrc
                                            Case &H22 : nrcStr = "조건미충족"
                                            Case &H31 : nrcStr = "범위초과"
                                            Case &H33 : nrcStr = "보안접근필요"
                                            Case &H7F : nrcStr = "세션미지원"
                                            Case Else : nrcStr = $"0x{nrc:X2}"
                                        End Select
                                        AppendCanLog($"[RX] DIAG: 거부 (NRC={nrcStr})")
                                    Else
                                        AppendCanLog($"[RX] DIAG: {BitConverter.ToString(data).Replace("-", " ")}")
                                    End If
                                End If
                            End If
                        End If

                        ' ECU 상태 메시지 (ID=0x3EE)
                        If canId = &H3EE AndAlso data.Length >= 2 Then

                            Dim statusByte As Byte = data(1)

                            If statusByte = &H65 Then
                                RECL_FWD.BackColor = Color.Black
                                RECL_BWD.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                TILT_UP.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                TILT_DOWN.BackColor = Color.Gray

                            ElseIf statusByte = &H95 Then
                                RECL_FWD.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                RECL_BWD.BackColor = Color.Black
                                TILT_UP.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                TILT_DOWN.BackColor = Color.Gray

                            ElseIf statusByte = &H56 Then
                                RECL_FWD.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                RECL_BWD.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                TILT_UP.BackColor = Color.Black
                                TILT_DOWN.BackColor = Color.Gray

                            ElseIf statusByte = &H59 Then
                                RECL_FWD.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                RECL_BWD.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                TILT_UP.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                TILT_DOWN.BackColor = Color.Black

                            ElseIf statusByte = &H55 Then
                                RECL_FWD.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                RECL_BWD.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                TILT_UP.BackColor = Color.Gray
                                TILT_DOWN.BackColor = Color.Gray

                            Else
                                RECL_FWD.BackColor = Color.Silver
                                RECL_BWD.BackColor = Color.Silver
                                TILT_UP.BackColor = Color.Silver
                                TILT_DOWN.BackColor = Color.Silver

                            End If

                        End If
                    Else
                        Thread.Sleep(1) ' 큐 비어있으면 CPU 절약
                    End If
                Else
                    Thread.Sleep(100)
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception
                RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", CAN Recv Error: " & ex.Message)
                Thread.Sleep(100)
            End Try

        Loop

    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' PCAN-USB로 Extended CAN 메시지 전송 (29bit ID)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function SendCANEx(canId As UInt32, data() As Byte) As Boolean
        If Not m_PcanConnected Then Return False
        Dim msg As New TPCANMsg()
        msg.ID = canId
        msg.MSGTYPE = TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_EXTENDED
        msg.LEN = CByte(Math.Min(data.Length, 8))
        msg.DATA = New Byte(7) {}
        Array.Copy(data, msg.DATA, msg.LEN)
        Dim result = PCANBasic.Write(m_PcanHandle, msg)
        If result = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then WriteCanLog("TX", canId, data)
        Return result = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK
    End Function

    Private m_CanLogEnabled As Boolean = False
    ' 수신 CAN ID 추적 (진단용 — 처음 보는 ID만 로그)
    Private m_SeenCanIds As New HashSet(Of UInt32)
    ' 히터 상태 변경 감지용 (변경 시에만 로그)
    Private m_LastHtMode As String = ""
    Private m_LastHtIndi As String = ""
    ' 히터 상태 변경 감지용 (HeaterTestRH에서 대기)
    Private m_CurHtOper As Integer = -1  ' 현재 히터 모드 (438h SeatHtOperSta)
    Private m_CurHtIndiHi As Integer = -1   ' 42E 3단 인디케이터
    Private m_CurHtIndiMid As Integer = -1  ' 42E 2단 인디케이터
    Private m_CurHtIndiLo As Integer = -1   ' 42E 1단 인디케이터
    Private m_CurVentByte As Integer = -1   ' 42E byte4 통풍 상태 (54=3단,50=2단,40=1단,00=OFF)
    Private m_CurVent438 As Integer = -1    ' 438 byte2 통풍 상태 (2E=3단,26=2단,1E=1단,16=OFF)
    ' RR 상태 (453h, 42Fh)
    Private m_CurRRHtOper As Integer = -1
    Private m_CurRRIndiHi As Integer = -1
    Private m_CurRRIndiMid As Integer = -1
    Private m_CurRRIndiLo As Integer = -1

    Private Sub Button9_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button9.Click
        If Not m_PcanConnected Then
            ' CAN 접속
            OpenCAN()
            If Not m_PcanConnected Then
                MessageBox.Show("PCAN-USB 접속 실패")
                Return
            End If
        End If

        ' 테스트 메시지 전송 (ID=0x000, 데이터 8바이트)
        SendCAN(&H0, New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        AppendCanLog("[TX] 000h: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00")

        ' 로그 토글
        m_CanLogEnabled = Not m_CanLogEnabled
        If m_CanLogEnabled Then
            Button9.Text = "CAN 로그 중지"
        Else
            Button9.Text = "CAN 로그 시작"
        End If
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' UI 스레드에서 TextBox1에 로그 추가
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub AppendCanLog(text As String)
        If TextBox1.InvokeRequired Then
            TextBox1.BeginInvoke(New Action(Of String)(AddressOf AppendCanLog), text)
            Return
        End If
        ' 로그가 너무 많으면 앞부분 삭제
        If TextBox1.TextLength > 50000 Then
            TextBox1.Text = TextBox1.Text.Substring(TextBox1.TextLength - 30000)
        End If
        TextBox1.AppendText(DateTime.Now.ToString("HH:mm:ss.fff") & " " & text & vbCrLf)
    End Sub

    Private m_SendIgn As Boolean = False

    ''' <summary>
    ''' IGN ON 주기 전송 스레드
    ''' BCM_02_200ms (0x3E0): byte4=0x50 (BCM_Ign1InSta=1, BCM_Ign2InSta=1)
    ''' RLPSU/RRPSU가 수신하는 IGN 신호는 BCM_02 (ICU_12 아님)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub IgnSenderThread()
        Do While m_SendIgn
            ' BCM_02: byte4=0x50 (IGN1 ON + IGN2 ON), byte5=0x03
            SendCAN(&H3E0, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, &H50, &H3, 0, 0})
            ' 0x041: 통풍 구동조건2 (PE VENT CONDITION2)
            SendCAN(&H41, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0})
            Thread.Sleep(200)
        Loop
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' RL 히터 테스트: PE Extended CAN 0x90842901 DATC_RLStHtrSwReq 토글
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub Button10_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button10.Click
        If Not m_PcanConnected Then
            OpenCAN()
            If Not m_PcanConnected Then
                MessageBox.Show("PCAN-USB 접속 실패")
                Return
            End If
        End If

        Button10.Enabled = False
        m_CanLogEnabled = True
        m_SeenCanIds.Clear()
        m_LastHtMode = ""
        m_LastHtIndi = ""
        m_CurHtOper = -1
        m_CurHtIndiHi = -1
        m_CurHtIndiMid = -1
        m_CurHtIndiLo = -1
        AppendCanLog("=== RL 히터 테스트 시작 (PE Ext 0x90842901 DATC_RLStHtrSwReq) ===")

        Dim t As New Thread(AddressOf HeaterTestRH)
        t.IsBackground = True
        t.Start()
    End Sub

    Private m_SendTp As Boolean = False

    ''' <summary>
    ''' TesterPresent ($3E 80) 주기 전송 - Extended Session 유지
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub TesterPresentThread()
        Do While m_SendTp
            SendCAN(&H732, New Byte() {&H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
            Thread.Sleep(2000)
        Loop
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 히터 상태(438h SeatHtOperSta)가 목표값으로 변경될 때까지 대기
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function WaitHeaterState(targetOper As Integer, timeoutMs As Integer) As Boolean
        Dim sw As New Stopwatch()
        sw.Start()
        Do While sw.ElapsedMilliseconds < timeoutMs
            If Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtOper) = targetOper Then Return True
            Thread.Sleep(50)
        Loop
        Return False
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' PE Extended CAN 0x90842901 히터 토글
    ''' DATC_RLStHtrSwReq: byte6 bit[5:4] → 2=ON, 1=OFF
    ''' 통풍은 byte6 bit[7:6], 히터는 byte6 bit[5:4]
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub SendHeaterToggle()
        Try
            ' byte6=0x20 → DATC_RLStHtrSwReq=2 (ON)
            Dim ret As Boolean = SendCANEx(&H90842901UI, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, &H20, 0})
            If Not ret Then
                AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendCANEx 0x90842901 실패 (0x20)")
                Return
            End If
            Thread.Sleep(600)
            ' byte6=0x10 → DATC_RLStHtrSwReq=1 (OFF/해제)
            ret = SendCANEx(&H90842901UI, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, &H10, 0})
            If Not ret Then
                AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendCANEx 0x90842901 실패 (0x10)")
                Return
            End If
            AppendCanLog("[TX] Ext 0x90842901 히터 토글 완료 (20→10)")
        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendHeaterToggle: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub HeaterTestRH()
        Try
            ' --- IGN + 0x041 주기 전송 시작 ---
            m_SendIgn = True
            Dim ignThread As New Thread(AddressOf IgnSenderThread)
            ignThread.IsBackground = True
            ignThread.Start()
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN ON + 0x041 전송 시작")

            Thread.Sleep(1500)

            ' 초기 상태 확인
            AppendCanLog("[RX] 초기 상태")
            LogHeaterState()

            ' 히터 토글 순환: OFF(2) → 3단(8) → 2단(7) → 1단(6) → OFF(2)
            ' (통풍과 같은 순환 패턴일 가능성 높음)
            Dim cycleTargets() As Integer = {8, 7, 6, 2}
            Dim cycleLabels() As String = {"3단", "2단", "1단", "OFF"}

            For stepNum As Integer = 0 To 3
                AppendCanLog("[TX] 히터 토글 → " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 목표 (0x" & Hex(cycleTargets(stepNum)) & ")")
                SendHeaterToggle()
                Thread.Sleep(300)
                If WaitHeaterState(cycleTargets(stepNum), 5000) Then
                    AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " OK")
                Else
                    Dim cur As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtOper)
                    AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 미확인 (현재=0x" & Hex(cur) & ")")
                End If
                LogHeaterState()
                Thread.Sleep(1000)
            Next

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ' --- 정리 ---
            m_SendIgn = False
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN 전송 중지")
            AppendCanLog("=== RL 히터 테스트 완료 ===")
            Me.BeginInvoke(Sub() Button10.Enabled = True)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 현재 히터 상태 로그 (438h + 42E 인디케이터)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub LogHeaterState()
        Dim oper As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtOper)
        Dim operLabel As String = "?"
        Select Case oper
            Case 2 : operLabel = "OFF"
            Case 6 : operLabel = "히터1단"
            Case 7 : operLabel = "히터2단"
            Case 8 : operLabel = "히터3단"
            Case 3 : operLabel = "통풍1단"
            Case 4 : operLabel = "통풍2단"
            Case 5 : operLabel = "통풍3단"
            Case Else : operLabel = "0x" & Hex(oper)
        End Select
        AppendCanLog("  -> 438h: " & operLabel & " (0x" & Hex(oper) & ")")
        Dim hi As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtIndiHi)
        Dim mid2 As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtIndiMid)
        Dim lo As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtIndiLo)
        If hi >= 0 Then
            AppendCanLog("  -> 42E 인디: 3단=" & If(hi > 0, "ON", "OFF") & " 2단=" & If(mid2 > 0, "ON", "OFF") & " 1단=" & If(lo > 0, "ON", "OFF"))
        End If
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' RL 통풍 테스트: PE 사양 — Extended CAN 0x90842901 토글
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub Button11_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button11.Click
        If Not m_PcanConnected Then
            OpenCAN()
            If Not m_PcanConnected Then
                MessageBox.Show("PCAN-USB 접속 실패")
                Return
            End If
        End If

        Button11.Enabled = False
        m_CanLogEnabled = True
        m_SeenCanIds.Clear()
        m_CurVentByte = -1
        m_CurVent438 = -1
        AppendCanLog("=== RL 통풍 테스트 시작 (PE Extended 0x90842901) ===")

        Dim t As New Thread(AddressOf VentTestThread)
        t.IsBackground = True
        t.Start()
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 통풍 상태 대기 (438h SeatHtOperSta: 5=3단, 4=2단, 3=1단, 2=OFF)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function WaitVentState(targetOper As Integer, timeoutMs As Integer) As Boolean
        Dim sw As New Stopwatch()
        sw.Start()
        Do While sw.ElapsedMilliseconds < timeoutMs
            If Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtOper) = targetOper Then Return True
            Thread.Sleep(50)
        Loop
        Return False
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 통풍 상태 로그
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub LogVentState()
        Dim oper As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtOper)
        Dim ventLabel As String = "?"
        Select Case oper
            Case 5 : ventLabel = "통풍3단"
            Case 4 : ventLabel = "통풍2단"
            Case 3 : ventLabel = "통풍1단"
            Case 2 : ventLabel = "OFF"
            Case Else : ventLabel = "0x" & Hex(oper)
        End Select
        AppendCanLog("  -> 438h: " & ventLabel & " (0x" & Hex(oper) & ")")
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' PE 통풍 토글: Extended 0x90842901
    ''' 원본 코드 패턴: 타이머 200ms 간격으로 0x80 1회 → (3E0+041 사이클) → 0x40 1회
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub SendVentToggle()
        Try
            ' UP (byte6=0x80) — 1회 전송
            Dim ret As Boolean = SendCANEx(&H90842901UI, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, &H80, 0})
            If Not ret Then
                AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendCANEx 0x90842901 실패 (0x80)")
                Return
            End If
            ' 원본 타이밍: 3E0→041→토글 사이클 = 약 600ms
            Thread.Sleep(600)
            ' 확인 (byte6=0x40) — 1회 전송
            ret = SendCANEx(&H90842901UI, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, &H40, 0})
            If Not ret Then
                AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendCANEx 0x90842901 실패 (0x40)")
                Return
            End If
            AppendCanLog("[TX] Ext 0x90842901 LH 토글 완료 (80→40)")
        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendVentToggle: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub VentTestThread()
        Try
            ' --- IGN + 0x041 주기 전송 시작 ---
            m_SendIgn = True
            Dim ignThread As New Thread(AddressOf IgnSenderThread)
            ignThread.IsBackground = True
            ignThread.Start()
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN ON + 0x041 전송 시작")

            Thread.Sleep(1500)

            ' 초기 상태
            AppendCanLog("[RX] 초기 상태")
            LogVentState()

            ' 토글 순환 사이클: OFF(2) → 3단(5) → 2단(4) → 1단(3) → OFF(2)
            Dim cycleTargets() As Integer = {5, 4, 3, 2}
            Dim cycleLabels() As String = {"3단", "2단", "1단", "OFF"}

            ' 2회전 반복 테스트
            For round As Integer = 1 To 2
                AppendCanLog("--- 순환 " & round.ToString() & "회차 ---")
                For stepNum As Integer = 0 To 3
                    AppendCanLog("[TX] 토글 → " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 목표 (0x" & Hex(cycleTargets(stepNum)) & ")")
                    SendVentToggle()
                    Thread.Sleep(300)
                    If WaitVentState(cycleTargets(stepNum), 5000) Then
                        AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " OK")
                    Else
                        Dim cur As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtOper)
                        AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 미확인 (현재=0x" & Hex(cur) & ")")
                    End If
                    LogVentState()
                    Thread.Sleep(1000)
                Next
            Next

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            m_SendIgn = False
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN 전송 중지")
            AppendCanLog("=== RL 통풍 테스트 완료 ===")
            Me.BeginInvoke(Sub() Button11.Enabled = True)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' ======================== RR (후석 우측) 테스트 ========================

    ''' <summary>
    ''' RR 히터 테스트: PE Extended CAN 0x90842901 DATC_RRStHtrSwReq 토글
    ''' byte6 bit[1:0]: ON=0x02, OFF=0x01
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub btn_RR_HEater_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_RR_HEater.Click
        If Not m_PcanConnected Then
            OpenCAN()
            If Not m_PcanConnected Then
                MessageBox.Show("PCAN-USB 접속 실패")
                Return
            End If
        End If

        btn_RR_HEater.Enabled = False
        m_CanLogEnabled = True
        m_SeenCanIds.Clear()
        m_CurRRHtOper = -1
        m_CurRRIndiHi = -1
        m_CurRRIndiMid = -1
        m_CurRRIndiLo = -1
        AppendCanLog("=== RR 히터 테스트 시작 (PE Ext 0x90842901 DATC_RRStHtrSwReq) ===")

        Dim t As New Thread(AddressOf RRHeaterTestThread)
        t.IsBackground = True
        t.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub SendRRHeaterToggle()
        Try
            ' byte6=0x02 → DATC_RRStHtrSwReq=2 (ON)
            Dim ret As Boolean = SendCANEx(&H90842901UI, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, &H2, 0})
            If Not ret Then
                AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendCANEx 0x90842901 실패 (0x02)")
                Return
            End If
            Thread.Sleep(600)
            ' byte6=0x01 → DATC_RRStHtrSwReq=1 (OFF/해제)
            ret = SendCANEx(&H90842901UI, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, &H1, 0})
            If Not ret Then
                AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendCANEx 0x90842901 실패 (0x01)")
                Return
            End If
            AppendCanLog("[TX] Ext 0x90842901 RR 히터 토글 완료 (02→01)")
        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendRRHeaterToggle: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Function WaitRRState(targetOper As Integer, timeoutMs As Integer) As Boolean
        Dim sw As New Stopwatch()
        sw.Start()
        Do While sw.ElapsedMilliseconds < timeoutMs
            If Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRHtOper) = targetOper Then Return True
            Thread.Sleep(50)
        Loop
        Return False
    End Function

    Private Sub LogRRHeaterState()
        Dim oper As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRHtOper)
        Dim operLabel As String = "?"
        Select Case oper
            Case 2 : operLabel = "OFF"
            Case 6 : operLabel = "히터1단"
            Case 7 : operLabel = "히터2단"
            Case 8 : operLabel = "히터3단"
            Case 3 : operLabel = "통풍1단"
            Case 4 : operLabel = "통풍2단"
            Case 5 : operLabel = "통풍3단"
            Case Else : operLabel = "0x" & Hex(oper)
        End Select
        AppendCanLog("  -> 453h: " & operLabel & " (0x" & Hex(oper) & ")")
        Dim hi As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRIndiHi)
        Dim mid2 As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRIndiMid)
        Dim lo As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRIndiLo)
        If hi >= 0 Then
            AppendCanLog("  -> 42F 인디: 3단=" & If(hi > 0, "ON", "OFF") & " 2단=" & If(mid2 > 0, "ON", "OFF") & " 1단=" & If(lo > 0, "ON", "OFF"))
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub RRHeaterTestThread()
        Try
            m_SendIgn = True
            Dim ignThread As New Thread(AddressOf IgnSenderThread)
            ignThread.IsBackground = True
            ignThread.Start()
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN ON + 0x041 전송 시작")

            Thread.Sleep(1500)

            AppendCanLog("[RX] 초기 상태")
            LogRRHeaterState()

            ' 히터 토글 순환: OFF(2) → 3단(8) → 2단(7) → 1단(6) → OFF(2)
            Dim cycleTargets() As Integer = {8, 7, 6, 2}
            Dim cycleLabels() As String = {"3단", "2단", "1단", "OFF"}

            For stepNum As Integer = 0 To 3
                AppendCanLog("[TX] RR 히터 토글 → " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 목표 (0x" & Hex(cycleTargets(stepNum)) & ")")
                SendRRHeaterToggle()
                Thread.Sleep(300)
                If WaitRRState(cycleTargets(stepNum), 5000) Then
                    AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " OK")
                Else
                    Dim cur As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRHtOper)
                    AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 미확인 (현재=0x" & Hex(cur) & ")")
                End If
                LogRRHeaterState()
                Thread.Sleep(1000)
            Next

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            m_SendIgn = False
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN 전송 중지")
            AppendCanLog("=== RR 히터 테스트 완료 ===")
            Me.BeginInvoke(Sub() btn_RR_HEater.Enabled = True)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' RR 통풍 테스트: PE Extended CAN 0x90842901 DATC_RRStVentSwReq 토글
    ''' byte6 bit[3:2]: ON=0x08, OFF=0x04
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub btn_RR_Vent_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_RR_Vent.Click
        If Not m_PcanConnected Then
            OpenCAN()
            If Not m_PcanConnected Then
                MessageBox.Show("PCAN-USB 접속 실패")
                Return
            End If
        End If

        btn_RR_Vent.Enabled = False
        m_CanLogEnabled = True
        m_SeenCanIds.Clear()
        m_CurRRHtOper = -1
        AppendCanLog("=== RR 통풍 테스트 시작 (PE Ext 0x90842901 DATC_RRStVentSwReq) ===")

        Dim t As New Thread(AddressOf RRVentTestThread)
        t.IsBackground = True
        t.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub SendRRVentToggle()
        Try
            ' byte6=0x08 → DATC_RRStVentSwReq=2 (ON)
            Dim ret As Boolean = SendCANEx(&H90842901UI, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, &H8, 0})
            If Not ret Then
                AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendCANEx 0x90842901 실패 (0x08)")
                Return
            End If
            Thread.Sleep(600)
            ' byte6=0x04 → DATC_RRStVentSwReq=1 (OFF/해제)
            ret = SendCANEx(&H90842901UI, New Byte() {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, &H4, 0})
            If Not ret Then
                AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendCANEx 0x90842901 실패 (0x04)")
                Return
            End If
            AppendCanLog("[TX] Ext 0x90842901 RR 통풍 토글 완료 (08→04)")
        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] SendRRVentToggle: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub RRVentTestThread()
        Try
            m_SendIgn = True
            Dim ignThread As New Thread(AddressOf IgnSenderThread)
            ignThread.IsBackground = True
            ignThread.Start()
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN ON + 0x041 전송 시작")

            Thread.Sleep(1500)

            AppendCanLog("[RX] 초기 상태")
            Dim initOper As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRHtOper)
            AppendCanLog("  -> 453h: " & If(initOper = 2, "OFF", "0x" & Hex(initOper)) & " (0x" & Hex(initOper) & ")")

            ' 통풍 토글 순환: OFF(2) → 3단(5) → 2단(4) → 1단(3) → OFF(2)
            Dim cycleTargets() As Integer = {5, 4, 3, 2}
            Dim cycleLabels() As String = {"3단", "2단", "1단", "OFF"}

            ' 2회전
            For round As Integer = 1 To 2
                AppendCanLog("--- 순환 " & round.ToString() & "회차 ---")
                For stepNum As Integer = 0 To 3
                    AppendCanLog("[TX] RR 통풍 토글 → " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 목표 (0x" & Hex(cycleTargets(stepNum)) & ")")
                    SendRRVentToggle()
                    Thread.Sleep(300)
                    If WaitRRState(cycleTargets(stepNum), 5000) Then
                        AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " OK")
                    Else
                        Dim cur As Integer = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRHtOper)
                        AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 미확인 (현재=0x" & Hex(cur) & ")")
                    End If
                    Thread.Sleep(1000)
                Next
            Next

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            m_SendIgn = False
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN 전송 중지")
            AppendCanLog("=== RR 통풍 테스트 완료 ===")
            Me.BeginInvoke(Sub() btn_RR_Vent.Enabled = True)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' ======================== CAN 로그 파일 기록 ========================

    ''' <summary>
    ''' CAN 로그 파일에 TX/RX 기록 (히터 테스트 중에만)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub WriteCanLog(direction As String, canId As UInt32, data() As Byte)
        Try
            If m_CanLogWriter IsNot Nothing Then
                Dim hex As String = If(data IsNot Nothing AndAlso data.Length > 0,
                    BitConverter.ToString(data).Replace("-", " "), "")
                m_CanLogWriter.WriteLine(DateTime.Now.ToString("HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [" & direction & "] " & canId.ToString("X3") & " " & hex)
                m_CanLogWriter.Flush()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' ======================== 히터 워크플로우 (자동 검사) ========================

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 히터 검사 워크플로우 스레드
    ''' LH → RL 히터 (SendHeaterToggle, 438h 모니터링)
    ''' RH → RR 히터 (SendRRHeaterToggle, 453h 모니터링)
    ''' 순환: OFF→3단→2단→1단→OFF (4단계)
    ''' 1단→OFF 자동 전환은 OK 처리 (NTC 미연결 시 ECU 강제 차단)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub HeaterWorkflowThread()
        Dim allOk As Boolean = True
        Try
            ' IGN + 0x041 주기 전송 시작
            m_SendIgn = True
            Dim ignThread As New Thread(AddressOf IgnSenderThread)
            ignThread.IsBackground = True
            ignThread.Start()
            AppendCanLog("=== 히터 워크플로우 시작 ===")

            Thread.Sleep(1500)

            Dim isLH As Boolean = (Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "LH")
            AppendCanLog("사이드: " & If(isLH, "LH (RL)", "RH (RR)"))

            ' 히터 토글 순환: OFF(2) → 3단(8) → 2단(7) → 1단(6) → OFF(2)
            Dim cycleTargets() As Integer = {8, 7, 6, 2}
            Dim cycleLabels() As String = {"3단", "2단", "1단", "OFF"}
            Dim skipLastOff As Boolean = False

            For stepNum As Integer = 0 To 3
                ' 1단→OFF 자동 전환으로 마지막 OFF 스킵
                If stepNum = 3 AndAlso skipLastOff Then
                    AppendCanLog("  -> OFF 이미 완료 (1단→OFF 자동 전환) → SKIP")
                    Continue For
                End If

                AppendCanLog("[TX] 히터 토글 → " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " 목표")
                If isLH Then
                    SendHeaterToggle()
                Else
                    SendRRHeaterToggle()
                End If
                Thread.Sleep(300)

                Dim ok As Boolean
                If isLH Then
                    ok = WaitHeaterState(cycleTargets(stepNum), 5000)
                Else
                    ok = WaitRRState(cycleTargets(stepNum), 5000)
                End If

                If ok Then
                    AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " OK")
                Else
                    Dim cur As Integer
                    If isLH Then
                        cur = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurHtOper)
                    Else
                        cur = Thread.VolatileRead(m_CurRRHtOper)
                    End If

                    If stepNum = 2 AndAlso cur = 2 Then
                        ' 1단 목표인데 OFF → NTC 미연결로 ECU 강제 차단 → OK 처리
                        AppendCanLog("  -> 1단→OFF 자동 전환 (ECU 강제 차단) → OK 처리")
                        skipLastOff = True
                    ElseIf stepNum = 3 AndAlso cur = 2 Then
                        ' OFF 목표이고 이미 OFF → OK
                        AppendCanLog("  -> OFF 이미 완료 → OK 처리")
                    Else
                        AppendCanLog("  -> " & cycleLabels(stepNum) & " NG (현재=0x" & Hex(cur) & ")")
                        allOk = False
                    End If
                End If
                Thread.Sleep(500)
            Next

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendCanLog("[ERR] HeaterWorkflowThread: " & ex.Message)
            allOk = False
        Finally
            m_SendIgn = False
            AppendCanLog("[TX] IGN 전송 중지")
            AppendCanLog("=== 히터 워크플로우 완료: " & If(allOk, "OK", "NG") & " ===")
            m_HeaterTestResult = If(allOk, "OK", "NG")
            m_HeaterTestDone = True
        End Try
    End Sub

End Class

content.text:
수정 완료. 이제 흐름:

```
MNL + false → CAN 미오픈 → wStep=2.1 → 2.2
  → OPTION_HEATER_ON=True  → BUT MNL+false → Else → wStep=3.1 → NA ✓
  → OPTION_HEATER_ON=False → Else → wStep=3.1 → NA ✓

PWR 또는 Heater → CAN 오픈 → wStep=2.1 → 2.2
  → OPTION_HEATER_ON=True  → CAN 대기 → 3.1 ✓
```

message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Analysis:
Let me chronologically analyze the conversation:

1. User cloned ftech-projects/DSC_INDIA_1 repo to Desktop, navigated to KY FRT CUSH/S50
2. Examined S50 VB.NET project - IO signal based tool tightening position check
3. User asked to confirm only HGT/N-HGT 2 sets in INI config
4. User requested to expand to 8 combinations (HGT/NHGT × LH/RH × QY/KY)
5. Made 4 code changes to FrmMain.vb in S50
6. Committed and pushed to DSC_INDIA_1

7. Navigated to DSC_JX1/S80
8. Tried to connect to SQL Server at FTECH_SVR and 192.168.0.100 - failed
9. User provided correct connection string: 192.168.0.201\JX1_SVR
10. Added OptionHeater BIT column to Table_Part (OPTION_HEATER already existed by user)
11. Updated OPTION_HEATER values based on Part_Script content (333 rows)
12. Modified S80/FrmMain.vb to use OPTION_HEATER column for m_HasHeater determination
13. Fixed NA display for NON HEATER products (MNL/PWR)
14. Fixed CAN wait bug for MNL+false heater products
15. Committed and pushed DSC_JX1

16. Navigated to DSC_JX1/S150 V2
17. User asked to check if "HEV" string appears in barcode-related code
18. Searched - no HEV found in any .vb files

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - **DSC_INDIA_1 / KY FRT CUSH / S50**: 툴 체결 위치 IO 조건을 HGT/N-HGT 2가지에서 HGT/NHGT × LH/RH × QY/KY 8가지 조합으로 확장. INI 파일에 없는 섹션 자동 추가. 수정 후 영어 설명 작성. 커밋/푸시.
   - **DSC_JX1 / S80**: SQL Server(192.168.0.201\JX1_SVR) 접속 확인 → Table_Part에 OptionHeater BIT 컬럼 추가 → Part_Script 문자열 기반으로 OPTION_HEATER 값 일괄 업데이트(333건) → S80 FrmMain.vb에서 m_HasHeater를 DB 컬럼으로 판정하도록 변경 → NON HEATER 시 NA 표시 추가 → MNL+비히터 CAN 타임아웃 버그 수정. 커밋/푸시.
   - **DSC_JX1 / S150 V2**: 바코드 관련 코드에 "HEV" 문자열 포함 여부 확인.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - VB.NET WinForms 레거시 프로젝트 (DSC_INDIA_1, DSC_JX1)
   - INI 파일 읽기/쓰기 (kernel32 GetPrivateProfileString/WritePrivateProfileString)
   - PLC 통신 (Mitsubishi ACT, W레지스터, D레지스터)
   - 시리얼 통신 (RFID, 바코드 스캐너, 에어툴, 모듈)
   - ADODB.Connection/Recordset (Access MDB + SQL Server)
   - sqlcmd CLI로 SQL Server 직접 조작
   - OPTION_HEATER BIT 컬럼 기반 히터 사양 판정
   - CAN 통신 (PCAN-USB, wStep 기반 상태머신)
   - gdrive-sync push/pull (gitignore 파일 Google Drive 백업)
   - gh CLI (GitHub 인증 ryudae33, ftech-projects 조직)

3. Files and Code Sections:
   - **C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\KY FRT CUSH\S50\FrmMain.vb**
     - IO 조건 배열을 8가지 조합으로 확장, INI 처리, wStep=5 분기, ThreadTask2 통일
     - 변수 선언 변경 (line 83-92):
       ```vb
       Private Hgt_LH_QY(4) As String
       Private Hgt_LH_KY(4) As String
       Private Hgt_RH_QY(4) As String
       Private Hgt_RH_KY(4) As String
       Private NHgt_LH_QY(4) As String
       Private NHgt_LH_KY(4) As String
       Private NHgt_RH_QY(4) As String
       Private NHgt_RH_KY(4) As String
       Private CurrentToolP() As String
       Private toolstep As Integer
       ```
     - INI 파일 처리: 8개 섹션(TOOL_HGT_LH_QY 등) 없으면 추가
     - wStep=5 분기:
       ```vb
       Dim isLH As Boolean = (Panel_Position.Text = "LH")
       Dim isKY As Boolean = Panel_CarType.Text.Contains("KY")
       If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
           If isLH Then
               If isKY Then CurrentToolP = Hgt_LH_KY Else CurrentToolP = Hgt_LH_QY
           Else
               If isKY Then CurrentToolP = Hgt_RH_KY Else CurrentToolP = Hgt_RH_QY
           End If
           ...
       ElseIf Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT" Then
           If isLH Then
               If isKY Then CurrentToolP = NHgt_LH_KY Else CurrentToolP = NHgt_LH_QY
           ...
       ```
     - ThreadTask2: `Hgt_P1(n)` / `NHgt_P1(n)` → `CurrentToolP(n)` 전부 교체

   - **C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_JX1\S80\FrmMain.vb**
     - m_HasHeater 판정을 Part_Script 문자열에서 DB OPTION_HEATER 컬럼으로 변경 (line 903):
       ```vb
       m_HasHeater = (Not IsDBNull(Rs.Fields("OPTION_HEATER").Value) AndAlso CBool(Rs.Fields("OPTION_HEATER").Value))
       ```
     - NON HEATER 시 NA 표시 추가 (wStep=3.1):
       ```vb
       ElseIf Panel_PWRMNL.Text = "PWR" Then
           srcLbHeater.Text = "NA"
           srcLbHeater.BackColor = Color.Green
           srcLbHeater.ForeColor = Color.White
           ChangeWorkStep(3.4)
       ElseIf Panel_PWRMNL.Text = "MNL" Then
           srcLbHeater.Text = "NA"
           srcLbHeater.BackColor = Color.Green
           srcLbHeater.ForeColor = Color.White
           ChangeWorkStep(4.5)
       ```
     - wStep=2.2 CAN 대기 조건 수정:
       ```vb
       If OPTION_HEATER_ON AndAlso (OP_PWRMNL = "PWR" OrElse m_HasHeater) Then
       ```

   - **SQL Server (192.168.0.201\JX1_SVR, DB: JX1_SVR)**
     - Table_Part에 OptionHeater BIT NULL 추가
     - OPTION_HEATER 컬럼 일괄 업데이트 (333건):
       ```sql
       UPDATE Table_Part SET OPTION_HEATER =
           CASE
               WHEN UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%NON HEATER%'
                 OR UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%NON HEAT%'
                 OR UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%NONHEATER%'
                 OR UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%NONHEAT%' THEN 0
               WHEN UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%HEATER%'
                 OR UPPER(Part_Script) LIKE '%HEAT%'    THEN 1
               ELSE 0
           END
       ```
     - 결과: true 278건, false 55건

   - **C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_JX1\S150 V2\FrmMain.vb / FrmBarcode.vb / Module1.vb**
     - "HEV" 문자열 검색 — 결과 없음

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **SQL Server 접속 실패**: FTECH_SVR, 192.168.0.100 모두 연결 불가 → 사용자가 올바른 연결 문자열 제공 (`192.168.0.201\JX1_SVR`)
   - **gdrive-sync pull 실패**: DSC_INDIA_1 Google Drive 폴더 미존재 (이전에 push된 적 없음) → 무시하고 진행
   - **MNL+비히터 CAN 타임아웃 버그**: MNL+m_HasHeater=False이면 CAN을 열지 않는데 wStep=2.2에서 OPTION_HEATER_ON=True이면 CAN 대기 → 10초 타임아웃 발생 → `AndAlso (OP_PWRMNL = "PWR" OrElse m_HasHeater)` 조건 추가로 수정
   - **OptionHeater vs OPTION_HEATER 중복**: 사용자가 이미 OPTION_HEATER 추가했었음, OptionHeater는 별도 추가된 것. 사용자가 OPTION_HEATER를 사용하도록 지시.

5. Problem Solving:
   - S50 IO 조건을 8가지 조합으로 확장하여 LH/RH, QY/KY별 독립 설정 가능하게 함
   - INI 파일 기존 값 유지하면서 누락 섹션만 추가하는 방식 구현
   - CurrentToolP 참조 변수로 ThreadTask2에서 조합별 배열 통일 참조
   - OPTION_HEATER DB 컬럼으로 히터 판정 일원화 (Part_Script 문자열 의존 제거)
   - NON HEATER NA 미표시 버그 및 MNL+비히터 CAN 타임아웃 버그 2건 수정

6. All user messages:
   - "리포 확인 완료 (ftech-projects/DSC_INDIA_1, master 브랜치). 바탕화면에 클론합니다." (이전 세션 컨텍스트)
   - "C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\KY FRT CUSH\S50"
   - "아이오 신호 따라 툴 체결 위치 결정해서 검사하는 부분 확인"
   - "현재 ini 설정된 건 hgt n/hgt 2개만 구분되어있나"
   - "Panel_Position.text "LH/"RH" Panel_CarType.text "QY/KY" 일때 로 구분해줘 프로그램 시작시 config 에 없으면 추가해주고,이해되나 ?"
   - "응 진행해"
   - "수정한 내용 영어로 설명"
   - "프로그램 모르는 인도새키들이야"
   - "다시 영어로 프로그램 모르는 사용자가 config 만 건드리면 됨"
   - "커밋하고 푸시해"
   - "C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_JX1\S80"
   - "서버에 접속 되는지 확인하고 접속되면 table_part 에 컬럼 하나 추가해줘 이름은 OptionHeater bit"
   - "이미 내가 해" (OPTION_HEATER 이미 추가했다는 뜻)
   - "ㅆ고" (코드에 적용해달라는 뜻)
   - "이미 내가 했고" (처리 중 새 메시지)
   - "OPTION_HEATER 로 추가해놨고 , part_script 에 문자열이 HEATER/HEAT 있으면 option_heater 가 true NON HEATER / NON HEAT / NONHEATER / NONHEAT 있으면 false 로 입력해줘 아무것도 없으면 false"
   - "확인했고 s80 프로그램에서 이거 사용해서 히터 판정하게"

   - "89500-T6565 인데 디비에서 겁색해볼래" (처리 중 새 메시지)

7. Pending Tasks:

- Table_Part에 TYPE4 컬럼이 있음 (nvarchar(50), 현재 모두 NULL)

- TYPE4 = "HEV"이면 "PE" 대신 "HEV"를 출력

먼저 라인 1081 근처에서 TYPE3를 읽는 부분을 찾아서 TYPE4도 함께 로드하고, 새로운 멤버변수 `OptionType4`를 추가해서 DB에서 읽은 값을 저장한 다음, 프린터 출력 부분 2곳에서 이 변수를 체크하는 로직을 넣어야 한다.

So the user wants to keep the `OptionCarType = "PE"` condition as-is, but change what gets printed inside that block — if TYPE4 contains "HEV", output "HEV" instead of "PE". 조건부 출력 로직을 다시 생각해보니, TYPE4가 "HEV"일 때만 해당 블록이 실행되어야 하는 건지, 아니면 단순히 프린터에 출력되는 문자를 "PE" 대신 "HEV"로 바꾸는 건지 명확히 해야 할 것 같습니다. 후자라면 조건문 내에서 OptionType4 값에 따라 출력 문자를 결정하는 방식이 맞을 겁니다.

    Private Function StrPtr(ByVal x As String) As Integer

    Private Function VarPtr(ByVal obj As Object) As Integer
        ' Obtain a pinned handle to the object
        Dim handle As GCHandle = GCHandle.Alloc(obj, GCHandleType.Pinned)
        Dim pointer As Integer = handle.AddrOfPinnedObject.ToInt32

        ' Free the allocated handle. At this point the GC can move the object in memory, this is 
        ' why this function does not exist in .NET. If you were to use this pointer as a destination 
        ' for memcopy for example, you could overwrite unintended memory, which would crash the 
        ' application or cause unexpected behavior. For this function to work you would need to
        ' maintain the handle until after you are finished using it.
        handle.Free()

        Return pointer
    End Function

    Sub SerialOpen_RFID()

        Dim Rtn As Integer
        Dim ConnStr As String

        ConnStr = "RDType=M201;CommType=COM;COMName=" & PortNumber_RFID & ";BaudRate=38400;Frame=8E1"

        'UPGRADE_ISSUE: StrPtr 함수는 지원되지 않습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="367764E5-F3F8-4E44-AC3E-7FE0B5E074E2"'
        Rtn = RDR_Open(StrPtr(ConnStr), hReader) 'try to open usb hid communication, and save reader handle to hReader(global variable)
        If Rtn <> 0 Then
            RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": Open Fail for RFID" & ", ErrorNumber:  " & Rtn.ToString())
            If gSimulationEnable <> 1 Then MsgBox("RFID Open Fail: " & Rtn)

        End If

    Sub SerialClose_RFID()

        RDR_Close(hReader) 'Close
        hReader = 0 'set reader handle to NULL

    Private Function Connect_Tag(ByVal strUid As String) As Boolean

        Dim iret As Integer
        Dim uid() As Byte
        Dim Flag As Boolean = False

        Try

            If strUid = "" Then
                'MsgBox("input UID please")
            Else
                uid = HexToBytes((strUid))
                iret = ISO15693_Connect(hReader, 1, 1, uid(0), hTag)
                If iret <> 0 Then
                    Flag = False
                Else
                    Flag = True
                End If

            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Return Flag

    End Function

    Private Sub Read_Tag()

        Dim iret As Integer
        Dim nBlkRead As Integer
        Dim buffer(64) As Byte
        Dim bufSize As Integer
        Dim nByteRead As Integer
        Dim blokStr As String
        Dim blockStart As Integer
        Dim blockCnt As Integer

        Try

            nByteRead = nBlkRead = 0
            bufSize = UBound(buffer) + 1
            blockStart = "0"
            blockCnt = "6"
            iret = ISO15693_ReadMultiBlocks(hReader, hTag, 0, blockStart, blockCnt, nBlkRead, buffer(0), bufSize, nByteRead)
            If iret = 0 Then
                blokStr = BytesToHex(buffer, nByteRead)
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ASC2STR(blokStr)
            Else
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = "READ ERROR"
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            Panel_RF_READ.Text = "READ ERROR"
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Read_Inventorty()

        Dim Rtn As Integer
        Dim ByteUid(7) As Byte
        Dim dnhReport As Integer
        Dim dsfid As Byte
        Dim AIPtype As Integer
        Dim AntId As Integer
        'Dim uid(8) As Byte
        Dim suid As String

        Try

            Rtn = RDR_TagInventory(hReader, 1, 0, 0, 0) 'send inventory command to reader and save tag report at the buffer
            If Rtn = 0 Then
                'inventory ok ,then get tag report from buffer

                dnhReport = RDR_GetTagDataReport(hReader, 1) 'get first report
                Do While dnhReport <> 0
                    Rtn = ISO15693_ParseTagDataReport(dnhReport, AIPtype, AntId, AntId, dsfid, ByteUid(0))
                    If Rtn = 0 Then
                        suid = ""
                        suid = BytesToHex(ByteUid, 8)
                        Panel_RF_UID.Text = suid
                    End If

                    dnhReport = RDR_GetTagDataReport(hReader, 2) 'get next report
                Loop
            Else

            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

    End Sub


    Private Sub Write_Tag(ByVal strData As String)

        Dim iret As Integer
        Dim startBlk As Integer
        Dim BlkNum As Integer
        Dim blkDataBuff() As Byte
        Dim nSize As Integer
        Dim strTmp As String = ""

        Try

            startBlk = "0"
            BlkNum = "6"

            blkDataBuff = HexToBytes(STR2ASC(strData))

            nSize = UBound(blkDataBuff) + 1
            iret = ISO15693_WriteMultipleBlocks(hReader, hTag, startBlk, BlkNum, blkDataBuff(0), nSize)
            If iret = 0 Then
                'MsgBox("write ok")
            Else
                'MsgBox("write fail")
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

    End Sub

    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_Printer.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Printer.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Printer.PortName = PortNumber_PRINTER
            Serial_Printer.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Printer.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Printer.Open()
            RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & " COM Port " & Serial_Printer.PortName & " is open for Printer")
        Catch ex As Exception
            RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": Open Fail for Printer" & ", ErrorNumber:  " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)
            If gSimulationEnable <> 1 Then MsgBox("Serial Open Fail " & PortNumber_PRINTER)
        End Try

        Try

            If Serial_CAN.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_CAN.Close()
            End If
            Serial_CAN.PortName = PortNumber_CAN
            Serial_CAN.BaudRate = 115200
            Serial_CAN.DataBits = 8
            Serial_CAN.Open()
            RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & " COM Port " & Serial_CAN.PortName & " is open for CAN")

        Catch ex As Exception
            RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": Open Fail for CAN" & ", ErrorNumber:  " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)
            If gSimulationEnable <> 1 Then MsgBox("Serial Open Fail " & PortNumber_CAN)

        End Try

    Private Sub LoadVerInfo(CarType As String, ReclType As String, Pos As String)

        Connection_Open_MDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_EcuCheck WHERE OptionType = '" & CarType & "' AND OptionPosition = '" & Pos & "' AND OptionRecl = '" & ReclType & "'", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            SWsendMsg = Trim(Rs.Fields("SWsendCode").Value)
            SWrecvMSg = Trim(Rs.Fields("SWrecvCode").Value)
            HWsendMsg = Trim(Rs.Fields("HWsendCode").Value)
            HWrecvMSg = Trim(Rs.Fields("HWrecvCode").Value)
            PARTsendMsg = Trim(Rs.Fields("PARTsendCode").Value)
            PARTrecvMSg = Trim(Rs.Fields("PARTrecvCode").Value)

        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub


    Private Function BitMask(Str As String) As Integer

        '16 진수 -> 2 진수로
        '09 -> 00000000 -> 00001001
        '11 -> 00000000 -> 00010001
        '0A -> 00000000 -> 00001010

        '01 / 09 / 11
        Dim tmpBin As String
        Dim strBinary As String = ""
        Dim Tmp1 As String
        Dim Tmp2 As Integer
        tmpBin = Convert.ToInt32(Str, 16)
        strBinary = Format(CInt(Convert.ToString(CByte(tmpBin), 2)), "00000000")

        Tmp1 = Microsoft.VisualBasic.Right(strBinary, 3)
        Tmp2 = (CInt(Mid(Tmp1, 1, 1)) * 4) + (CInt(Mid(Tmp1, 2, 1)) * 2) + (CInt(Mid(Tmp1, 3, 1)) * 1)

        Return Tmp2

    End Function

        ' 이 호출은 디자이너에 필요합니다.

        CheckFormBasic = False
        CheckFormPort = False

        'On Error GoTo ErrHandler
        Dim vu As New VersionUtility


        RDR_LoadReaderDrivers(0) 'load rfidlib_ANM201.dll or other drivers
        GetCommName()

        Load_Etc_Data()
        Init_Control()
        Init_Grid()

        tStep1 = 0
        rStep = 0
        ChangeWorkStep(0)
        CanStep = 0
        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 1000
        Address_Connection_PLC1 = "192.168.0.100"

        Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_Barcode_Data()
        Load_Basic()

        SerialOpen_RFID()
        SerialOpen()

        Tmr_Connect.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect.Start()

        Tmr_RFID.Interval = 250
        Tmr_RFID.Start()

        Tmr_Work.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work.Start()

        Tmr_CAN.Interval = 200
        Tmr_CAN.Start()

        Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
        Trd1.IsBackground = True
        Trd1.Start()


    End Sub

    Dim TmpReadData1 As String = ""
    Dim TmpReadData2 As String = ""
    Dim TmpReadData3 As String = ""
    Dim tmpZone As String
    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim FCount As Integer
        Dim ecuTmp1 As String
        Dim ecuTmp2 As String
        Dim ecuTmp3 As String

        Dim TmpData As String = ""

        Dim RecvBuffer As String = ""
        Dim TmpStart As Integer = 0
        Dim TmpEnd As Integer = 0
        Do
            If Serial_CAN.IsOpen = True Then
                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_CAN.ReadExisting.ToUpper
                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    RecvBuffer = RecvBuffer & Incoming1
                    TmpData = ""
                    If RecvBuffer.Length >= 22 Then
                        TmpStart = InStr(1, RecvBuffer, "T")
                        TmpEnd = InStr(1, RecvBuffer, Chr(13))
                        TmpData = Mid(RecvBuffer, TmpStart, TmpEnd)
                        RecvBuffer = Mid(RecvBuffer, TmpEnd + 1, Len(RecvBuffer) - TmpEnd)

                        ECU_MESSAGE.Text = TmpData

                        If PAnel_CAN.Text <> "OK" Then
                            PAnel_CAN.Text = "OK"
                            PAnel_CAN.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        End If

                        If TmpData.Contains("T73A") = True Then
                            'Label1.Text = TmpData
                        End If
                        If wStep = 3.51 Then
                            If TmpData.Contains("T3EE") = True Or TmpData.Contains("T3ED") = True Then
                                If TmpData.Contains("014") = True Or TmpData.Contains("015") = True Then 'FWD
                                    FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COUNT = FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COUNT + 1
                                    If FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COUNT >= 1 Then FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COMP = True
                                ElseIf TmpData.Contains("018") = True Or TmpData.Contains("019") = True Then 'BWD
                                    FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COUNT = FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COUNT + 1
                                    If FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COUNT >= 1 Then FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COMP = True
                                End If
                            ElseIf TmpData.Contains("T39") = True Then
                                If TmpData.Contains("0080") = True Then
                                    FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COUNT = FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COUNT + 1
                                    If FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COUNT >= 1 Then FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COMP = True
                                ElseIf TmpData.Contains("0040") = True Then
                                    FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COUNT = FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COUNT + 1
                                    If FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COUNT >= 1 Then FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COMP = True
                                End If
                            End If
                        End If

                        '3A8037F3124AAAAAAAA
                        'T73A8037F3124AAAAAAAA
                        'T73A8037F3124AAAAAAAA
                        'T73A8037F3124AAAAAAAA

                        If STEP_ECU_EDUCATE = 0 Then
                            If TmpData.Contains("T73") = True Then
                                TextBox1.AppendText(TmpData & vbCrLf)
                            End If
                            If OP_LHRH = "LH" And OP_5P7P = "5P" Then
                                If Mid(TmpData, 1, 3) = "T73" And InStr(1, TmpData, "A3020202") <> 0 Then
                                    STEP_ECU_EDUCATE = 1
                                End If
                            ElseIf OP_LHRH = "RH" And OP_5P7P = "5P" Then
                                If Mid(TmpData, 1, 3) = "T73" And InStr(1, TmpData, "A30202") <> 0 Then
                                    If Serial_CAN.IsOpen() = True Then
                                        Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space("t 731 8 30 00 14 00 00 00 00 00") & Chr(13))
                                    End If
                                ElseIf Mid(TmpData, 1, 3) = "T73" And InStr(1, TmpData, "0002A") <> 0 Then
                                    STEP_ECU_EDUCATE = 1
                                End If
                            End If
                            If Mid(TmpData, 1, 3) = "T73" And InStr(1, TmpData, "A30202") <> 0 Then
                                STEP_ECU_EDUCATE = 1
                            End If
                        End If

                        'Try

                        If wStep = 1000 Then 'SW

                            If TmpData.Contains(SWrecvMSg) = True Then
                                TextBox1.AppendText(TmpData & vbCrLf)
                                PANEL_ECU_SOFT_VERSION.Text = Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpData, 14, 2)) & Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpData, 16, 2)) & Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpData, 18, 2)) & Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpData, 20, 2))
                                wStep = 1001
                            End If

                        ElseIf wStep = 1010 Then 'HW

                            If TmpData.Contains(HWrecvMSg) = True Then
                                TextBox1.AppendText(TmpData & vbCrLf)
                                PANEL_ECU_HARD_VERSION.Text = Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpData, 14, 2)) & Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpData, 16, 2)) & Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpData, 18, 2)) & Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpData, 20, 2))
                                wStep = 1011
                            End If

                        ElseIf wStep = 1020 Then 'PART FIRST

                            If TmpData.Contains(PARTrecvMSg) = True Then
                                TextBox1.AppendText(TmpData & vbCrLf)
                                TmpReadData1 = TmpData
                                TmrErrCount = 0
                                wStep = 1030
                            End If

                        ElseIf wStep = 1030 Then 'PART SECOND

                            If TmpData.Contains(PARTrecvMSg) = True Then
                                TextBox1.AppendText(TmpData & vbCrLf)
                                TmpReadData2 = TmpData
                                TmrErrCount = 0
                                If OptionCarType = "PE" Then
                                    wStep = 1050
                                Else
                                    wStep = 1040
                                End If

                            End If

                        ElseIf wStep = 1040 Then 'PART THIRD

                            If TmpData.Contains(PARTrecvMSg) = True Then
                                TextBox1.AppendText(TmpData & vbCrLf)
                                TmpReadData3 = TmpData
                                TmrErrCount = 0
                                wStep = 1050
                            End If

                        ElseIf wStep = 4.03 Then

                            If Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "LH" Then
                                If TmpData.Contains("T42C") Then
                                    TextBox1.AppendText(TmpData & vbCrLf)
                                    tmpZone = CStr(BitMask(Mid(TmpData, 6, 2)))
                                    tmpZONESTring = tmpZone
                                    PANEL_ECU_ZONE.Text = "ZONE" & tmpZONESTring
                                    If tmpZone = "1" Then
                                        PANEL_DEC_ECU_ZONE.Text = "OK"
                                        PANEL_DEC_ECU_ZONE.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                    Else
                                        PANEL_DEC_ECU_ZONE.Text = "NG"
                                        PANEL_DEC_ECU_ZONE.BackColor = Color.Red
                                    End If
                                    wStep = 4.05
                                End If
                            ElseIf Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "RH" Then
                                If TmpData.Contains("T42D") Then
                                    TextBox1.AppendText(TmpData & vbCrLf)
                                    tmpZone = CStr(BitMask(Mid(TmpData, 6, 2)))
                                    tmpZONESTring = tmpZone
                                    PANEL_ECU_ZONE.Text = "ZONE" & tmpZONESTring
                                    If tmpZone = "1" Then
                                        PANEL_DEC_ECU_ZONE.Text = "OK"
                                        PANEL_DEC_ECU_ZONE.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                    Else
                                        PANEL_DEC_ECU_ZONE.Text = "NG"
                                        PANEL_DEC_ECU_ZONE.BackColor = Color.Red
                                    End If
                                    wStep = 4.05
                                End If
                            End If

                            If TmpData.Contains(PARTrecvMSg) = True Then

                            End If
                        End If

                        'Catch ex As Exception

                        'End Try

                    End If
                End If

            End If
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub tmr_connect_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT_1()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If Flag_Connection_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ_1()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_READ_1()

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 18
        Dim i, j As Integer

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "D5200" & vbLf &
                                "D5201" & vbLf &
                                "D5202" & vbLf &
                                "D5250" & vbLf &
                                "D5251" & vbLf &
                                "D5252" & vbLf &
                                "D5253" & vbLf &
                                "D5254" & vbLf &
                                "D5255" & vbLf &
                                "D5256" & vbLf &
                                "D5257" & vbLf &
                                "D5258" & vbLf &
                                "D5259" & vbLf &
                                "D5260" & vbLf &
                                "D5261" & vbLf &
                                "D5203" & vbLf &
                                "D5204" & vbLf & "D5205"
        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i
            '5205 plc_value(17)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(0).Text = PLC_VALUE(0)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(1).Text = PLC_VALUE(1)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(2).Text = PLC_VALUE(2)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(3).Text = PLC_VALUE(15)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(4).Text = PLC_VALUE(16)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(5).Text = PLC_VALUE(17)

            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(0).Text = PLC_VALUE(3)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(1).Text = PLC_VALUE(4)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(2).Text = PLC_VALUE(5)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(3).Text = PLC_VALUE(6)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(4).Text = PLC_VALUE(7)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(5).Text = PLC_VALUE(8)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(6).Text = PLC_VALUE(9)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(7).Text = PLC_VALUE(10)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(8).Text = PLC_VALUE(11)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(9).Text = PLC_VALUE(12)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(10).Text = PLC_VALUE(13)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(11).Text = PLC_VALUE(14)

            For j = 0 To 5
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 11
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE_1(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_CONNECT_1()

        ACT_PLC1.ActSourceNetworkNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActSourceStationNumber = 2
        ACT_PLC1.ActNetworkNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActStationNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActCpuType = 211

        ACT_PLC1.ActHostAddress = Address_Connection_PLC1
        If ACT_PLC1.Open <> 0 Then
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False
        Else
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = True
        End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub Load_Main(ByVal str As String, Optional SimulationEnable As Integer = 0)
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Dim AdoConnect As ADODB.Connection

            If SimulationEnable > 0 Then
                Open_Common_MDB()
                AdoConnect = Mdb_Connect
            Else
                Connection_Open()
                AdoConnect = Sql_Connect
            End If

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & str & "'", AdoConnect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                S110_SLIDE_FWD = Trim(Rs.Fields("S110_SLIDE_FWD").Value)
                S110_SLIDE_BWD = Trim(Rs.Fields("S110_SLIDE_BWD").Value)
                S120_LENGTH = Trim(Rs.Fields("S120_LENGTH").Value)
            End If

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()

            If SimulationEnable > 0 Then
                Connection_Close_MDB()
            Else
                Connection_Close()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": Failed" & ", ErrorNumber:  " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)
        End Try
    End Sub

            OP_INR = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_INR").Value)
            OP_MOTOR_RH = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_MOTOR_RH").Value)
            OP_MOTOR_LH1 = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_MOTOR_LH1").Value)
            OP_MOTOR_LH2 = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_MOTOR_LH2").Value)
            OP_TILT_MOTOR = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_TILT_MOTOR").Value)
            OP_ACTUATOR = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_ACTUATOR").Value)
            OP_HANESS = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_HANESS").Value)

            End If
            'ECU_VERSION
            'HWA00SWA00
            If Trim(Rs.Fields("ECU_VERSION").Value) = "0" Then
                FLagEcuCHECK = False
            End If
            Try
                Tmp = Split(Trim(Rs.Fields("ECU_VERSION").Value), " ")
                OP_ECU_HARDWARE_VERSION = Tmp(0)
                OP_ECU_SOFTWARE_VERSION = Tmp(1)
                OP_ECU_PARTNO = OP_ECU

            If FLagEcuCHECK = False Then

                PANEL_DEC_ECU_SOFT_VERSION.Text = "NA"
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_PARTNO.Text = "NA"

                PANEL_DEC_ECU_SOFT_VERSION.BackColor = Color.Green
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_PARTNO.BackColor = Color.Green
            Else
                PANEL_TARGET_ECU_HARD_VERSION.Text = OP_ECU_HARDWARE_VERSION
                PANEL_TARGET_ECU_SOFT_VERSION.Text = OP_ECU_SOFTWARE_VERSION
                PANEL_TARGET_ECU_PARTNO.Text = OP_ECU_PARTNO
            End If


            Panel_PartNo.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value)
            Panel_PartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_script").Value)
            Panel_Position.Text = OP_LHRH & " " & OP_5P7P

            'LoadPicture(Picture_Main, OP_LHRH & " " & OP_PWRMNL)

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing

        If SimulationEnable > 0 Then

        Else

    Private Sub Init_Grid()

        With Grid1

            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .DrawMode = FlexCell.DrawModeEnum.OwnerDraw
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Cols = 3
            .Rows = 1
            .FixedRows = 2
            .FrozenBottomRows = 1

            .Column(1).Locked = True
            .Column(2).Locked = True

            For i As Integer = 1 To 2

                .Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            Next

            .Column(0).Width = 0
            .Column(1).Width = 220
            .Column(2).Width = 205

            .Cell(0, 1).Text = "품번"
            .Cell(0, 2).Text = "생산수량"

            .AutoRedraw = True

        End With

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_Grid()

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,PART_Count FROM Table_Part", Sql_Connect)

        Rs.MoveFirst()

        If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
        Else
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                If Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_Count").Value) = "0" Then
                Else
                    Grid1.AddItem(Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value) & Chr(9) &
                                  Trim(Rs.Fields("PART_COUNT").Value))
                End If
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()
        'MessageBox.Show("Load Grid OK")
    End Sub

    Private Sub Reset_Count()

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,PART_COUNT FROM Table_Part", Sql_Connect)

        Rs.MoveFirst()
        If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
        Else
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                Rs.Fields("PART_COUNT").Value = "0"
                Rs.Update()
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub
    Private Sub Save_Count()

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,PART_COUNT FROM Table_Part Where Part_No = '" & Panel_PartNo.Text & "'", Sql_Connect)
        If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
        Else
            tmp = CInt(Rs.Fields("PART_COUNT").Value)

            tmp = tmp + 1

            If tmp > 20000 Then tmp = 0

            Rs.Fields("PART_COUNT").Value = tmp

            Rs.Update()

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
        End If

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_DB(snStr As String, Optional SimulationEnable As Integer = 0)

                        "S150_START_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
                        "S150_START_TIME = '" & StartTime & "'," &
                        "S150_END_TIME = '" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "'," &
                        "S150_ZONE = '" & tmpZone & "'," &
                        "S150_ZONE2 = '" & "ZONE " & tmpZONESTring & "'," &
                        "S150_ZONE_DEC = '" & PANEL_DEC_ECU_ZONE.Text & "'," &
                        "S150_DECISION = '" & "OK" & "' " &
                        "WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & snStr & "'"

        AdoConnect.Execute(strSQL)
        Connection_Close()


    End Sub

    Private Sub ChangeWorkStep(ByVal dNew As Double)
        On Error GoTo ErrHandler

        If wStep = dNew Then Exit Sub

        RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", wStep is changed " & wStep.ToString() & " --> " & dNew.ToString())
        wStep = dNew

        Exit Sub
ErrHandler:
        RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", ErrorNumber: " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)

    End Sub

    Private Sub Check_DB()
        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main where SERIAL_NUMBER ='" & Panel_SN.Text & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Try
                Panel_S10_DEc.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S10_decision").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_S10_DEc.Text = "NG"
            End Try
            Try
                Panel_S20_DEC.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S20_decision").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_S20_DEC.Text = "NG"
            End Try

            Try
                Panel_S30_DEC.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S30_decision").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_S30_DEC.Text = "NG"
            End Try
            Try
                Panel_S40_DEC.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S40_decision").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_S40_DEC.Text = "NG"
            End Try
            Try
                Panel_S50_DEC.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S50_decision").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_S50_DEC.Text = "NG"
            End Try
            Try
                Panel_S60_DEC.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S60_decision").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_S60_DEC.Text = "NG"
            End Try
            Try
                Panel_S70_DEC.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S70_decision").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_S70_DEC.Text = "NG"
            End Try
            Try
                Panel_S80_DEC.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S80_decision").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_S80_DEC.Text = "NG"
            End Try
            Try
                Panel_S90_DEC.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S90_decision").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_S90_DEC.Text = "NG"
            End Try
            Try
                Panel_S100_DEC.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S100_decision").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_S100_DEC.Text = "NG"
            End Try
            Try
                Panel_S110_DEC.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S110_decision").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_S110_DEC.Text = "NG"
            End Try
            Try
                Panel_S120_DEC.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S120_decision").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_S120_DEC.Text = "NG"
            End Try
            Try
                Panel_S130_DEC.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S130_decision").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_S130_DEC.Text = "NA"
            End Try
            Panel_S130_DEC.Text = "NA"
            Try
                Panel_S140_DEC.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S140_decision").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_S140_DEC.Text = "NG"
            End Try
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub Check_Color()
        If Panel_S10_DEc.Text = "OK" Then
            Panel_S10_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
        ElseIf Panel_S10_DEc.Text = "NA" Then
            Panel_S10_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
