    Private Function Del_Space(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            If Mid(str, i, 1) = " " Then
            Else
                tmp = tmp & Mid(str, i, 1)
            End If
        Next

        tmp = tmp & Chr(13)
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub wALL_STOP()
        If Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "LH" Then
            Serial_CAN.Write("t4A580005050000000000" & Chr(13))
        ElseIf Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "RH" Then
            Serial_CAN.Write("t4A580050500000000000" & Chr(13))
        End If
    End Sub
    Private TimerCOunt As Double
    Private VerCheckCount As Integer
    Dim TmpStr As String
    Private TmrErrCount As Integer
    Private Sub Tmr_work_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work.Tick

        Label_STep.Text = wStep

        If wStep > 3.1 Then
            If PANEL_BUCKLE_ENERGIZATION.Text <> "NA" Then
                If OP_BUCKLE_ENERGIZATION = "1" Then
                    If PANEL_BUCKLE_ENERGIZATION.Text <> "OK" Then
                        If PLC_VALUE(16) = 1 Then
                            PANEL_BUCKLE_ENERGIZATION.Text = "OK"
                            PANEL_BUCKLE_ENERGIZATION.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            PANEL_BUCKLE_ENERGIZATION.Text = "NG"
                            PANEL_BUCKLE_ENERGIZATION.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            End If
        End If

        If Format(Now, "HHmmss") = "003000" Or Format(Now, "HHmmss") = "063000" Then
            Reset_Count()
            Init_Grid()
            Load_Grid()
        End If

        If (PLC_VALUE(ION_PALLETTE유_PASS) And BM_PALLETTE있음) = 0 Then
            TMr_Count = TMr_Count + 1
            If TMr_Count > 15 Then
                Init_Control()
                PLC_WRITE_1("D", "5250", "000000000")
                Panel_RF_UID.Text = ""
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ""
                TMP_RF_READ = ""
                TMP_RF_UID = ""
                ChangeWorkStep(0)
            End If
        Else
            TMr_Count = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If (PLC_VALUE(ION_PALLETTE유_PASS) And BM_PALLETTE있음) > 0 Then
                Panel_RF_UID.Text = ""
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ""
                TMP_RF_READ = ""
                TMP_RF_UID = ""
                Init_Control()
                ChangeWorkStep(1) '제품인
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then

            If Len(Panel_RF_UID.Text) = 16 And Len(Panel_RF_READ.Text) = 23 Then
                TMP_RF_READ = Panel_RF_READ.Text
                TMP_RF_UID = Panel_RF_UID.Text
            End If

            If Len(TMP_RF_UID) = 16 And Len(TMP_RF_READ) = 23 Then
                ChangeWorkStep(2)
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then

            Panel_SN.Text = TMP_RF_READ
            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11), gSimulationEnable)
            'Load_Color(Panel_SN.Text, Panel_Color, gSimulationEnable)
            Load_Main(Panel_SN.Text, gSimulationEnable)
            RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name &
                ", Work started, PartNo= " & Panel_PartNo.Text & ", Name= " & Panel_PartName.Text & ", SerialNum= " & Panel_SN.Text & ", PWR/MNL= " & OP_PWRMNL &
                ", LH/RH= " & OP_LHRH & ", Inner= " & OP_INR & ", Outer= " & OP_OTR & ", Outer= " & OP_OTR)
            PlayWave(Panel_PartNo.Text)
            ChangeWorkStep(3)

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING_1 = "000000000"
            If OP_PWRMNL = "PWR" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OP_PWRMNL = "MNL" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "2"
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_ZONE.Text = "NA"
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_ZONE.BackColor = Color.Green
            End If
            If OP_LHRH = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 4, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OP_LHRH = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If
            If OP_5P7P = "5P" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OP_5P7P = "7P" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "2"
            End If
            If OP_VENT = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 6, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 6, 1) = "2"
            End If
            If OP_BLOWER = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 7, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 7, 1) = "2"
            End If
            If OP_ECU = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 8, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 8, 1) = "2"
            End If
            If OP_BELT = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 9, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 9, 1) = "2"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상

            '전송
            PLC_WRITE_1("D", "5250", PLC_STRING_1)
            PLC_WRITE_1("D", "5262", "00")

            tmpZONESTring = ""
            ChangeWorkStep(3.1)

        ElseIf wStep = 3.1 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(3) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(ION_PALLETTE_UP) = 1 Then
                If Panel_PWRMNL.Text = "PWR" Then
                    STEP_ECU_EDUCATE = 0
                    EDU_COUNT = 0
                    PAnel_CAN.Text = "OK"
                    PAnel_CAN.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    PLC_WRITE_1("D", "5262", "10") '도킹 전진 사양
                    ChangeWorkStep(3.2)
                ElseIf Panel_PWRMNL.Text = "MNL" Then
                    If FLagEcuCHECK = True Then
                    End If
                    Panel_ECU_EDU_CHECK.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_ECU_EDU_CHECK.BackColor = Color.Green
                    'ChangeWorkStep(4.5)
                    ChangeWorkStep(100)
                End If

            Else
                ChangeWorkStep(3)
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.2 Then 'PWR

            If PAnel_CAN.Text = "OK" Then
                TimerCOunt = 0
                wStep = 3.21
            End If

        ElseIf wstep = 3.21 Then

            TimerCOunt = TimerCOunt + 0.1
            If TimerCOunt >= 2 Then wStep = 3.5

        ElseIf wStep = 3.5 Then

            FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COMP = False
            FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COMP = False
            FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COUNT = 0
            FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COUNT = 0
            FlagSendFoldingSignal = False
            CanStep = 2000
            wStep = 3.51

        ElseIf wStep = 3.51 Then

            If OP_PWRMNL = "MNL" Then
                wStep = 3.6
            Else
                If FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COMP = True Then
                    PANEL_F_FWD.Text = "OK"
                    PANEL_F_FWD.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    tCount = 0
                    wStep = 3.52
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.52 Then

            If Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "LH" Then
                Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space("t 732 8 04 31 03 12 A3 00 00 00") & Chr(13))
            ElseIf Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "RH" Then
                Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A3 00 00 00") & Chr(13))
            End If
            wStep = 3.521

        ElseIf wStep = 3.521 Then

            If Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "LH" Then
                Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space("t 732 8 05 31 01 12 A3 F0 00 00") & Chr(13))
            ElseIf Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "RH" Then
                Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A3 F0 00 00") & Chr(13))
            End If
            wStep = 3.53

        ElseIf wStep = 3.53 Then

            If STEP_ECU_EDUCATE = 1 Then
                Panel_ECU_EDU_CHECK.Text = "OK"
                Panel_ECU_EDU_CHECK.BackColor = Color.Blue
                wStep = 3.6
            Else
                wStep = 3.52
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.6 Then

            If FLagEcuCHECK = True Then
                ChangeWorkStep(3.7)
            Else
                wStep = 3.79
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.7 Then 'ECU 소프트웨어 버젼 확인

            LoadVerInfo(OptionCarType, OP_PWRMNL, OP_LHRH)
            VerCheckCount = 0
            TmpReadData1 = ""
            TmpReadData2 = ""
            TmpReadData3 = ""
            TextBox1.Text = ""
            wStep = 1000

        ElseIf wStep = 1000 Then 'SW

            If OPTION_ECU_CHECK = True Then
                Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space(SWsendMsg) & Chr(13))
            ElseIf OPTION_ECU_CHECK = False Then
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_SOFT_VERSION.Text = "NA"
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_SOFT_VERSION.BackColor = Color.Green
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_HARD_VERSION.Text = "NA"
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_HARD_VERSION.BackColor = Color.Green
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_PARTNO.Text = "NA"
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_PARTNO.BackColor = Color.Green
                Can_Count = 0
                wStep = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1001 Then 'SW DECISION

            If PANEL_ECU_SOFT_VERSION.Text = PANEL_TARGET_ECU_SOFT_VERSION.Text Then
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_SOFT_VERSION.Text = "OK"
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_SOFT_VERSION.BackColor = Color.Blue
                VerCheckCount = 0
                wStep = 1010
            Else
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_SOFT_VERSION.Text = "NG"
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_SOFT_VERSION.BackColor = Color.Red
                VerCheckCount = VerCheckCount + 1
                If VerCheckCount > 10 Then
                    VerCheckCount = 0
                    wStep = 1010
                Else
                    wStep = 1000
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1010 Then 'HW

            Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space(HWsendMsg) & Chr(13))

        ElseIf wStep = 1011 Then 'HW DECISION

            If PANEL_ECU_HARD_VERSION.Text = PANEL_TARGET_ECU_HARD_VERSION.Text Then
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_HARD_VERSION.Text = "OK"
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_HARD_VERSION.BackColor = Color.Blue
                VerCheckCount = 0
                wStep = 1020
            Else
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_HARD_VERSION.Text = "NG"
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_HARD_VERSION.BackColor = Color.Red
                VerCheckCount = VerCheckCount + 1
                If VerCheckCount > 10 Then
                    VerCheckCount = 1020
                Else
                    wStep = 1010
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1020 Then ' ECU PART FIRST

            Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space(PARTsendMsg) & Chr(13))

        ElseIf wStep = 1030 Then ' ECU PART SECOND

            TmpStr = "t" & Mid(PARTsendMsg, 2, 3) & "8 30 08 14 00 00 00 00 00"
            Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space(TmpStr & Chr(13)))
            TmrErrCount = TmrErrCount + 1
            If TmrErrCount > 5 Then wStep = 1020

        ElseIf wStep = 1040 Then ' ECU PART THIRD

            TmpStr = "t" & Mid(PARTsendMsg, 2, 3) & "8 30 08 14 00 00 00 00 00"
            Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space(TmpStr & Chr(13)))
            TmrErrCount = TmrErrCount + 1
            If TmrErrCount > 5 Then wStep = 1020

        ElseIf wStep = 1050 Then

            Try
                Dim tmpGetPartNo As String
                If OptionCarType = "PE" Then
                    tmpGetPartNo = Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData1, 16, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData1, 18, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData1, 20, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData2, 8, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData2, 10, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData2, 12, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData2, 14, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData2, 16, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData2, 18, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData2, 20, 2))
                Else
                    tmpGetPartNo = Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData1, 16, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData1, 18, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData1, 20, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData2, 8, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData2, 10, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData2, 12, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData2, 14, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData2, 16, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData2, 18, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData2, 20, 2)) &
                                        Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpReadData3, 8, 2))
                End If
                PANEL_ECU_PARTNO.Text = Replace(tmpGetPartNo, "-", "")
                wStep = 1060
            Catch ex As Exception
                TmpReadData1 = ""
                TmpReadData2 = ""
                TmpReadData3 = ""
                wStep = 1020
            End Try

        ElseIf wStep = 1060 Then

            If PANEL_ECU_PARTNO.Text = PANEL_TARGET_ECU_PARTNO.Text Then
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_PARTNO.Text = "OK"
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_PARTNO.BackColor = Color.Blue
                VerCheckCount = 0
                wStep = 4
            Else
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_PARTNO.Text = "NG"
                PANEL_DEC_ECU_PARTNO.BackColor = Color.Red
                VerCheckCount = VerCheckCount + 1
                If VerCheckCount > 10 Then
                    wStep = 4
                Else
                    wStep = 1020
                End If
            End If
            TmpReadData1 = ""
            TmpReadData2 = ""
            TmpReadData3 = ""

        ElseIf wStep = 3.79 Then

            Tmr_Work.Interval = 100
            wStep = 4

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then

            If OP_PWRMNL = "PWR" Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("D", "5251", "1") '1차 완료
                PAnel_CAN.Text = ""
                PAnel_CAN.BackColor = Color.White
                tCount = 0
                wStep = 4.01
            Else
                wStep = 4.41
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.01 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(17) = 1 Then
                PAnel_CAN.Text = ""
                PAnel_CAN.BackColor = Color.White
                wStep = 4.02
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.02 Then

            If PAnel_CAN.Text = "OK" Then
                wStep = 4.03
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.03 Then

        ElseIf wStep = 4.05 Then

            Can_Count = 0
            wStep = 4.1

        ElseIf wStep = 4.1 Then

            Can_Count = Can_Count + 0.1
            If Can_Count > 1 Then
                ChangeWorkStep(4.11)
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.11 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(2) = 1 Then
                ChangeWorkStep(4.41)
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.41 Then

            If OP_5P7P = "5P" And OP_LHRH = "RH" And OP_SLIDE = "1" Then
                wStep = 4.42
            Else
                wStep = 4.5
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.42 Then

            S_COUNT = 0
            wStep = 4.421

        ElseIf wStep = 4.421 Then

            'If CurrentProgressTimeStamp = 0 Then
            'CurrentProgressTimeStamp = GetTickCount()
            'Else
            '(GetTickCount() - CurrentProgressTimeStamp) > 30000 Then
            'CurrentProgressTimeStamp = 0
            S_COUNT = S_COUNT + 0.1
            If S_COUNT >= 1 Then
                wALL_STOP()
                wStep = 4.422
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.422 Then

            If CDbl(SLIDE_FWD_TIME) = 0 Then
                wStep = 4.44
            Else
                S_COUNT = 0
                wSLIDE_FWD()
                wStep = 4.43
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.43 Then

            S_COUNT = S_COUNT + 0.1
            If S_COUNT >= CDbl(SLIDE_FWD_TIME) Then
                wSLIDE_FWD_STOP()
                wStep = 4.44
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.44 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(15) = 1 Then
                wStep = 4.441
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.441 Then

            wALL_STOP()
            wStep = 4.45

        ElseIf wStep = 4.45 Then

            If CDbl(SLIDE_BWD_TIME) = 0 Then
                wStep = 4.47
            Else
                S_COUNT = 0
                wSLIDE_BWD()
                wStep = 4.46
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.46 Then

            S_COUNT = S_COUNT + 0.1
            If S_COUNT >= CDbl(SLIDE_BWD_TIME) Then
                wSLIDE_BWD_STOP()
                wStep = 4.47
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.47 Then

            PLC_WRITE_1("D", "5262", "11")
            wStep = 4.5

        ElseIf wStep = 4.5 Then

            'Check_Decision(Panel_SN.Text, gSimulationEnable)
            Check_DB()
            Check_Decision()
            Check_Color()
            wStep = 4.51

        ElseIf wStep = 4.51 Then

            If PANEL_BUCKLE_ENERGIZATION.Text = "OK" Or PANEL_BUCKLE_ENERGIZATION.Text = "NA" Then
                Load_Barcode_Data()
                Save_DB(Panel_SN.Text, gSimulationEnable)
                Save_Count()
                Init_Grid()
                Load_Grid()
                Load_BarcodeInfo()
                PAnel_End_Barcode.Text = Create_End_Barcode()

                LoadColorCombination()

                If OptionPrintBarCode Or Panel_Total_DEC.Text = "OK" Then
                    If (PANEL_DEC_ECU_SOFT_VERSION.Text = "OK" Or PANEL_DEC_ECU_SOFT_VERSION.Text = "NA") And
                            (PANEL_DEC_ECU_HARD_VERSION.Text = "OK" Or PANEL_DEC_ECU_HARD_VERSION.Text = "NA") And
                            (PANEL_DEC_ECU_PARTNO.Text = "OK" Or PANEL_DEC_ECU_PARTNO.Text = "NA") And
                            (PANEL_DEC_ECU_ZONE.Text = "OK" Or PANEL_DEC_ECU_ZONE.Text = "NA") Then
                        LoadColorCombination()
                        BarCode_Print(Create_End_Barcode, Panel_PartNo.Text, Panel_Color.Text)
                    End If
                Else
                    LoadColorCombination()
                    BarCode_Print(Create_End_Barcode, Panel_PartNo.Text, Panel_Color.Text)
                End If
                Write_Tag("00")
                ChangeWorkStep(9)
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then 'SEND PLC COMPLETE

            PLC_WRITE_1("D", "5251", "1")
            ChangeWorkStep(9.1)

        ElseIf wStep = 9.1 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(4) = 1 Then
                ChangeWorkStep(10)
            Else
                ChangeWorkStep(9)
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then

            PLC_WRITE_1("D", "5262", "11")

            If (PLC_VALUE(ION_PALLETTE유_PASS) And BM_PALLETTE있음) = 0 And PLC_VALUE(ION_PALLETTE_UP) = 0 Then
                Panel_RF_UID.Text = ""
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ""
                PLC_WRITE_1("D", "5250", "000000000")
                ChangeWorkStep(11)
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then

            Init_Control()
            ChangeWorkStep(0)

        ElseIf wStep = 100 Then 'MNL 사양

            If FLagEcuCHECK = False Then
                wStep = 4.5
            Else
                wStep = 3.7
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function Create_End_Barcode() As String

        Dim SAB_STRING As String = ""
        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"
        Dim TMP As String = ""
        Dim _4M_1 As String
        Dim _4M_2 As String = ""
        Dim _4M_3 As String
        Dim _4M_4 As String
        Dim _4M_CODE As String

        Dim TMp1() As String
        Dim TMp2() As String
        Dim TMp3() As String
        Dim TMp4() As String
        Dim TMp5() As String
        Dim TmpStr1 As String
        Dim TmpStr2 As String
        Dim TmpStr3 As String
        Dim TmpStr4 As String
        Dim TmpStr5 As String

        Dim END_ECU_SERIAL As String
        Dim END_BUCKLE1_SERIAL As String
        Dim END_BUCKLE2_SERIAL As String
        Dim END_BLOWER_SERIAL As String
        Dim END_BACKFRAME_SERIAL As String

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim sabIndex As Integer
        Dim FRTbuckleIndex As Integer

        BARCODE_DOT_SIZE = PUB_BARCODE_DOT

        'tmp = Format(Now, "yyMMdd") & Format(1, "0000") & J_PART_NAME.Text
        '0600 - 1530 주간
        '그외 ~ 야간

        'yyyy mm dd 0000 88888-00000

        _4M_1 = "A"
        If Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "LH" Then
            _4M_2 = "L"
        ElseIf Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "RH" Then
            _4M_2 = "R"
        End If

        If CInt(Format(Now, "HHmm")) >= 800 And CInt(Format(Now, "HHmm")) <= 1530 Then
            _4M_3 = "A"
        Else
            _4M_3 = "B"
        End If
        _4M_4 = "1"
        _4M_CODE = _4M_1 & _4M_2 & _4M_3 & _4M_4

        TMP =
                        "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS &
                        "V" & "PB30" & GS &
                        "P" & Mid(Panel_PartNo.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(Panel_PartNo.Text, 7, 5) & Panel_Color.Text & GS &
                        "S" & "" & GS &
                        "E" & "" & GS &
                        "T" & Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 3, 6) & _4M_CODE & "A" & "000" & Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 9, 4) & GS &
                        "M" & "" & GS &
                        "C" & "" & GS &
                    RS & EOT

        'Return TMP

        If S20_ECU_BARCODE = "NULL" Or S20_ECU_BARCODE = "NA" Or S20_ECU_BARCODE = "PASS" Then
            END_ECU_SERIAL = ""
        Else
            TMp1 = Split(S20_ECU_BARCODE, Chr(29))
            For i = 1 To UBound(TMp1) - 1
                If i < UBound(TMp1) - 1 Then
                    TmpStr1 = TmpStr1 & TMp1(i) & GS
                Else
                    TmpStr1 = TmpStr1 & TMp1(i) & GS
                End If
            Next
            END_ECU_SERIAL = "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & TmpStr1 & RS & EOT
            TMP = TMP & END_ECU_SERIAL
            BARCODE_DOT_SIZE = BARCODE_DOT_SIZE - 1
        End If

        If S30_BELT1_BARCODE = "NULL" Or S30_BELT1_BARCODE = "NA" Or S30_BELT1_BARCODE = "PASS" Then
            END_BUCKLE1_SERIAL = ""
        Else
            TMp2 = Split(S30_BELT1_BARCODE, Chr(29))
            For i = 1 To UBound(TMp2) - 1
                If i < UBound(TMp2) - 1 Then
                    TmpStr2 = TmpStr2 & TMp2(i) & GS
                Else
                    TmpStr2 = TmpStr2 & TMp2(i) & GS
                End If
            Next
            END_BUCKLE1_SERIAL = "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & TmpStr2 & RS & EOT
            TMP = TMP & END_BUCKLE1_SERIAL
        End If

        If S30_BELT2_BARCODE = "NULL" Or S30_BELT2_BARCODE = "NA" Or S30_BELT2_BARCODE = "PASS" Then
            END_BUCKLE2_SERIAL = ""
        Else
            TMp3 = Split(S30_BELT2_BARCODE, Chr(29))
            For i = 1 To UBound(TMp3) - 1
                If i < UBound(TMp3) - 1 Then
                    TmpStr3 = TmpStr3 & TMp3(i) & GS
                Else
                    TmpStr3 = TmpStr3 & TMp3(i) & GS
                End If
            Next
            END_BUCKLE2_SERIAL = "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & TmpStr3 & RS & EOT
            TMP = TMP & END_BUCKLE2_SERIAL
            'BARCODE_DOT_SIZE = BARCODE_DOT_SIZE - 1
        End If

        Try

            If S40_BACKFRAME_BARCODE = "NULL" Or S40_BACKFRAME_BARCODE = "NA" Or S40_BACKFRAME_BARCODE = "PASS" Then
                END_BACKFRAME_SERIAL = ""
            Else

                TMp5 = Split(S40_BACKFRAME_BARCODE, Chr(29))                        '20191231005989600-T6180

                For i = 0 To UBound(TMp5)
                    If TMp5(i).ToString.Contains("SDVV") Then
                        sabIndex = i
                    ElseIf TMp5(i).ToString.Contains("P511") Then
                        FRTbuckleIndex = i
                    End If
                Next

                TmpStr5 = TMp5(sabIndex) & GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 1) & GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 2) & GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 3) & GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 4) &
                    GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 5) & GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 6) & GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 7) & GS

                If OP_LHRH = "RH" Then

                    END_BACKFRAME_SERIAL = "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & TMp5(sabIndex) &
                    GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 1) &
                    GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 2) &
                    GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 3) &
                    GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 4) &
                    GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 5) &
                    GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 6) &
                    GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 7) & GS & RS & EOT
                    TMP = TMP & END_BACKFRAME_SERIAL
                    BARCODE_DOT_SIZE = BARCODE_DOT_SIZE - 1

                Else

                    END_BACKFRAME_SERIAL = "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & TMp5(sabIndex) &
                    GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 1) &
                    GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 2) &
                    GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 3) &
                    GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 4) &
                    GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 5) &
                    GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 6) &
                    GS & TMp5(sabIndex + 7) & GS & RS & EOT &
                     "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & TMp5(FRTbuckleIndex) &
                    GS & TMp5(FRTbuckleIndex + 1) &
                    GS & TMp5(FRTbuckleIndex + 2) & GS & RS & EOT

                    TMP = TMP & END_BACKFRAME_SERIAL
                    BARCODE_DOT_SIZE = BARCODE_DOT_SIZE - 1

                End If

            End If


        Catch ex As Exception

            END_BACKFRAME_SERIAL = ""

        End Try

        'If END_ECU_SERIAL = "" And END_BUCKLE1_SERIAL <> "" And END_BUCKLE2_SERIAL = "" And END_BLOWER_SERIAL = "" And END_BACKFRAME_SERIAL = "" Then
        '    BARCODE_DOT_SIZE = 6
        'End If
        If END_ECU_SERIAL = "" And END_BUCKLE1_SERIAL <> "" And END_BUCKLE2_SERIAL = "" And END_BACKFRAME_SERIAL = "" Then
            BARCODE_DOT_SIZE = 6
        End If
        'TMP = TMP & END_ECU_SERIAL & END_BUCKLE1_SERIAL & END_BUCKLE2_SERIAL & END_BLOWER_SERIAL

        Return TMP

    End Function

    Private Sub wSLIDE_FWD()

        If Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "LH" Then
            Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space("t 487 8 00 00 00 20 00 00 00 00"))
        ElseIf Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "RH" Then

    Private TmpINR As String
    Private tmpOTR As String

    Private Sub LoadColorCombination()

        'CARTYPE3 "NORMAL" /  "PE"
        'OP_5P7P "4P" " 6P" "5P" "7P"

        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        If OP_5P7P = "4P" Then
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TABLE_COLOR_COMBINATION WHERE DSC_COLOR = '" & Panel_Color.Text & "' AND CARTYPE3 = '" & OP_LHRH & "' AND CARTYPE1 = '" & OptionCarType & "' AND CARTYPE2 = '_4P_6P'", Sql_Connect)
        ElseIf OP_5P7P = "5P" Then
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TABLE_COLOR_COMBINATION WHERE DSC_COLOR = '" & Panel_Color.Text & "' AND CARTYPE3 = '" & OP_LHRH & "' AND CARTYPE1 = '" & OptionCarType & "' AND CARTYPE2 = '_5P_7P'", Sql_Connect)
        ElseIf OP_5P7P = "6P" Then
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TABLE_COLOR_COMBINATION WHERE DSC_COLOR = '" & Panel_Color.Text & "' AND CARTYPE3 = '" & OP_LHRH & "' AND CARTYPE1 = '" & OptionCarType & "' AND CARTYPE2 = '_4P_6P'", Sql_Connect)
        ElseIf OP_5P7P = "7P" Then
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TABLE_COLOR_COMBINATION WHERE DSC_COLOR = '" & Panel_Color.Text & "' AND CARTYPE3 = '" & OP_LHRH & "' AND CARTYPE1 = '" & OptionCarType & "' AND CARTYPE2 = '_5P_7P'", Sql_Connect)
        End If

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            tmpinr = Trim(Rs.Fields("INJECT").Value)
            tmpOTR = Trim(Rs.Fields("INJECT2").Value)
        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount > 1 Then
            Rs.MoveFirst()
            TmpINR = Trim(Rs.Fields("INJECT").Value)
            tmpOTR = Trim(Rs.Fields("INJECT2").Value)
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub BarCode_Print(strSerial As String, strPartno As String, tmpColorCode As String)

        If OptionPrintBarCode = True Then

            'If Panel_S80_DEC.Text = "NG" Or Panel_S110_DEC.Text = "NG" Or Panel_S120_DEC.Text = "NG" Or Panel_S130_DEC.Text = "NG" Or Panel_S140_DEC.Text = "NG" Then
            If (Panel_S10_DEc.Text = "OK" Or Panel_S10_DEc.Text = "NA") And
                        (Panel_S20_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_S20_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_S20_DEC.Text = "PASS") And
                        (Panel_S30_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_S30_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_S30_DEC.Text = "PASS") And
                        (Panel_S40_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_S40_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_S40_DEC.Text = "PASS") And
                        (Panel_S50_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_S50_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_S50_DEC.Text = "PASS") And
                        (Panel_S60_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_S60_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_S60_DEC.Text = "PASS") And
                        (Panel_S70_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_S70_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_S70_DEC.Text = "PASS") And
                        (Panel_S80_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_S80_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_S80_DEC.Text = "PASS") And
                        (Panel_S90_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_S90_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_S90_DEC.Text = "PASS") And
                        (Panel_S100_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_S100_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_S100_DEC.Text = "PASS") And
                        (Panel_S110_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_S110_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_S110_DEC.Text = "PASS") And
                        (Panel_S120_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_S120_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_S120_DEC.Text = "PASS") And
                        (Panel_S130_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_S130_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_S130_DEC.Text = "PASS") And
                        (Panel_S140_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_S140_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_S140_DEC.Text = "PASS") Then
                Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
                Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,30^BY5^BXN," & CStr(BARCODE_DOT_SIZE) & ",200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")
                If CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) > 630 And CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) < 1530 Then 'AM
                    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO340,40^A0N,55,55^FD" & Panel_PartNo.Text & " " & Panel_Color.Text & "  " & "JX1 AM ^FS")
                Else 'PM
                    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO340,40^A0N,55,55^FD" & Panel_PartNo.Text & " " & Panel_Color.Text & "  " & "JX1 PM ^FS")
                End If
                Serial_Printer.Write("^FO340,100^A0N,34,18^FD" & Panel_PartName.Text & "^FS")
                Serial_Printer.Write("^FO340,140^A0N,34,30^FD" & Panel_SN.Text & "^FS")
                Serial_Printer.Write("^FO340,180^A0N,34,30^FD" & "FWD:" & S110_SLIDE_FWD.ToString & " " & "BWD:" & S110_SLIDE_BWD.ToString & " " & "LENGTH:" & S120_LENGTH.ToString & "      DSC" & "^ FS")

                If OptionCarType = "PE" Then
                    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO700,120^A0N,160,220^FD" & "PE" & "^FS")
                End If

            Else
                Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
                Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,30^BY5^BXN," & CStr(BARCODE_DOT_SIZE) & ",200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")
                If CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) > 630 And CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) < 1530 Then 'AM
                    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO340,40^A0N,55,55^FD" & Panel_PartNo.Text & " " & Panel_Color.Text & "  " & "JX1 AM ^FS")
                Else 'PM
                    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO340,40^A0N,55,55^FD" & Panel_PartNo.Text & " " & Panel_Color.Text & "  " & "JX1 PM ^FS")
                End If
                Serial_Printer.Write("^FO340,100^A0N,34,18^FD" & Panel_PartName.Text & "^FS")
                Serial_Printer.Write("^FO340,140^A0N,34,30^FD" & Panel_SN.Text & "^FS")
                Serial_Printer.Write("^FO340,180^A0N,34,30^FD" & "FWD:" & S110_SLIDE_FWD.ToString & " " & "BWD:" & S110_SLIDE_BWD.ToString & " " & "LENGTH:" & S120_LENGTH.ToString & "      DSC" & "^ FS")

                Serial_Printer.Write("^FO700,120^A0N,160,160^FD" & "NG" & "^FS")

            End If

        Else

            Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,30^BY5^BXN," & CStr(BARCODE_DOT_SIZE) & ",200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")
            If CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) > 630 And CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) < 1530 Then 'AM
                Serial_Printer.Write("^FO340,40^A0N,55,55^FD" & Panel_PartNo.Text & " " & Panel_Color.Text & "  " & "JX1 AM ^FS")
            Else 'PM
                Serial_Printer.Write("^FO340,40^A0N,55,55^FD" & Panel_PartNo.Text & " " & Panel_Color.Text & "  " & "JX1 PM ^FS")
            End If
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO340,100^A0N,34,18^FD" & Panel_PartName.Text & "^FS")
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO340,140^A0N,34,30^FD" & Panel_SN.Text & "^FS")
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO340,180^A0N,34,30^FD" & "FWD:" & S110_SLIDE_FWD.ToString & " " & "BWD:" & S110_SLIDE_BWD.ToString & " " & "LENGTH:" & S120_LENGTH.ToString & "      DSC" & "^ FS")

            If OptionCarType = "PE" Then
                Serial_Printer.Write("^FO700,120^A0N,160,220^FD" & "PE" & "^FS")
            End If

        End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO340,220^A0N,34,30^FD" & "INR:" & TmpINR & " " & "OTR: " & tmpOTR & "ZONE " & tmpZONESTring & "^ FS")

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_RFID_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_RFID.Tick

        If wStep <> 6 Then

            If rStep = 0 Then

                Read_Inventorty()
                rStep = 1

            ElseIf rStep = 1 Then

                If Len(Panel_RF_UID.Text) = 16 Then
                    rStep = 2
                Else
                    rStep = 0
                End If

            ElseIf rStep = 2 Then

                If Connect_Tag(Panel_RF_UID.Text) = True Then
                    Read_Tag()
                    rStep = 3
                Else
                    rStep = 0
                End If

            ElseIf rStep = 3 Then

                If Panel_RF_READ.Text = "READ ERROR" Then
                    Panel_RF_UID.Text = ""
                    rStep = 0
                Else
                    rStep = 2
                End If

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_CAN_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_CAN.Tick

        If Serial_CAN.IsOpen = True Then

            If CanStep >= 2000 Then

                If CanStep = 2000 Then 'FOLDING

                    Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space("t 418 8 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00") & Chr(13))
                    CanStep = 2000.1

                ElseIf CanStep = 2000.1 Then

                    Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space("t 418 8 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00") & Chr(13))
                    CanStep = 2000.2

                ElseIf CanStep = 2000.2 Then

                    Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space("t 418 8 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00") & Chr(13))
                    CanStep = 2000.3

                ElseIf CanStep = 2000.3 Then

                    If FlagSendFoldingSignal = True Then
                        CanStep = 2000.2
                    Else
                        CanStep = 2002
                    End If

                ElseIf CanStep = 2001 Then
                    CanStep = 2000
                ElseIf CanStep = 2002 Then
                    If Panel_Position.Text.Contains("LH") = True Then
                        Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space("t 4A5 8 02 00 00 00 00 00 00 00") & Chr(13)) '폴딩 세팅 'LH
                    ElseIf Panel_Position.Text.Contains("RH") = True Then
                        Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space("t 4A5 8 20 00 00 00 00 00 00 00") & Chr(13)) '폴딩 세팅 'RH
                    End If
                    CanStep = 2003
                ElseIf CanStep = 2003 Then
                    If Panel_Position.Text.Contains("LH") = True Then
                        Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space("t 4A5 8 08 00 00 00 00 00 00 00") & Chr(13)) '폴딩 동작 'LH
                    ElseIf Panel_Position.Text.Contains("RH") = True Then
                        Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space("t 4A5 8 80 00 00 00 00 00 00 00") & Chr(13)) '폴딩 동작 'RH
                    End If
                    FlagSendFoldingSignal = True
                    CanStep = 2000.2
                End If

            Else

                If btnWorkIn.BackColor = Color.Black And chkTypeRH.CheckState = CheckState.Checked Then
                    If CanStep = 0 Then
                        If OptionCarType = "NORMAL" Then
                            If Serial_CAN.IsOpen() = True Then Serial_CAN.Write("t3E080000000040030000" & Chr(13))
                        Else
                            If Serial_CAN.IsOpen() = True Then Serial_CAN.Write("t3E080000000050030000" & Chr(13)) 'PE
                        End If
                        CanStep = 1
                    ElseIf CanStep = 1 Then
                        If OptionCarType = "NORMAL" Then
                            If Serial_CAN.IsOpen() = True Then Serial_CAN.Write("t04180000000000000000" & Chr(13))
                        Else
                            If Serial_CAN.IsOpen() = True Then Serial_CAN.Write("t41880000000008000000" & Chr(13))
                        End If
                        CanStep = 2
                    ElseIf CanStep = 2 Then
                        If Serial_CAN.IsOpen() = True Then Serial_CAN.Write("t41180000000000000001" & Chr(13))
                        CanStep = 0
                    End If
                ElseIf btnWorkIn.BackColor = Color.Black And chkTypeLH.CheckState = CheckState.Checked Then
                    If CanStep = 0 Then
                        If OptionCarType = "NORMAL" Then
                            If Serial_CAN.IsOpen() = True Then Serial_CAN.Write("t3E080000000040030000" & Chr(13))
                        Else
                            If Serial_CAN.IsOpen() = True Then Serial_CAN.Write("t3E080000000050030000" & Chr(13)) 'PE
                        End If
                        CanStep = 1
                    ElseIf CanStep = 1 Then
                        If OptionCarType = "NORMAL" Then
                            If Serial_CAN.IsOpen() = True Then Serial_CAN.Write("t04180000000000000000" & Chr(13))
                        Else
                            If Serial_CAN.IsOpen() = True Then Serial_CAN.Write("t41880000000008000000" & Chr(13))
                        End If
                        CanStep = 2
                    ElseIf CanStep = 2 Then
                        If Serial_CAN.IsOpen() = True Then Serial_CAN.Write("t41180000000000001000" & Chr(13))
                        CanStep = 0
                    End If
                End If

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Function StrPtr(ByVal x As String) As Integer
        Return VarPtr(x)
    End Function

    Private Function VarPtr(ByVal obj As Object) As Integer
        ' Obtain a pinned handle to the object
        Dim handle As GCHandle = GCHandle.Alloc(obj, GCHandleType.Pinned)
        Dim pointer As Integer = handle.AddrOfPinnedObject.ToInt32

        ' Free the allocated handle. At this point the GC can move the object in memory, this is 
        ' why this function does not exist in .NET. If you were to use this pointer as a destination 
        ' for memcopy for example, you could overwrite unintended memory, which would crash the 
        ' application or cause unexpected behavior. For this function to work you would need to
        ' maintain the handle until after you are finished using it.
        handle.Free()

        Return pointer
    End Function

    Sub SerialOpen_RFID()

        Dim Rtn As Integer
        Dim ConnStr As String

        ConnStr = "RDType=M201;CommType=COM;COMName=" & PortNumber_RFID & ";BaudRate=38400;Frame=8E1"

        'UPGRADE_ISSUE: StrPtr 함수는 지원되지 않습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="367764E5-F3F8-4E44-AC3E-7FE0B5E074E2"'
        Rtn = RDR_Open(StrPtr(ConnStr), hReader) 'try to open usb hid communication, and save reader handle to hReader(global variable)
        If Rtn <> 0 Then
            RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": Open Fail for RFID" & ", ErrorNumber:  " & Rtn.ToString())
            If gSimulationEnable <> 1 Then MsgBox("RFID Open Fail: " & Rtn)
        Else
            RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": " & PortNumber_RFID & " is open for RFID")
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub SerialClose_RFID()

        RDR_Close(hReader) 'Close
        hReader = 0 'set reader handle to NULL

    End Sub

    Private Function Connect_Tag(ByVal strUid As String) As Boolean

        Dim iret As Integer
        Dim uid() As Byte
        Dim Flag As Boolean = False

        Try

            If strUid = "" Then
                'MsgBox("input UID please")
            Else
                uid = HexToBytes((strUid))
                iret = ISO15693_Connect(hReader, 1, 1, uid(0), hTag)
                If iret <> 0 Then
                    Flag = False
                Else
                    Flag = True
                End If

            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Return Flag

    End Function

    Private Sub Read_Tag()

        Dim iret As Integer
        Dim nBlkRead As Integer
        Dim buffer(64) As Byte
        Dim bufSize As Integer
        Dim nByteRead As Integer
        Dim blokStr As String
        Dim blockStart As Integer
        Dim blockCnt As Integer

        Try

            nByteRead = nBlkRead = 0
            bufSize = UBound(buffer) + 1
            blockStart = "0"
            blockCnt = "6"
            iret = ISO15693_ReadMultiBlocks(hReader, hTag, 0, blockStart, blockCnt, nBlkRead, buffer(0), bufSize, nByteRead)
            If iret = 0 Then
                blokStr = BytesToHex(buffer, nByteRead)
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ASC2STR(blokStr)
            Else
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = "READ ERROR"
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            Panel_RF_READ.Text = "READ ERROR"
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Read_Inventorty()

        Dim Rtn As Integer
        Dim ByteUid(7) As Byte
        Dim dnhReport As Integer
        Dim dsfid As Byte
        Dim AIPtype As Integer
        Dim AntId As Integer
        'Dim uid(8) As Byte
        Dim suid As String

        Try

            Rtn = RDR_TagInventory(hReader, 1, 0, 0, 0) 'send inventory command to reader and save tag report at the buffer
            If Rtn = 0 Then
                'inventory ok ,then get tag report from buffer

                dnhReport = RDR_GetTagDataReport(hReader, 1) 'get first report
                Do While dnhReport <> 0
                    Rtn = ISO15693_ParseTagDataReport(dnhReport, AIPtype, AntId, AntId, dsfid, ByteUid(0))
                    If Rtn = 0 Then
                        suid = ""
                        suid = BytesToHex(ByteUid, 8)
                        Panel_RF_UID.Text = suid
                    End If

                    dnhReport = RDR_GetTagDataReport(hReader, 2) 'get next report
                Loop
            Else

            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

    End Sub


    Private Sub Write_Tag(ByVal strData As String)

        Dim iret As Integer
        Dim startBlk As Integer
        Dim BlkNum As Integer
        Dim blkDataBuff() As Byte
        Dim nSize As Integer
        Dim strTmp As String = ""

        Try

            startBlk = "0"
            BlkNum = "6"

            blkDataBuff = HexToBytes(STR2ASC(strData))

            nSize = UBound(blkDataBuff) + 1
            iret = ISO15693_WriteMultipleBlocks(hReader, hTag, startBlk, BlkNum, blkDataBuff(0), nSize)
            If iret = 0 Then
                'MsgBox("write ok")
            Else
                'MsgBox("write fail")
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

    End Sub

    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_Printer.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Printer.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Printer.PortName = PortNumber_PRINTER
            Serial_Printer.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Printer.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Printer.Open()
            RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & " COM Port " & Serial_Printer.PortName & " is open for Printer")
        Catch ex As Exception
            RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": Open Fail for Printer" & ", ErrorNumber:  " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)
            If gSimulationEnable <> 1 Then MsgBox("Serial Open Fail " & PortNumber_PRINTER)
        End Try

        Try

            If Serial_CAN.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_CAN.Close()
            End If
            Serial_CAN.PortName = PortNumber_CAN
            Serial_CAN.BaudRate = 115200
            Serial_CAN.DataBits = 8
            Serial_CAN.Open()
            RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & " COM Port " & Serial_CAN.PortName & " is open for CAN")

        Catch ex As Exception
            RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": Open Fail for CAN" & ", ErrorNumber:  " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)
            If gSimulationEnable <> 1 Then MsgBox("Serial Open Fail " & PortNumber_CAN)

        End Try


    End Sub

    Private SWsendMsg As String
    Private SWrecvMSg As String
    Private HWsendMsg As String
    Private HWrecvMSg As String
    Private PARTsendMsg As String
    Private PARTsendMsg_reTry As String
    Private PARTrecvMSg As String
    Private Sub LoadVerInfo(CarType As String, ReclType As String, Pos As String)

        Connection_Open_MDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_EcuCheck WHERE OptionType = '" & CarType & "' AND OptionPosition = '" & Pos & "' AND OptionRecl = '" & ReclType & "'", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            SWsendMsg = Trim(Rs.Fields("SWsendCode").Value)
            SWrecvMSg = Trim(Rs.Fields("SWrecvCode").Value)
            HWsendMsg = Trim(Rs.Fields("HWsendCode").Value)
            HWrecvMSg = Trim(Rs.Fields("HWrecvCode").Value)
            PARTsendMsg = Trim(Rs.Fields("PARTsendCode").Value)
            PARTrecvMSg = Trim(Rs.Fields("PARTrecvCode").Value)

        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub


    Private Function BitMask(Str As String) As Integer

        '16 진수 -> 2 진수로
        '09 -> 00000000 -> 00001001
        '11 -> 00000000 -> 00010001
        '0A -> 00000000 -> 00001010

        '01 / 09 / 11
        Dim tmpBin As String
        Dim strBinary As String = ""
        Dim Tmp1 As String
        Dim Tmp2 As Integer
        tmpBin = Convert.ToInt32(Str, 16)
        strBinary = Format(CInt(Convert.ToString(CByte(tmpBin), 2)), "00000000")

        Tmp1 = Microsoft.VisualBasic.Right(strBinary, 3)
        Tmp2 = (CInt(Mid(Tmp1, 1, 1)) * 4) + (CInt(Mid(Tmp1, 2, 1)) * 2) + (CInt(Mid(Tmp1, 3, 1)) * 1)

        Return Tmp2

    End Function

    Dim TmpReadData1 As String = ""
    Dim TmpReadData2 As String = ""
    Dim TmpReadData3 As String = ""
    Dim tmpZone As String
    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim FCount As Integer
        Dim ecuTmp1 As String
        Dim ecuTmp2 As String
        Dim ecuTmp3 As String

        Dim TmpData As String = ""

        Dim RecvBuffer As String = ""
        Dim TmpStart As Integer = 0
        Dim TmpEnd As Integer = 0
        Do
            If Serial_CAN.IsOpen = True Then
                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_CAN.ReadExisting.ToUpper
                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    RecvBuffer = RecvBuffer & Incoming1
                    TmpData = ""
                    If RecvBuffer.Length >= 22 Then
                        TmpStart = InStr(1, RecvBuffer, "T")
                        TmpEnd = InStr(1, RecvBuffer, Chr(13))
                        TmpData = Mid(RecvBuffer, TmpStart, TmpEnd)
                        RecvBuffer = Mid(RecvBuffer, TmpEnd + 1, Len(RecvBuffer) - TmpEnd)

                        ECU_MESSAGE.Text = TmpData

                        If PAnel_CAN.Text <> "OK" Then
                            PAnel_CAN.Text = "OK"
                            PAnel_CAN.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        End If

                        If TmpData.Contains("T73A") = True Then
                            'Label1.Text = TmpData
                        End If
                        If wStep = 3.51 Then
                            If TmpData.Contains("T3EE") = True Or TmpData.Contains("T3ED") = True Then
                                If TmpData.Contains("014") = True Or TmpData.Contains("015") = True Then 'FWD
                                    FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COUNT = FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COUNT + 1
                                    If FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COUNT >= 1 Then FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COMP = True
                                ElseIf TmpData.Contains("018") = True Or TmpData.Contains("019") = True Then 'BWD
                                    FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COUNT = FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COUNT + 1
                                    If FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COUNT >= 1 Then FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COMP = True
                                End If
                            ElseIf TmpData.Contains("T39") = True Then
                                If TmpData.Contains("0080") = True Then
                                    FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COUNT = FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COUNT + 1
                                    If FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COUNT >= 1 Then FLAG_FOLDING_BWD_COMP = True
                                ElseIf TmpData.Contains("0040") = True Then
                                    FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COUNT = FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COUNT + 1
                                    If FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COUNT >= 1 Then FLAG_FOLDING_FWD_COMP = True
                                End If
                            End If
                        End If

                        '3A8037F3124AAAAAAAA
                        'T73A8037F3124AAAAAAAA
                        'T73A8037F3124AAAAAAAA
                        'T73A8037F3124AAAAAAAA

                        If STEP_ECU_EDUCATE = 0 Then
                            If TmpData.Contains("T73") = True Then
                                TextBox1.AppendText(TmpData & vbCrLf)
                            End If
                            If OP_LHRH = "LH" And OP_5P7P = "5P" Then
                                If Mid(TmpData, 1, 3) = "T73" And InStr(1, TmpData, "A3020202") <> 0 Then
                                    STEP_ECU_EDUCATE = 1
                                End If
                            ElseIf OP_LHRH = "RH" And OP_5P7P = "5P" Then
                                If Mid(TmpData, 1, 3) = "T73" And InStr(1, TmpData, "A30202") <> 0 Then
                                    If Serial_CAN.IsOpen() = True Then
                                        Serial_CAN.Write(Del_Space("t 731 8 30 00 14 00 00 00 00 00") & Chr(13))
                                    End If
                                ElseIf Mid(TmpData, 1, 3) = "T73" And InStr(1, TmpData, "0002A") <> 0 Then
                                    STEP_ECU_EDUCATE = 1
                                End If
                            End If
                            If Mid(TmpData, 1, 3) = "T73" And InStr(1, TmpData, "A30202") <> 0 Then
                                STEP_ECU_EDUCATE = 1
                            End If
                        End If

                        'Try

                        If wStep = 1000 Then 'SW

                            If TmpData.Contains(SWrecvMSg) = True Then
                                TextBox1.AppendText(TmpData & vbCrLf)
                                PANEL_ECU_SOFT_VERSION.Text = Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpData, 14, 2)) & Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpData, 16, 2)) & Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpData, 18, 2)) & Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpData, 20, 2))
                                wStep = 1001
                            End If

                        ElseIf wStep = 1010 Then 'HW

                            If TmpData.Contains(HWrecvMSg) = True Then
                                TextBox1.AppendText(TmpData & vbCrLf)
                                PANEL_ECU_HARD_VERSION.Text = Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpData, 14, 2)) & Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpData, 16, 2)) & Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpData, 18, 2)) & Chr("&H" & Mid(TmpData, 20, 2))
                                wStep = 1011
                            End If

                        ElseIf wStep = 1020 Then 'PART FIRST

                            If TmpData.Contains(PARTrecvMSg) = True Then
                                TextBox1.AppendText(TmpData & vbCrLf)
                                TmpReadData1 = TmpData
                                TmrErrCount = 0
                                wStep = 1030
                            End If

                        ElseIf wStep = 1030 Then 'PART SECOND

                            If TmpData.Contains(PARTrecvMSg) = True Then
                                TextBox1.AppendText(TmpData & vbCrLf)
                                TmpReadData2 = TmpData
                                TmrErrCount = 0
                                If OptionCarType = "PE" Then
                                    wStep = 1050

                            If TmpData.Contains(PARTrecvMSg) = True Then
                                TextBox1.AppendText(TmpData & vbCrLf)
                                TmpReadData3 = TmpData
                                TmrErrCount = 0

                            ElseIf Mid(Panel_Position.Text, 1, 2) = "RH" Then
                                If TmpData.Contains("T42D") Then
                                    TextBox1.AppendText(TmpData & vbCrLf)
                                    tmpZone = CStr(BitMask(Mid(TmpData, 6, 2)))
                                    tmpZONESTring = tmpZone
                                    PANEL_ECU_ZONE.Text = "ZONE" & tmpZONESTring
                                    If tmpZone = "1" Then
                                        PANEL_DEC_ECU_ZONE.Text = "OK"

                                        PANEL_DEC_ECU_ZONE.Text = "NG"

                            End If

                            If TmpData.Contains(PARTrecvMSg) = True Then

    Private Sub tmr_connect_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT_1()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If Flag_Connection_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ_1()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_READ_1()

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 18
        Dim i, j As Integer

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "D5200" & vbLf &
                                "D5201" & vbLf &
                                "D5202" & vbLf &
                                "D5250" & vbLf &
                                "D5251" & vbLf &
                                "D5252" & vbLf &
                                "D5253" & vbLf &
                                "D5254" & vbLf &
                                "D5255" & vbLf &
                                "D5256" & vbLf &
                                "D5257" & vbLf &
                                "D5258" & vbLf &
                                "D5259" & vbLf &
                                "D5260" & vbLf &
                                "D5261" & vbLf &
                                "D5203" & vbLf &
                                "D5204" & vbLf & "D5205"
        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i
            '5205 plc_value(17)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(0).Text = PLC_VALUE(0)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(1).Text = PLC_VALUE(1)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(2).Text = PLC_VALUE(2)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(3).Text = PLC_VALUE(15)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(4).Text = PLC_VALUE(16)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(5).Text = PLC_VALUE(17)

            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(0).Text = PLC_VALUE(3)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(1).Text = PLC_VALUE(4)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(2).Text = PLC_VALUE(5)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(3).Text = PLC_VALUE(6)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(4).Text = PLC_VALUE(7)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(5).Text = PLC_VALUE(8)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(6).Text = PLC_VALUE(9)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(7).Text = PLC_VALUE(10)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(8).Text = PLC_VALUE(11)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(9).Text = PLC_VALUE(12)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(10).Text = PLC_VALUE(13)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(11).Text = PLC_VALUE(14)

            For j = 0 To 5
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 11
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE_1(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

        ACT_PLC1.ActHostAddress = Address_Connection_PLC1
        If ACT_PLC1.Open <> 0 Then
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False
        Else

        End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub Load_Main(ByVal str As String, Optional SimulationEnable As Integer = 0)
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Dim AdoConnect As ADODB.Connection

            If SimulationEnable > 0 Then
                Open_Common_MDB()
                AdoConnect = Mdb_Connect
            Else
                Connection_Open()
                AdoConnect = Sql_Connect
            End If

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & str & "'", AdoConnect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                S110_SLIDE_FWD = Trim(Rs.Fields("S110_SLIDE_FWD").Value)
                S110_SLIDE_BWD = Trim(Rs.Fields("S110_SLIDE_BWD").Value)
                S120_LENGTH = Trim(Rs.Fields("S120_LENGTH").Value)
            End If

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()

            If SimulationEnable > 0 Then
                Connection_Close_MDB()
            Else
                Connection_Close()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ": Failed" & ", ErrorNumber:  " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)
        End Try
    End Sub

        Else

        End If

    Private Sub Init_Grid()

        With Grid1

            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .DrawMode = FlexCell.DrawModeEnum.OwnerDraw
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Cols = 3
            .Rows = 1
            .FixedRows = 2
            .FrozenBottomRows = 1

            .Column(1).Locked = True
            .Column(2).Locked = True

            For i As Integer = 1 To 2

                .Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            Next

            .Column(0).Width = 0
            .Column(1).Width = 220
            .Column(2).Width = 205

            .Cell(0, 1).Text = "품번"
            .Cell(0, 2).Text = "생산수량"

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_Grid()

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,PART_Count FROM Table_Part", Sql_Connect)

        Rs.MoveFirst()

        If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
        Else
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                If Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_Count").Value) = "0" Then
                Else
                    Grid1.AddItem(Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value) & Chr(9) &
                                  Trim(Rs.Fields("PART_COUNT").Value))
                End If
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()
        'MessageBox.Show("Load Grid OK")
    End Sub

    Private Sub Reset_Count()

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,PART_COUNT FROM Table_Part", Sql_Connect)

        Rs.MoveFirst()
        If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
        Else
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                Rs.Fields("PART_COUNT").Value = "0"
                Rs.Update()
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub
    Private Sub Save_Count()

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,PART_COUNT FROM Table_Part Where Part_No = '" & Panel_PartNo.Text & "'", Sql_Connect)
        If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
        Else
            tmp = CInt(Rs.Fields("PART_COUNT").Value)

            tmp = tmp + 1

            If tmp > 20000 Then tmp = 0

            Rs.Fields("PART_COUNT").Value = tmp

            Rs.Update()

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
        End If

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ChangeWorkStep(ByVal dNew As Double)
        On Error GoTo ErrHandler

        If wStep = dNew Then Exit Sub

        RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", wStep is changed " & wStep.ToString() & " --> " & dNew.ToString())
        wStep = dNew

        Exit Sub
ErrHandler:
        RemoteLog(Me.Name & ": " & MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", ErrorNumber: " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)

    End Sub
